# Glossary - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#glossary)

Glossary[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#glossary "Permanent link")

========================================================================

When you start diving into the Hummingbot ecosystem, you'll probably encounter some unfamiliar terms and phrases along the way. To help you on your journey, we've defined some of the most common trading vocabularies here in this handy cheat sheet.

Base asset[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#base-asset "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The asset in a trading pair whose quantity is fixed as a single unit in a price quote. For example, in a price quotation of ETH/DAI 100, ETH is the **base asset** and 100 is the amount of DAI exchangeable for each unit of ETH.  
  
In Hummingbot, the first token in a trading pair is always the base asset. See **quote asset** for more info.

Bollinger Bands[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#bollinger-bands "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Bollinger Bands (BB) are a widely popular technical analysis instrument created by John Bollinger in the early 1980’s. Bollinger Bands consist of a band of three lines which are plotted in relation to security prices. The line in the middle is usually a Simple Moving Average (SMA) based on a certain historical window length.

The SMA then serves as a base for the Upper and Lower Bands, which are used as a way to measure volatility by observing the relationship between the Bands and price. Typically the Upper and Lower Bands are set a number of standard deviations away from the SMA (The Middle Line).

![](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/bollinger.png)

**Parameters used in V2 Strategies:**

*   `bb_std`: Number of standard deviations used to set the upper and lower Bollinger Bands.
*   `bb_length`: Number of candle intervals used to calculate the SMA.

Centralized exchange (“CEX”)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#centralized-exchange-cex "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

An exchange which is operated by a central authority. In addition to order matching and broadcasting, the centralized exchange keeps custody of users’ assets.

Decentralized exchange (“DEX”)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#decentralized-exchange-dex "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

An exchange which operates in a decentralized way, using smart contracts to facilitate the transacting in and settling of assets. Generally, one distinguishing feature of a decentralized exchange is that participants keep custody of their own assets in their own wallets; the DEX facilitates the direct wallet-to-wallet settlement between counterparties in a transaction.

MACD[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#macd "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------

MACD (Mean Average Convergence Divergence) is an extremely popular indicator used in technical analysis. MACD can be used to identify aspects of a security's overall trend. Most notably these aspects are momentum, as well as trend direction and duration. What makes MACD so informative is that it is actually the combination of two different types of indicators. First, MACD employs two Moving Averages of varying lengths (which are lagging indicators) to identify trend direction and duration. Then, MACD takes the difference in values between those two Moving Averages (MACD Line) and an EMA of those Moving Averages (Signal Line) and plots that difference between the two lines as a histogram which oscillates above and below a center Zero Line. The histogram is used as a good indication of a security's momentum.

To fully understand the MACD indicator, it is first necessary to break down each of the indicator's components.

**The three major components of MACD**

1.  **The MACD Line**: The MACD Line is a result of taking a longer term EMA and subtracting it from a shorter term EMA.The most commonly used values are 26 days for the longer term EMA and 12 days for the shorter term EMA, but it is the trader's choice.
2.  **The Signal Line**: The Signal Line is an EMA of the MACD Line described in Component 1. The trader can choose what period length EMA to use for the Signal Line however 9 is the most common.
3.  **The MACD Histogram**: As time advances, the difference between the MACD Line and Signal Line will continually differ. The MACD histogram takes that difference and plots it into an easily readable histogram. The difference between the two lines oscillates around a Zero Line.

**Parameters used in V2 Strategies:**

*   `macd_fast`: number of candle intervals used to calculate the shorter-term EMA
*   `macd_slow`: number of candle intervals used to calculate the longer-term EMA
*   `macd_signal`: EMA of the MACD signal line

Maker[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#maker "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------

A party that places _maker orders_, and in doing so, provides liquidity to the market.

Maker order[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#maker-order "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A “limit order”; which is an order to buy or sell an asset at a specified price and quantity. Executing this order is not guaranteed; the order is only filled if there is a taker that accepts the price and quantity and transacts.

Order book[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#order-book "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------

A list of currently available (maker) orders on an exchange, showing all of the current buyer and seller interest in an asset.

Quote asset[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#quote-asset "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The asset in a asset pair whose quantity varies and whose quantity is denoted by the numerical figure of the price quote. For example, in a price quotation of ETH/DAI 100, DAI is the quote currency and 100 units of DAI are referenced in this exchange.  
  
In Hummingbot, the second token in a trading pair is always the quote asset. See **base asset** for more info.

Taker[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#taker "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------

A party that places _taker orders_, which execute immediately and fill a maker order.

Taker order[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#taker-order "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A “market order”; an order to buy or sell a specified quantity of an asset which is filled immediately at the best available price(s) available on the exchange.

Mid price[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#mid-price "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

The average of best bid and best ask price in the orderbook.

Hedging price[¶](https://hummingbot.org/glossary/#hedging-price "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

In cross exchange strategy, is the net cost of the other side of your limit order i.e., the cost of you making a taker order.  
  
_For example on your taker market, if you can buy 25 tokens for say a net price of $100 (other market makers have limit sell orders at a net price of 100 for all 25, e.g. 7.5 @ $99, 10 @ $100, 7.5 @ $101), then on your maker side, you would place a limit sell order for 25 @ $101 (assume 1% min profitability). If someone fills your sell order (you sell at $101), you immediately try to hedge by buying on the taker side at $100._

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

Thanks for your feedback! Help us improve this page by [filing an issue](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-site/issues/new?title=[Feedback]+Glossary+-+/glossary/)
.

Back to top

---

# Building Gateway Connectors - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#building-gateway-connectors)

Building Gateway Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#building-gateway-connectors "Permanent link")

===================================================================================================================================

Overview[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#overview "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This guide walks you through the process of building new Gateway connectors for decentralized exchanges (DEXs). Gateway connectors enable Hummingbot to interact with blockchain-based trading protocols through a standardized REST API interface.

Gateway supports three types of DEX connectors:

*   **Router**: DEX aggregators that find optimal swap routes
*   **AMM**: Traditional V2-style constant product pools
*   **CLMM**: Concentrated liquidity market makers with custom price ranges

Prerequisites[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#prerequisites "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before building a Gateway connector, ensure you have:

### Development Environment[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#development-environment "Permanent link")

*   Node.js 18+ and pnpm
*   TypeScript knowledge
*   Understanding of the target blockchain and DEX protocol

### Protocol Knowledge[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#protocol-knowledge "Permanent link")

*   Familiarity with the DEX's smart contracts
*   Understanding of the protocol's SDK or API
*   Knowledge of liquidity pool mechanics

### Gateway Setup[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#gateway-setup "Permanent link")

*   Gateway development environment configured
*   Ability to run and test Gateway locally

Connector Architecture[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#connector-architecture "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gateway connectors follow a modular architecture:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-1) src/connectors/{protocol}/ [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-2) ├── {protocol}.ts           # Main connector class [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-3) ├── {protocol}.config.ts    # Configuration interface [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-4) ├── {protocol}.constants.ts # Protocol-specific constants [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-5) ├── {protocol}.utils.ts     # Helper functions [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-6) ├── router-routes/          # Router endpoints (if applicable) [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-7) ├── amm-routes/            # AMM endpoints (if applicable) [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-0-8) └── clmm-routes/           # CLMM endpoints (if applicable)`

Implementation Steps[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#implementation-steps "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Step 1: Choose Connector Type[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-1-choose-connector-type "Permanent link")

Determine which trading types your DEX supports:

| Type | Use Case | Key Methods |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **Router** | DEX aggregators, swap-only protocols | `quote`, `trade`, `estimateGas` |
| **AMM** | V2-style pools with LP tokens | `poolPrice`, `addLiquidity`, `removeLiquidity` |
| **CLMM** | Concentrated liquidity with ranges | `openPosition`, `addLiquidity`, `collectFees` |

### Step 2: Create Connector Class[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-2-create-connector-class "Permanent link")

Create the main connector class - reference **Uniswap** if you are building an Ethereum-based DEX connector and **Raydium** if you are building a Solana-based DEX connector.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-1) // src/connectors/mydex/mydex.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-2) export class MyDex {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-3)   private static instances: Record<string, MyDex> = {};  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-4)   public solana: Solana; // or Ethereum  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-5)   public sdk: MyDEXSDK;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-6)   public config: MyDexConfig.RootConfig; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-7)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-8)   private constructor() {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-9)     this.config = MyDexConfig.config;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-10)     this.txVersion = TxVersion.V0;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-11)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-12)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-13)   // Gets singleton instance  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-14)   public static getInstance(network: string): MyDex {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-15)     if (!MyDex._instances) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-16)       MyDex._instances = {};    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-17)     } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-18)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-19)     if (!MyDex._instances[network]) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-20)       const instance = new MyDex();      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-21)       await instance.init(network);      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-22)       MyDex._instances[network] = instance;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-23)     } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-24)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-25)     return MyDex._instances[network];  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-26)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-27)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-28)   // Initializes instance  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-29)   private async init(network: string) {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-30)     try {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-31)       this.solana = await Solana.getInstance(network);      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-32)       this.sdk = await MyDEXSDK.load({        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-33)         connection: this.solana.connection,        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-34)         blockhashCommitment: 'confirmed',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-35)       }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-36)      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-37)       logger.info('MyDEX initialized successfully');    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-38)     } catch (error) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-39)       logger.error('MyDEX initialization failed:', error);      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-40)       throw error;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-41)     }  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-42)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-1-43) }`

### Step 3: Implement Trading Methods[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-3-implement-trading-methods "Permanent link")

Based on your connector type, implement the required methods:

#### Router Methods[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#router-methods "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-1) // Quote a swap [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-2) async quote(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-3)   base: Token,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-4)   quote: Token,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-5)   amount: BigNumber,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-6)   side: 'BUY' | 'SELL' [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-7) ): Promise<SwapQuote> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-8)   // Implement quote logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-9)   return {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-10)     route: optimalRoute,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-11)     expectedOut: outputAmount,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-12)     priceImpact: impact,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-13)     gasEstimate: gasLimit  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-14)   }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-15) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-16)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-17) // Execute a swap [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-18) async trade(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-19)   wallet: Wallet,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-20)   quote: SwapQuote,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-21)   slippage: number [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-22) ): Promise<Transaction> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-23)   // Build and execute transaction  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-24)   return transaction; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-2-25) }`

#### AMM Methods[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#amm-methods "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-1) // Get pool information [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-2) async poolInfo(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-3)   base: Token,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-4)   quote: Token [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-5) ): Promise<PoolInfo> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-6)   // Fetch pool data  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-7)   return {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-8)     reserves: [baseReserve, quoteReserve],    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-9)     fee: poolFee,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-10)     liquidity: totalLiquidity  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-11)   }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-12) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-14) // Add liquidity [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-15) async addLiquidity(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-16)   wallet: Wallet,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-17)   base: Token,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-18)   quote: Token,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-19)   baseAmount: BigNumber,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-20)   quoteAmount: BigNumber,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-21)   slippage: number [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-22) ): Promise<Transaction> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-23)   // Add liquidity logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-24)   return transaction; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-3-25) }`

#### CLMM Methods[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#clmm-methods "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-1) // Open a concentrated liquidity position [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-2) async openPosition(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-3)   wallet: Wallet,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-4)   pool: Pool,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-5)   lowerPrice: number,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-6)   upperPrice: number,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-7)   baseAmount: BigNumber,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-8)   quoteAmount: BigNumber [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-9) ): Promise<Position> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-10)   // Create position NFT  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-11)   return position; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-12) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-14) // Collect earned fees [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-15) async collectFees(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-16)   wallet: Wallet,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-17)   positionId: string [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-18) ): Promise<Transaction> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-19)   // Collect fees logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-20)   return transaction; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-4-21) }`

### Step 4: Create Route Handlers[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-4-create-route-handlers "Permanent link")

Create route handler files for your supported operations:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-1) // src/connectors/mydex/router-routes/router.routes.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-2) import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-3) import { MyDex } from '../mydex'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-4) import {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-5)   QuoteSwapRequest,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-6)   QuoteSwapResponse,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-7)   ExecuteSwapRequest,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-8)   ExecuteSwapResponse  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-9) } from '../../../schemas/router-schema'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-11) export const routerRoutes = Router(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-12)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-13) routerRoutes.post('/quote-swap', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-14)   const request = req.body as QuoteSwapRequest;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-15)   const connector = MyDex.getInstance(request.chain, request.network); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-16)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-17)   try {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-18)     const quote = await connector.quote(      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-19)       request.base,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-20)       request.quote,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-21)       request.amount,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-22)       request.side    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-23)     ); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-24)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-25)     const response: QuoteSwapResponse = {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-26)       network: request.network,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-27)       timestamp: Date.now(),      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-28)       latency: 0,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-29)       base: request.base,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-30)       quote: request.quote,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-31)       amount: request.amount,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-32)       expectedOut: quote.expectedOut,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-33)       price: quote.price,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-34)       gasEstimate: quote.gasEstimate,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-35)       route: quote.route    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-36)     }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-37)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-38)     res.status(200).json(response);  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-39)   } catch (error) {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-40)     res.status(500).json({ error: error.message });  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-41)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-42) }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-43)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-44) routerRoutes.post('/execute-swap', async (req: Request, res: Response) => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-45)   // Implementation for swap execution [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-5-46) });`

### Step 5: Add Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-5-add-configuration "Permanent link")

Create configuration files for your connector:

#### Schema Definition[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#schema-definition "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-1) // src/templates/namespace/mydex-schema.json [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-2) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-3)   "type": "object",  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-4)   "properties": {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-5)     "slippagePct": {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-6)       "type": "number",      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-7)       "description": "Maximum slippage percentage",      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-8)       "default": 1.0    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-9)     },    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-10)     "customParam": {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-11)       "type": "number",      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-12)       "description": "Custom parameter",    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-13)     },  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-14)   },  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-15)   "required": ["slippagePct"] [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-6-16) }`

#### Default Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#default-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-7-1) # src/templates/connectors/mydex.yml [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-7-2) allowedSlippage: 1.0 [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-7-3) customParam: 300000`

### Step 6: Register the Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-6-register-the-connector "Permanent link")

Register your connector in the main connector routes:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-1) // src/connectors/connector.routes.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-2) import { Router } from 'express'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-3) import { routerRoutes as mydexRouterRoutes } from './mydex/router-routes/router.routes'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-4) import { ammRoutes as mydexAmmRoutes } from './mydex/amm-routes/amm.routes'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-5)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-6) export const connectorRoutes = Router(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-7)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-8) // Add your connector routes [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-9) connectorRoutes.use('/mydex/router', mydexRouterRoutes); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-8-10) connectorRoutes.use('/mydex/amm', mydexAmmRoutes);`

### Step 7: Write Tests[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-7-write-tests "Permanent link")

Create comprehensive tests for your connector:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-1) // test/connectors/mydex/mydex.test.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-2) import { MyDex } from '../../../src/connectors/mydex/mydex'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-4) describe('MyDex Connector', () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-5)   let connector: MyDex; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-7)   beforeEach(() => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-8)     connector = MyDex.getInstance('ethereum', 'mainnet');  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-9)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-10)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-11)   describe('quote', () => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-12)     it('should return valid quote for token swap', async () => {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-13)       const quote = await connector.quote(        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-14)         mockTokenA,        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-15)         mockTokenB,        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-16)         BigNumber.from('1000000'),        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-17)         'SELL'      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-18)       ); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-19)      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-20)       expect(quote).toBeDefined();      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-21)       expect(quote.expectedOut).toBeGreaterThan(0);      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-22)       expect(quote.priceImpact).toBeLessThan(0.1);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-23)     }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-24)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-25)     it('should handle insufficient liquidity', async () => {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-26)       await expect(        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-27)         connector.quote(          [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-28)           mockTokenA,          [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-29)           mockTokenB,          [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-30)           BigNumber.from('999999999999'),          [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-31)           'SELL'        [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-32)         )      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-33)       ).rejects.toThrow('Insufficient liquidity');    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-34)     });  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-35)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-36)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-37)   // Add tests for all methods [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-9-38) });`

Adding Chain Support[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#adding-chain-support "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Chain Support Status

Gateway is currently not accepting pull requests for new blockchain implementations. The framework currently supports: - **EVM chains**: Ethereum and EVM-compatible chains (Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Polygon, BSC, Avalanche, etc.) - **SVM chains**: Solana and SVM-compatible chains

If your connector requires a chain built on either EVM or SVM architecture, you can proceed with the implementation below. For entirely new blockchain architectures, please check the [GitHub repository](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway)
 for updates on when new chain support will be accepted.

If your connector requires a new blockchain:

### Step 1: Create Chain Implementation[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-1-create-chain-implementation "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-1) // src/chains/mychain/mychain.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-2) import { ChainBase } from '../../services/chain-base'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-4) export class MyChain extends ChainBase {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-5)   private static instances: Record<string, MyChain> = {}; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-7)   public static getInstance(network: string): MyChain {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-8)     if (!MyChain.instances[network]) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-9)       MyChain.instances[network] = new MyChain(network);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-10)     }    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-11)     return MyChain.instances[network];  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-12)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-13)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-14)   // Implement required methods  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-15)   async getWallet(address: string): Promise<Wallet> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-16)     // Wallet implementation  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-17)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-18)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-19)   async getBalance(address: string): Promise<Balance> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-20)     // Balance checking logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-21)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-22)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-23)   async getTokens(symbols: string[]): Promise<Token[]> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-24)     // Token resolution logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-25)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-10-26) }`

### Step 2: Create Chain Routes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-2-create-chain-routes "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-1) // src/chains/mychain/routes/mychain.routes.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-2) import { Router } from 'express'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-3) import { MyChain } from '../mychain'; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-5) export const chainRoutes = Router(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-7) chainRoutes.get('/balance', async (req, res) => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-8)   const { address } = req.query;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-9)   const chain = MyChain.getInstance(req.query.network);  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-10)   const balance = await chain.getBalance(address);  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-11)   res.json(balance); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-11-12) });`

### Step 3: Add Chain Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#step-3-add-chain-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-1) # src/templates/chains/mychain.yml [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-2) networks:   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-3)   mainnet:    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-4)     rpcUrl: 'https://rpc.mychain.io'    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-5)     chainId: 1234    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-6)     nativeCurrency: 'MYCOIN'  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-7)   testnet:    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-8)     rpcUrl: 'https://testnet-rpc.mychain.io'    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-9)     chainId: 5678    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-12-10)     nativeCurrency: 'TESTCOIN'`

Testing Requirements[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#testing-requirements "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All Gateway connectors must meet these testing standards:

1.  **Code Coverage**: Minimum 75% coverage
2.  **Unit Tests**: Test all public methods
3.  **Integration Tests**: Test API endpoints
4.  **Error Handling**: Test failure scenarios
5.  **Mock Data**: Use realistic test data

### Running Tests[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#running-tests "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-1) # Run all tests [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-2) pnpm test [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-4) # Run tests for specific connector [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-5) pnpm test -- mydex [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-7) # Check coverage [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-13-8) pnpm test:coverage`

Code Quality Standards[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#code-quality-standards "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Linting and Formatting[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#linting-and-formatting "Permanent link")

Gateway uses ESLint and Prettier for code quality:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-1) # Run linting [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-2) pnpm lint [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-4) # Auto-fix linting issues [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-5) pnpm lint:fix [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-7) # Format code [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#__codelineno-14-8) pnpm format`

### TypeScript Best Practices[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#typescript-best-practices "Permanent link")

1.  **Strong Typing**: Use explicit types, avoid `any`
2.  **Error Handling**: Implement proper error classes
3.  **Async/Await**: Use modern async patterns
4.  **Documentation**: Add JSDoc comments for public methods

Submission Checklist[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#submission-checklist "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before submitting your connector:

*    All tests pass with >75% coverage
*    Code passes linting and formatting checks
*    Configuration files added for all supported networks
*    API endpoints follow schema specifications
*    Documentation includes usage examples
*    Error handling covers edge cases
*    Performance tested with realistic loads
*    Security review completed

Next Steps[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#next-steps "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1.  **Test locally**: Run Gateway with your connector and test all operations
2.  **Create examples**: Add sample scripts showing connector usage
3.  **Submit PR**: Create pull request to [Gateway repository](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway)
    
4.  **Governance proposal**: Submit [New Connector Proposal](https://hummingbot.org/about/proposals/)
     if required

Resources[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/#resources "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   [Gateway GitHub Repository](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway)
    
*   [Gateway API Documentation](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/)
    
*   [Connector Schemas](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/schemas)
    
*   [Example Connectors](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors)
    
*   [Discord Support](https://discord.gg/hummingbot)

# Connector Architecture - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#gateway-connector-architecture)

Gateway Connector Architecture[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#gateway-connector-architecture "Permanent link")

======================================================================================================================================================

Overview[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#overview "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gateway connectors follow a standardized architecture that ensures consistency, maintainability, and compatibility with the Hummingbot client. This page describes the architectural patterns and design principles used in Gateway connectors.

Core Components[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#core-components "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Connector Class[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#1-connector-class "Permanent link")

The main connector class serves as the entry point and coordinator for all DEX operations:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-1) export class ConnectorBase {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-2)   protected chain: string;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-3)   protected network: string;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-4)   protected config: ConnectorConfig;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-5)   protected sdk: ProtocolSDK; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-7)   constructor(chain: string, network: string) {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-8)     this.chain = chain;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-9)     this.network = network;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-10)     this.config = this.loadConfig();    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-11)     this.sdk = this.initializeSDK();  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-12)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-0-13) }`

**Responsibilities:** - SDK initialization and management - Configuration loading - Method coordination - Error handling and recovery

### 2\. Route Handlers[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#2-route-handlers "Permanent link")

Route handlers translate HTTP requests into connector method calls:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-1) interface RouteHandler {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-2)   validateRequest(req: Request): void;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-3)   processRequest(req: Request): Promise<any>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-4)   formatResponse(data: any): Response;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-5)   handleError(error: Error): ErrorResponse; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-1-6) }`

**Key Features:** - Request validation against schemas - Async operation handling - Standardized response formatting - Comprehensive error handling

### 3\. Trading Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#3-trading-types "Permanent link")

Each trading type defines specific interfaces and operations:

#### Router Interface[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#router-interface "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-1) interface RouterConnector {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-2)   quote(params: QuoteParams): Promise<Quote>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-3)   trade(params: TradeParams): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-4)   estimateGas(params: TradeParams): Promise<BigNumber>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-5)   getRoute(params: RouteParams): Promise<Route[]>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-2-6) }`

#### AMM Interface[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#amm-interface "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-1) interface AMMConnector {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-2)   poolInfo(pair: TradingPair): Promise<PoolInfo>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-3)   poolPrice(pair: TradingPair): Promise<Price>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-4)   addLiquidity(params: LiquidityParams): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-5)   removeLiquidity(params: RemoveLiquidityParams): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-6)   positionInfo(params: PositionParams): Promise<Position>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-3-7) }`

#### CLMM Interface[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#clmm-interface "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-1) interface CLMMConnector {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-2)   openPosition(params: OpenPositionParams): Promise<Position>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-3)   closePosition(positionId: string): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-4)   addLiquidity(params: AddLiquidityParams): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-5)   removeLiquidity(params: RemoveLiquidityParams): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-6)   collectFees(positionId: string): Promise<Transaction>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-7)   getPositions(owner: string): Promise<Position[]>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-4-8) }`

Design Patterns[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#design-patterns "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Singleton Pattern[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#singleton-pattern "Permanent link")

Connectors use the singleton pattern to ensure efficient resource usage:

``[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-1) class MyDex {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-2)   private static instances: Map<string, MyDex> = new Map(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-3)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-4)   public static getInstance(chain: string, network: string): MyDex {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-5)     const key = `${chain}:${network}`;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-6)     if (!this.instances.has(key)) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-7)       this.instances.set(key, new MyDex(chain, network));    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-8)     }    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-9)     return this.instances.get(key)!;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-10)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-5-11) }``

**Benefits:** - Reuses SDK connections - Maintains state consistency - Reduces memory footprint - Improves performance

### Factory Pattern[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#factory-pattern "Permanent link")

Token and pool creation uses factory patterns:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-1) class TokenFactory {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-2)   static createToken(    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-3)     address: string,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-4)     chain: string,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-5)     network: string  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-6)   ): Token {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-7)     const chainInstance = ChainFactory.getChain(chain, network);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-8)     return new Token(address, chainInstance);  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-9)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-6-10) }`

### Strategy Pattern[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#strategy-pattern "Permanent link")

Different swap strategies based on protocol type:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-1) interface SwapStrategy {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-2)   execute(params: SwapParams): Promise<Transaction>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-3) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-5) class UniswapV2Strategy implements SwapStrategy {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-6)   async execute(params: SwapParams): Promise<Transaction> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-7)     // V2 specific logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-8)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-9) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-11) class UniswapV3Strategy implements SwapStrategy {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-12)   async execute(params: SwapParams): Promise<Transaction> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-13)     // V3 specific logic  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-14)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-7-15) }`

Data Flow[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#data-flow "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Request Lifecycle[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#request-lifecycle "Permanent link")

    graph TD
        A[HTTP Request] --> B[Route Handler]
        B --> C[Schema Validation]
        C --> D[Connector Method]
        D --> E[SDK Call]
        E --> F[Blockchain RPC]
        F --> G[Response Processing]
        G --> H[HTTP Response]

1.  **Request Reception**: Gateway receives HTTP request
2.  **Routing**: Request routed to appropriate handler
3.  **Validation**: Request validated against schema
4.  **Processing**: Connector method processes request
5.  **Execution**: SDK executes blockchain operations
6.  **Response**: Formatted response returned to client

### State Management[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#state-management "Permanent link")

Gateway connectors maintain minimal state:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-1) class ConnectorState {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-2)   // Cached data with TTL  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-3)   private poolCache: Map<string, CachedPool>;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-4)   private tokenCache: Map<string, CachedToken>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-5)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-6)   // Active operations  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-7)   private pendingTransactions: Map<string, Transaction>; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-8)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-9)   // Performance metrics  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-10)   private metrics: PerformanceMetrics; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-8-11) }`

**Cached Items:** - Token metadata - Pool information - Gas estimates - Route calculations

**TTL Strategy:** - Token info: 1 hour - Pool data: 30 seconds - Gas prices: 10 seconds - Routes: Quote TTL

Error Handling[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#error-handling "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Error Hierarchy[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#error-hierarchy "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-1) class GatewayError extends Error {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-2)   code: number;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-3)   details: any; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-4) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-5)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-6) class ValidationError extends GatewayError {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-7)   code = 400; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-8) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-9)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-10) class InsufficientLiquidityError extends GatewayError {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-11)   code = 422; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-12) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-14) class BlockchainError extends GatewayError {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-15)   code = 503; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-9-16) }`

### Error Recovery[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#error-recovery "Permanent link")

Connectors implement retry logic for transient failures:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-1) async function withRetry<T>(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-2)   operation: () => Promise<T>,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-3)   maxRetries: number = 3 [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-4) ): Promise<T> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-5)   let lastError: Error; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-7)   for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-8)     try {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-9)       return await operation();    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-10)     } catch (error) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-11)       lastError = error;      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-12)       if (!isRetryable(error)) throw error;      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-13)       await sleep(exponentialBackoff(i));    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-14)     }  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-15)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-16)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-17)   throw lastError; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-10-18) }`

Performance Optimization[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#performance-optimization "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Batching[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#batching "Permanent link")

Batch multiple operations when possible:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-1) class BatchProcessor {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-2)   private queue: Operation[] = [];  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-3)   private timer: NodeJS.Timeout; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-4)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-5)   add(operation: Operation): void {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-6)     this.queue.push(operation);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-7)     this.scheduleFlush();  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-8)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-9)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-10)   private async flush(): Promise<void> {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-11)     const batch = this.queue.splice(0);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-12)     await this.processBatch(batch);  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-13)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-11-14) }`

### Caching[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#caching "Permanent link")

Implement intelligent caching strategies:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-1) class Cache<T> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-2)   private data: Map<string, CacheEntry<T>> = new Map(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-3)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-4)   get(key: string): T | undefined {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-5)     const entry = this.data.get(key);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-6)     if (!entry || this.isExpired(entry)) {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-7)       return undefined;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-8)     }    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-9)     return entry.value;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-10)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-11)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-12)   set(key: string, value: T, ttl: number): void {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-13)     this.data.set(key, {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-14)       value,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-15)       expiry: Date.now() + ttl    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-16)     });  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-17)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-12-18) }`

### Connection Pooling[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#connection-pooling "Permanent link")

Maintain connection pools for blockchain RPCs:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-1) class RPCPool {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-2)   private connections: RPCConnection[] = [];  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-3)   private currentIndex = 0; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-4)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-5)   getConnection(): RPCConnection {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-6)     const connection = this.connections[this.currentIndex];    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-7)     this.currentIndex = (this.currentIndex + 1) % this.connections.length;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-8)     return connection;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-9)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#__codelineno-13-10) }`

Security Considerations[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/architecture/#security-considerations "Permanent link")
