### Error Scenarios[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#error-scenarios "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-1) describe('Error handling', () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-2)   it('should handle network errors gracefully', async () => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-3)     mockSDK.simulateNetworkError(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-4)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-5)     await expect(connector.quote({      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-6)       base: fixtures.tokens.USDC,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-7)       quote: fixtures.tokens.WETH,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-8)       amount: '1000000',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-9)       side: 'SELL'    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-10)     })).rejects.toThrow('Network error');  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-11)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-12)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-13)   it('should handle invalid token addresses', async () => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-14)     await expect(connector.quote({      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-15)       base: { ...fixtures.tokens.USDC, address: 'invalid' },      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-16)       quote: fixtures.tokens.WETH,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-17)       amount: '1000000',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-18)       side: 'SELL'    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-19)     })).rejects.toThrow('Invalid token address');  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-20)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-21)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-22)   it('should handle transaction failures', async () => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-23)     mockSDK.simulateTransactionFailure(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-24)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-25)     await expect(connector.trade({      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-26)       wallet: fixtures.wallet,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-27)       base: fixtures.tokens.USDC,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-28)       quote: fixtures.tokens.WETH,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-29)       amount: '1000000',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-30)       side: 'SELL',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-31)       slippage: 0.01    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-32)     })).rejects.toThrow('Transaction failed');  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-33)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-34)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-35)   it('should handle slippage exceeded', async () => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-36)     mockSDK.setPriceImpact(0.1); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-37)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-38)     await expect(connector.trade({      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-39)       wallet: fixtures.wallet,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-40)       base: fixtures.tokens.USDC,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-41)       quote: fixtures.tokens.WETH,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-42)       amount: '1000000',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-43)       side: 'SELL',      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-44)       slippage: 0.01    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-45)     })).rejects.toThrow('Slippage exceeded');  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-46)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-10-47) });`

Test Coverage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#test-coverage "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Running Coverage Reports[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#running-coverage-reports "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-1) # Generate coverage report [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-2) pnpm test:coverage [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-4) # Generate HTML report [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-5) pnpm test:coverage -- --coverageReporters=html [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-7) # Check coverage thresholds [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-8) pnpm test:coverage -- --coverageThreshold='{   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-9)   "global": {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-10)     "branches": 75,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-11)     "functions": 75,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-12)     "lines": 75,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-13)     "statements": 75  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-14)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-11-15) }'`

### Coverage Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#coverage-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-1) // jest.config.js [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-2) module.exports = {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-3)   collectCoverage: true,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-4)   collectCoverageFrom: [    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-5)     'src/connectors/mydex/**/*.ts',    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-6)     '!src/connectors/mydex/**/*.test.ts',    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-7)     '!src/connectors/mydex/types.ts'  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-8)   ],  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-9)   coverageThreshold: {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-10)     global: {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-11)       branches: 75,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-12)       functions: 75,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-13)       lines: 75,      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-14)       statements: 75    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-15)     }  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-16)   },  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-17)   coverageReporters: ['text', 'lcov', 'html'] [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-12-18) };`

Test Utilities[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#test-utilities "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Helper Functions[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#helper-functions "Permanent link")

``[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-1) // test/utils/test-helpers.ts [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-2) export function createMockWallet(address?: string): Wallet {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-3)   return {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-4)     address: address || '0x' + '0'.repeat(40),    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-5)     privateKey: '0x' + '0'.repeat(64),    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-6)     signTransaction: jest.fn(),    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-7)     signMessage: jest.fn()  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-8)   }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-9) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-11) export function createMockToken(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-12)   symbol: string,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-13)   decimals: number = 18 [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-14) ): Token {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-15)   return {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-16)     symbol,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-17)     decimals,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-18)     address: `0x${symbol}${'0'.repeat(40 - symbol.length)}`,    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-19)     name: `Mock ${symbol}`  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-20)   }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-21) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-22)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-23) export async function waitForEvent(   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-24)   emitter: EventEmitter,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-25)   event: string,  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-26)   timeout: number = 5000 [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-27) ): Promise<any> {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-28)   return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-29)     const timer = setTimeout(() => {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-30)       reject(new Error(`Timeout waiting for event: ${event}`));    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-31)     }, timeout); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-32)    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-33)     emitter.once(event, (data) => {      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-34)       clearTimeout(timer);      [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-35)       resolve(data);    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-36)     });  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-37)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-13-38) }``

Best Practices[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#best-practices "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 1\. Test Independence[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#1-test-independence "Permanent link")

Each test should be independent and not rely on others:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-1) // Good [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-2) beforeEach(() => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-3)   connector = new MyDex('ethereum', 'mainnet'); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-4) }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-5)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-6) // Bad - relies on previous test state [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-7) it('test 1', () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-8)   connector.setState('value'); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-9) }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-11) it('test 2', () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-12)   expect(connector.getState()).toBe('value'); // Depends on test 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-14-13) });`

### 2\. Descriptive Test Names[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#2-descriptive-test-names "Permanent link")

Use clear, descriptive test names:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-15-1) // Good [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-15-2) it('should return USDC-WETH pool info with correct reserves and fee tier'); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-15-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-15-4) // Bad [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-15-5) it('works');`

### 3\. Test Data Builders[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#3-test-data-builders "Permanent link")

Create builders for complex test data:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-1) class PoolBuilder {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-2)   private pool = { ...defaultPool }; [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-3)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-4)   withTokens(token0: string, token1: string): this {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-5)     this.pool.token0 = token0;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-6)     this.pool.token1 = token1;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-7)     return this;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-8)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-9)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-10)   withLiquidity(amount: string): this {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-11)     this.pool.liquidity = amount;    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-12)     return this;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-13)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-14)  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-15)   build(): Pool {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-16)     return this.pool;  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-17)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-18) } [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-20) // Usage [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-21) const pool = new PoolBuilder()   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-22)   .withTokens('USDC', 'WETH')  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-23)   .withLiquidity('1000000')  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-16-24)   .build();`

### 4\. Async Testing[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#4-async-testing "Permanent link")

Always handle async operations properly:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-1) // Good [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-2) it('should handle async operation', async () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-3)   const result = await asyncOperation();  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-4)   expect(result).toBeDefined(); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-5) }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-7) // Bad - might pass before async completes [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-8) it('should handle async operation', () => {   [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-9)   asyncOperation().then(result => {    [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-10)     expect(result).toBeDefined();  [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-11)   }); [](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#__codelineno-17-12) });`

Resources[¶](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/testing/#resources "Permanent link")

# 2.2.0 - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#hummingbot-v220-release-notes)

Hummingbot v2.2.0 Release Notes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#hummingbot-v220-release-notes "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================================

_Released on December 26, 2024_

| Repository | Description | GitHub Release | DockerHub Release |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Hummingbot](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot) | Core Client | [`v2.2.0`](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/releases/tag/v2.2.0) | [`version-2.2.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/hummingbot/tags?name=version-2.2.0) |
| [Gateway](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway) | DEX Middleware | [`v2.2.0`](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/releases/tag/v2.2.0) | [`version-2.2.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/gateway/tags?name=version-2.2.0) |

Note

The [Dashboard](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard)
, [Backend-API](https://github.com/hummingbot/backend-api)
, and [Deploy](https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy)
 repositories will now follow a continuous deployment model without fixed version releases. This approach allows for more frequent updates and improved maintainability of these components.

How to Update[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#how-to-update "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Docker[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#docker "Permanent link")

Re-run the [Deploy](https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy)
 setup script:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-0-1) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy.git [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-0-2) cd deploy [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-0-3) bash setup.sh`

For individual images, exit running containers, pull the latest images, and restart:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-1-1) docker compose down [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-1-2) docker pull hummingbot/hummingbot:latest [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-1-3) docker compose up -d`

### Source[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#source "Permanent link")

Update the branches of each repo to this release by running:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-2-1) git pull origin master # Hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#__codelineno-2-2) git pull origin main # Gateway`

Afterwards, follow the instructions to re-install dependencies and compile the codebase for each repository. See [Install Hummingbot from Source](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-client/)
 and [Install Gateway from Source](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/)
.

Release Highlights[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#release-highlights "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### New Solana and Jupiter DEX Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#new-solana-and-jupiter-dex-connectors "Permanent link")

In this release, [Hummingbot #7334](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7334)
 & [Gateway #374](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/374)
 introduces new connectors for the Solana blockchain and the Jupiter DEX aggregator to the Gateway middleware, along with a Solana class in the Hummingbot client to interface with them.

Users can now use the Arbitrage Controller (see below) or the [AMM arbitrage](https://hummingbot.org/strategies/v1-strategies/amm-arbitrage/)
 V1 strategy to run arbitrage strategies between Jupiter and other Hummingbot-supported exchanges. See the [Jupiter](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/)
 documentation for more information.

### New Hyperliquid Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#new-hyperliquid-spot-connector "Permanent link")

This release adds support for Hyperliquid spot markets in [Hummingbot #7282](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7282)
, funded by the Hyperliquid Connector Pot voted by the HBOT token holders in quarterly polls. See the [Hyperliquid](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/)
 documentation for more information.

**Thanks to [isreallee82](https://github.com/isreallee82)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

### New Arbitrage Controller[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#new-arbitrage-controller "Permanent link")

The new **Arbitrage** controller is a revamped V2 version of our legacy arbitrage strategies. It enables high-performance arbitrage trading between any two spot exchanges (AMM or CLOB), using the new `ArbitrageExecutor` component to manage order execution.

The strategy includes several key features:

*   Configurable price feeds from both exchange rates and external oracles
*   Automatic spread detection and order placement
*   Support for both spot and perpetual markets
*   Comprehensive risk management capabilities including minimum spread requirements, maximum position sizes, and cooldown periods between trades
*   The enhanced rate oracle system allows flexible sourcing of price data from multiple feeds to ensure reliable arbitrage opportunities

### New GridStrike Controller[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#new-gridstrike-controller "Permanent link")

Similarly, rhe new **GridStrike** Strategy V2 controller introduces a classic grid strategy to the V2 framework that allows users to create and maintain a grid of orders within specified price ranges, and uses the new `GridExecutor` component to manage them.

The strategy includes several key features:

*   Automatic grid range adjustment based on real-time market data
*   Visual configuration tools for viewing and modifying grid ranges on charts
*   Support for up to 5 independent grid ranges with customizable settings
*   Comprehensive risk management capabilities including price bounds, time limits, and minimum spread requirements

Pull Requests: [Hummingbot #7285](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7285)
 | [Backend-API #46](https://github.com/hummingbot/backend-api/pull/46)
 | [Dashboard #190](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard/pull/190)
.

### Improvements to Existing Exchange Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#improvements-to-existing-exchange-connectors "Permanent link")

*   **Dexalot**: The `dexalot` connector has been upgraded to the latest API version in [#7291](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7291)
    . **Thanks to [yancong001](https://github.com/yancong001)
     for this contribution! 🙏**
    
*   **Bybit**: Improved the `bybit_perpetual` balance fetching in [#7279](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7279)
    . **Thanks to [tomasgaudino](https://github.com/tomasgaudino)
     for this fix! 🙏**
    
*   **Binance**: Fixed the `binance` websocket reconnection issue in [#7310](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7310)
    . **Thanks to [komposter](https://github.com/komposter)
     for this fix! 🙏**
    
*   **Hyperliquid**: The issue with the `hyperliquid` auth exemption for public data has been fixed in [#7328](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7328)
    . **Thanks to [isreallee82](https://github.com/isreallee82)
     for this fix! 🙏**
    

### General Improvements[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#general-improvements "Permanent link")

*   **Enhanced Backtesting Engine**: Improved simulation accuracy and performance [Hummingbot #7307](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7307)
    
*   **Performance Observability**: Backend-API endpoints were added to enable better performance monitoring [Backend-API #36](https://github.com/hummingbot/backend-api/pull/36)
    .
*   **Better Candles Data Processing**: Added improvements that enhanced the processing of candlestick data in [#7276](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7276)
    .
*   **Better `status` Output for Directional Script**: Improved the `status` output for the sample directional script in [#7341](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7341)
    .

### Other Updates[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.2.0/#other-updates "Permanent link")

**Hummingbot**

# Overview - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#installation-overview)

Installation Overview[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#installation-overview "Permanent link")

======================================================================================================

The Hummingbot ecosystem consists of several repositories that work together to provide a complete algorithmic trading platform. This page provides an overview of each component and links to their installation guides.

Hummingbot Ecosystem[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#hummingbot-ecosystem "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

UI)   │     (AI Agents)     │ (Web UI, deprecated)  │ [](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#__codelineno-0-6) └─────────┬─────────┴──────────┬──────────┴───────────┬───────────┘ Repository Overview[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#repository-overview "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

| Repository | Description | Installation | Quickstart |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [**Hummingbot API**](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api) | REST API backend for managing bots, portfolios, and trading | [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/installation/) | [Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-api/) |
| [**Hummingbot Client**](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot) | Core trading client with CLI interface for CEX trading | [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/client/installation/) | [Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-client/) |
| [**Gateway**](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway) | DEX middleware for Uniswap, PancakeSwap, Raydium, and 30+ DEXs | [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/) | \-  |
| [**Condor**](https://github.com/hummingbot/condor) | Telegram bot for monitoring and controlling Hummingbot instances | [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/condor/installation/) | \-  |
| [**MCP Server**](https://github.com/hummingbot/mcp) | Connects AI assistants (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT) to Hummingbot | [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/installation/) | \-  |
| [**Dashboard**](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard) | Web-based UI for bot management (deprecated, use Condor) | [GitHub](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard) | [Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/blog/hummingbot-dashboard-quickstart-guide/) |
| [**Quants Lab**](https://github.com/hummingbot/quants-lab) | Research environment for backtesting and strategy analysis | [GitHub](https://github.com/hummingbot/quants-lab) | \-  |

Recommended Paths[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#recommended-paths "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Hummingbot Client[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#hummingbot-client "Permanent link")

The legacy CLI-based trading client. Best for:

*   **Getting started** - Most users begin here to learn Hummingbot
*   **Local usage** - Running on your local machine
*   **V1 strategies** - Pure Market Making, Cross-Exchange Market Making, etc.
*   **Single instance** - Running one bot at a time

[**Hummingbot Client Quickstart →**](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-client/)

### Hummingbot API[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#hummingbot-api "Permanent link")

The modern REST API backend for managing multiple bots. Best for:

*   **Multiple instances** - Deploy and manage many bots simultaneously
*   **Production environments** - Running on cloud servers (AWS, Digital Ocean, etc.)
*   **Modern interfaces** - Use Condor (Telegram) or AI agents via MCP
*   **Portfolio management** - Track balances across all exchanges in one place

[**Hummingbot API Quickstart →**](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-api/)

### Developers[¶](https://hummingbot.org/installation/#developers "Permanent link")

For developers who want to add/customize exchange connectors, extend strategies, or otherwise modify the Hummingbot codebase:

**Source Installation**

*   [Hummingbot Client from Source](https://hummingbot.org/client/installation/#source-installation)
     - Install the core trading client for development
*   [Gateway from Source](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/#source-installation)
     - Install the DEX connector middleware for development

**Building Connectors**

*   [Building CLOB Connectors](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/connectors/)
     - Add new CEX/DEX order book connectors to Hummingbot Client
*   [Building Gateway Connectors](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/)
     - Add new AMM DEX connectors to Gateway

**API Development**

*   [Hummingbot API Developer Guide](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/)
     - Use the REST API with curl or Python client

.

# 2.11.0 - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#hummingbot-v2110-release-notes)

Hummingbot v2.11.0 Release Notes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#hummingbot-v2110-release-notes "Permanent link")

==================================================================================================================================

_Released on December 15, 2025_

| Repository | Description | GitHub Release | DockerHub Release |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Hummingbot Client](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot) | Core Client | [`v2.11.0 changelog`](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/releases/tag/v2.11.0) | [`version-2.11.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/hummingbot/tags?name=version-2.11.0) |
| [Gateway](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway) | DEX Middleware | [`v2.11.0 changelog`](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/releases/tag/v2.11.0) | [`version-2.11.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/gateway/tags?name=version-2.11.0) |

Note

Other Hummingbot repositories such as [Hummingbot-API](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api)
, [Hummingbot MCP](https://github.com/hummingbot/mcp)
, and [Quants-Lab](https://github.com/hummingbot/quant-lab)
 follow a continuous deployment model without fixed version releases. Use the `main` branch for these repositories.

How to Install / Update[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#how-to-install-update "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configuration Changes in v2.11.0

This release includes schema changes to both Hummingbot and Gateway configuration files. **Existing configuration files are not compatible** and must be removed before updating. See [Updating to New Versions - Updates with Configuration Changes](https://hummingbot.org/installation/update/#updates-with-configuration-changes)
 for detailed instructions.

*   **New Installation**: See the newly revamped [Installation](https://hummingbot.org/installation/)
     to get started with Hummingbot API with Condor, or the traditional Hummingbot Client.
*   **Updating**: See [Updating to New Versions](https://hummingbot.org/installation/update/)
     for update instructions.

Release Highlights[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#release-highlights "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🤖 Condor — Telegram Bot for Managing Hummingbot Instances[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#condor-telegram-bot-for-managing-hummingbot-instances "Permanent link")

**Condor** is a new **Telegram-based control center** for Hummingbot, giving traders a fast and intuitive way to monitor bots, run trades, manage liquidity, and interact with Gateway — all directly from their phone.

Built on the Hummingbot API, Condor provides a streamlined interface for both CEX and DEX operations, offering real-time dashboards, interactive menus, and a unified configuration system. Whether you're swapping tokens, managing CLMM liquidity, or monitoring your grid strategies, Condor brings full Hummingbot control into a lightweight, mobile-friendly UI.

**Key Features**

*   **Portfolio Dashboard:** View PnL, asset distribution, positions, LP states, and historical charts
*   **Bot Management:** Monitor multiple bots, controllers, metrics, logs, and status in real time
*   **CEX & DEX Trading:** Place spot/perp orders and execute DEX swaps with quotes and slippage control
*   **Liquidity Management:** Browse pools, manage CLMM positions, collect fees, and close positions
*   **Server & API Key Configuration:** Add/edit/delete Hummingbot API servers and exchange credentials
*   **AI Assistant (Coming Soon):** Natural-language trading through GPT-4o + MCP tooling

Condor makes Hummingbot more accessible than ever — perfect for traders running bots across multiple environments who want lightweight, remote monitoring and execution without needing a desktop terminal. The [Hummingbot API Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-api/)
 includes step-by-step Condor setup instructions. See [Condor](https://hummingbot.org/condor/)
 for more information.

🔗 GitHub: [https://github.com/hummingbot/condor](https://github.com/hummingbot/condor)

### 🐳 New Orca Connector for Solana DEX Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#new-orca-connector-for-solana-dex-trading "Permanent link")

We’re excited to introduce a **brand-new Orca connector**, bringing one of Solana’s most popular DEXs into the Hummingbot ecosystem. This integration enables traders to execute swaps and liquidity-sensitive strategies on Solana using Hummingbot’s unified API.

This connector was developed through our **[connector bounties program](https://hummingbot.org/bounties/)
**, which empowers community developers and ecosystem partners to build high-quality integrations in an open and transparent process.

**Highlights**

*   **Seamless Orca Integration:** Full support for interacting with Orca’s Whirlpool AMM and swap functionality.
*   **Solana Native Support:** Utilizes Solana-specific transaction building, signing, and routing logic for fast, reliable execution.
*   **DEX-Focused Architecture:** Designed to work across Orca pools, enabling market-making, arbitrage, and custom strategy development.
*   **Gateway Compatibility:** Fully accessible through Gateway, making it easy to use via the Hummingbot UI or external workflows.

This new connector expands Hummingbot’s cross-chain DEX capabilities and strengthens our support for high-performance Solana-based trading.

📚 Documentation: [Orca Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/)

**Special thanks to [mlguys](https://github.com/mlguys)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

### 🛠️ Gateway Connector & Infrastructure Enhancements[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#gateway-connector-infrastructure-enhancements "Permanent link")

This release delivers a wide set of improvements across Gateway’s Solana and EVM connectors, focusing on **token reliability**, **pool discovery**, **error-handling consistency**, and **CLMM stability**. Together, these updates strengthen cross-chain LP workflows, improve swap accuracy, and make Gateway more resilient to real-world RPC/provider quirks.

**Highlights**

*   **Dynamic & Robust Token Handling** [#543](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/543)
     Gateway now supports **unlisted ERC-20 tokens**, dynamic wrapped-token detection, and graceful fallbacks when external RPCs (like Helius) return mixed parsed/base64 formats. This resolves issues in Polygon wrapping, BigInt conversions, and post-transaction balance extraction.
    
*   **CLMM Stability Improvements (Meteora, Raydium, Orca, PancakeSwap-Sol)** [#550](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/550)
     Added fixes for **InvalidPositionWidth** errors, accurate Meteora fee reporting, improved user-facing swap/allowance errors, and reliable handling of unknown pool tokens. CLMM operations across Solana ecosystems now behave consistently and predictably.
    
*   **WebSocket Monitoring & Real-Time Discovery Tools** [#555](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/555)
     Introduced **Helius and Infura WebSocket listeners** for live transaction monitoring, plus **CoinGecko-based token & pool discovery** with automatic caching. This enhances ecosystem coverage and allows instant visibility into new tokens and pool opportunities.
    
*   **Standardized Error Handling Framework** [#563](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/563)
     [#564](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/564)
     A new centralized `HttpError` service standardizes error messages and HTTP responses across ~70 connector routes, improving clarity and debugging consistency for all Solana and EVM connectors.
    
*   **Expanded DEX & Provider Compatibility** [#569](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/569)
     Added GeckoTerminal DEX mappings for Uniswap V3 on major EVM networks, upgraded Meteora SDK, improved PancakeSwap-Sol parser resilience, migrated Jupiter to its new API, and unified all external service keys (Helius, Infura, CoinGecko, Etherscan) under a shared config model.
    

### 🔐 Hyperliquid API Key Authentication Now Supported[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#hyperliquid-api-key-authentication-now-supported "Permanent link")

Hummingbot now supports **API key–based authentication** for both the **Hyperliquid Spot** and **Hyperliquid Perpetual** connectors, offering a more flexible alternative to the existing Arbitrum wallet + private key setup.

With this enhancement, traders can generate API key/secret credentials directly from the **Hyperliquid web interface** and use them to place orders, manage positions, and run automated strategies through Hummingbot.

**Highlights**

*   **Dual Authentication Modes:** Choose between API key authentication or Arbitrum wallet signing, depending on your workflow and security preferences.
*   **Spot + Perpetual Coverage:** Unified API key support across both `hyperliquid` (spot) and `hyperliquid_perpetual` (perp) connectors.
*   **Simplified Setup:** Configure your API credentials directly in Hummingbot without needing an on-chain private key.

This update streamlines the onboarding experience for Hyperliquid users and enhances compatibility with a broader range of trading setups.

📚 Documentation: [Hyperliquid Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/)

**Special thanks to [gtwototoo](https://github.com/gtwototoo)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

### Other Updates[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.11.0/#other-updates "Permanent link")

**hummingbot/hummingbot**

*   **[#7829](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7829)
    ** - Added XEMM strategy improvements
*   **[#7837](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7837)
    ** - Added API-keys support for `Hyperliquid` Spot/Perpetual
*   **[#7849](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7849)
    ** - Removed `Binance-US` connector
*   **[#7851](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7851)
    ** - Upgraded `Injective` sdk to latest v1.12 version
*   **[#7854](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7854)
    ** - Fixed `Gateway` docker connection issue
*   **[#7858](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7858)
    ** - Updated `Derive` connector to latest version
*   **[#7872](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7872)
    ** - Updated `Gateway` config updates to allow decimal values
*   **[#7877](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7877)
    ** - Changed Gateway query price to SELL side to avoid errors of quote not found for exact amount error

**hummingbot/gateway**

*   **[#540](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/540)
    ** - Improved slippage handling, added CLMM price limits, standardized tx execution, and began unifying pool/pair derivation for EVM/Uniswap-like connectors. **Thanks to [vic-en](https://github.com/vic-en)
     for this contribution! 🙏**
*   **[#552](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/552)
    ** - Fixed Polygon approval gas error issue reported in [#545](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/545)
     **Thanks to [gglucass](https://github.com/gglucass)
     for this fix! 🙏**
*   **[#565](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/565)
    ** - Added missing Solana instance for wrapping WSOL on `Orca` routes

Was this page helpful?

.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://dexalot.com](https://dexalot.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/dexalot/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/dexalot/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/dexalot](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/dexalot)

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tip

See the [Dexalot Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/using-dexalot-with-hummingbot/)
 for step-by-step instructions.

Create a wallet on one of the supported networks below:

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `avalanche` | `dexalot` |

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect dexalot` in order to connect your wallet:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your Dexalot private key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your Dexalot wallet address >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to Dexalot!`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `dexalot`
*   **Connection Type**: Websocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.dexalot.com/en/apiv2/](https://docs.dexalot.com/en/apiv2/)
    
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/dexalot](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/dexalot)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dexalot/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode:

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect dexalot_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available spot strategies / scripts.

Bitrue
======

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#perp-connector) | Not available |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#spot-candles-feed) | Not available |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#perp-candles-feed) | Not available |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.bitrue.com/](https://www.bitrue.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitrue/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitrue/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitrue](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitrue)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitrue.com/api-docs#change-log-2023-06-14](https://www.bitrue.com/api-docs#change-log-2023-06-14)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://support.bitrue.com/hc/en-001/articles/360045151354-Trading-Fees-on-Bitrue](https://support.bitrue.com/hc/en-001/articles/360045151354-Trading-Fees-on-Bitrue)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Available to customers worldwide, except for countries with service restrictions such as Iran, North Korea Sanctions, Ukraine,. Russia, Cuba, Syria etc.

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Login to your Bitrue account on your computer.
    
*   Hover on your profile icon and click API from the dropdown menu
    
*   Click Get API key and Create a API name ( ex. Hummingbot\_Bitrue), click Create API key button
    
*   Pass the authentication part and click Confirm
    
*   Go to your email Inbox and verify New API Creation by following the link in the email
    
*   Write somewhere your API key and Secret and give Not Limited to any IP access restriction and click Save Settings
    
*   Copy/paste your API Key and API Secret
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bitrue`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your bitrue API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your bitrue secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bitrue`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitrue`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitrue](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitrue)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitrue/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect bitrue_paper_trade` instead of `connect bitrue`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/coinbase/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Not available

# Injective Helix - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#connector-info)

Injective Helix
===============

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#connector-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (**DEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#spot-connector) | ✅   | Supports testnet |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#perp-connector) | ✅   | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#spot-candles-feed) | Not available |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#perp-candles-feed) | Not available |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://helixapp.com](https://helixapp.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/injective](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/injective)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/injective](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/injective)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://api.injective.exchange](https://api.injective.exchange/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.injective.network/learn/basic-concepts/gas\_and\_fees/](https://docs.injective.network/learn/basic-concepts/gas_and_fees/)
    
*   **Supported Countries**:

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Create a wallet on one of the supported networks below:

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `injective` | `mainnet`, `testnet`, `custom` |

The connector supports two different account modes: - Trading with delegate accounts - Trading through off-chain vault contracts

There is a third account type called `read_only_account`. This mode only allows to request public information from the nodes, but since it does not require credentials it does not allow to perform trading operations.

### Delegate account mode[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#delegate-account-mode "Permanent link")

When configuring the connector with this mode, the account used to send the transactions to the chain for trading is not the account holding the funds. The user will need to have one portfolio account and at least one trading account. And permissions should be granted with the portfolio account to the trading account for it to operate using the portfolio account's funds.

#### Trading permissions grant[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#trading-permissions-grant "Permanent link")

To grant permissions from a portfolio account to a trading account to operate using the portfolio account funds please refer to the script [account\_delegation\_script.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/injective_v2/account_delegation_script.py)

#### Mode parameters[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#mode-parameters "Permanent link")

When configuring a new instance of the connector in Hummingbot the following parameters are required:

*   **private\_key**: the private key of the trading account (grantee account)
*   **subaccount\_index**: the index (decimal number) of the subaccount from the trading account that the connector will be operating with
*   **granter\_address**: the public key (injective format address) of the portfolio account
*   **granter\_subaccount\_index**: the index (decimal number) of the subaccount from the portfolio account (the subaccount holding the funds)

### Off-chain vault mode[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#off-chain-vault-mode "Permanent link")

When configuring the connector with this mode, all the operations are sent to be executed by a vault contract in the chain. The user will need to have a vault contract deployed on chain, and use the vault's admin account to configure this mode's parameters. To know more about vaults please read the official [Mito managed vaults documentation](https://docs.mito.fi/vaults/managed-vaults)

#### Mode parameters[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#mode-parameters_1 "Permanent link")

When configuring a new instance of the connector in Hummingbot the following parameters are required:

*   **private\_key**: the vault's admin account private key
*   **subaccount\_index**: the index (decimal number) of the subaccount from the vault's admin account
*   **vault\_contract\_address**: the address in the chain for the vault contract

### Gas Fee Calculator Mode[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#gas-fee-calculator-mode "Permanent link")

Injective connectors support two different modes to calculate the gas fee when broadcasting transactions:

*   Gas calculation using transaction simulation (default option)
*   Gas estimation based on the transaction messages (without simulation)

The gas estimation without simulation is more efficient because it does not require requesting the node to run the simulation (an action that could take around 200 milliseconds when using public nodes). But the gas estimation is not as accurate as the gas cost determined by the simulation. Using the gas estimation mode could result in spending a little bit more INJ on gas fee compared to the gas amount spent when using the fee calculator using simulation.

The gas estimation with transaction simulation uses a multiplier to estimate the gas fee. The default multiplier is 1.3, but users can change this value with the global variable `GAS_LIMIT_ADJUSTMENT_MULTIPLIER` in the constants module (hummingbot/connector/exchange/injective\_v2/injective\_constants.py).

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `injective_v2`
*   **Connection Type**: gRPC
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/injective\_v2](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/injective_v2)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to derivative markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `injective_v2_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: gRPC
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/injective\_v2\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/injective_v2_perpetual)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/injective/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way

# 2.10.0 - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#hummingbot-v2100-release-notes)

Hummingbot v2.10.0 Release Notes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#hummingbot-v2100-release-notes "Permanent link")

==================================================================================================================================

_Released on November 03, 2025_

| Repository | Description | GitHub Release | DockerHub Release |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Hummingbot](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot) | Core Client | [`v2.10.0 changelog`](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/releases/tag/v2.10.0) | [`version-2.10.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/hummingbot/tags?name=version-2.10.0) |
| [Gateway](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway) | DEX Middleware | [`v2.10.0 changelog`](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/releases/tag/v2.10.0) | [`version-2.10.0`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/gateway/tags?name=version-2.10.0) |

Note

Other Hummingbot repositories such as [Hummingbot-API](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api)
, [Hummingbot MCP](https://github.com/hummingbot/mcp)
, and [Quants-Lab](https://github.com/hummingbot/quant-lab)
 follow a continuous deployment model without fixed version releases. Use the `main` branch for these repositories.

How to Install and Update[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#how-to-install-and-update "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Docker - Hummingbot API (Recommended)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#docker-hummingbot-api-recommended "Permanent link")

To install or update, run the [Hummingbot API](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api)
 setup script:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-0-1) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api.git [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-0-2) cd hummingbot-api [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-0-3) chmod +x setup.sh [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-0-4) ./setup.sh`

Deploy repo deprecated

The [Deploy](https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy)
 repository is being deprecated in favor of the Hummingbot API installation process above, which helps you set up MCP, Dashboard, and other ways to interact with the API.

### Connect Your AI Assistant[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#connect-your-ai-assistant "Permanent link")

See [MCP - Installation](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/installation/)
 for instructions on connecting Claude Code, Google Gemini, ChatGPT, and other AI assistants. Watch this livestream below for a walkthrough.

### Docker - Hummingbot Client[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#docker-hummingbot-client "Permanent link")

For running individual Hummingbot client containers without the API infrastructure:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-1-1) # Hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-1-2) docker compose down [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-1-3) docker pull hummingbot/hummingbot:latest [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-1-4) docker compose up -d`

### Installation from Source[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#installation-from-source "Permanent link")

Update the branches of each repo to this release by running:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-1) # Hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-2) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot.git [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-3) cd hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-4) git pull origin master [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-5)[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-6) # Gateway [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-7) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot.git [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-8) cd gateway [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#__codelineno-2-9) git pull origin main`

Afterwards, follow the instructions to re-install dependencies and compile the codebase for each repository. See [Install Hummingbot from Source](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-client/)
 and [Install Gateway from Source](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/)
.

Release Highlights[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#release-highlights "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🔗 Gateway × Hummingbot API Integration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#gateway-hummingbot-api-integration "Permanent link")

In [#89](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api/pull/89)
, we integrated **Gateway** directly with the **Hummingbot API**, creating a unified control plane for both centralized and decentralized exchange operations.

**Key Features**

*   **Lifecycle Management:** Start and stop Gateway instances via API and MCP
*   **Blockchain Queries:** Retrieve on-chain balances and wallet data through standardized endpoints
*   **DEX Swaps:** Execute swaps on supported decentralized exchanges through the API
*   **Unified Interface:** Control both CEX and DEX trading layers through a single REST and MCP interface

This integration bridges the Python-based Hummingbot API and TypeScript-based Gateway middleware, providing a seamless workflow for AI-assisted trading automation and portfolio management across all supported blockchains and exchanges.

### ✨ Enhanced MCP Capabilities[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#enhanced-mcp-capabilities "Permanent link")

We've significantly upgraded the **Hummingbot MCP** server to support **multi-server management** and **Gateway integration**, making AI-driven orchestration more powerful and flexible.

**Multi-Server Support**

*   **Simplified Setup:** Removed the mandatory `HUMMINGBOT_API_URL` requirement — start the MCP server without predefining a single API instance
*   **Multi-Server Management:** Add, switch, and manage multiple Hummingbot API instances (local or remote) from a single interface
*   **Persistent Storage:** Server configurations and credentials are now stored in a dedicated volume for long-term persistence across sessions

**Gateway Integration via MCP**

*   **Unified Control:** Manage both Hummingbot API and Gateway instances through the same MCP interface
*   **Cross-Chain Operations:** Execute CEX and DEX operations seamlessly through natural language commands
*   **AI-Driven Workflow:** Enable Claude and other AI assistants to orchestrate complex multi-chain trading strategies

This enhancement enables traders to manage multiple Hummingbot deployments from a single AI interface, coordinate strategies across CEX and DEX venues, and monitor multiple bot instances without reconfiguring the MCP client. The flexible architecture supports both local testing and remote production servers, streamlining workflows for traders running complex, multi-instance operations.

📚 Documentation: [Hummingbot MCP](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/)

### 🔄 Bitget Connector Updates (Spot + Perpetual)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#bitget-connector-updates-spot-perpetual "Permanent link")

We've introduced a **new Bitget Spot connector** and refactored the **Perpetual connector** to align with Bitget's latest API specifications, strengthening our partnership with [Bitget](https://www.bitget.com/blog/articles/bitget-expands-partnership-hummingbot)
.

This connector was developed through our [connector bounties program](https://hummingbot.org/bounties/)
, which enables exchanges to integrate with Hummingbot through a transparent, community-driven process. The bounty was funded by Bitget and executed by talented developers from our community.

**Highlights**

*   **New Spot Connector:** Full integration for Bitget Spot trading.
    
*   **Perpetual Refactor:** Migrated to the newest API endpoints for improved reliability.
    
*   **Candles Feed Support:** Added candle feeds for both Spot and Perpetual markets ([#7794](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7794)
    ).
    
*   **Broker Code Integration:** Enabled broker code functionality ([#7822](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7822)
    ).
    

These updates provide better performance, stability, and feature parity with Bitget’s production systems.

**Special thanks to [gtwototoo](https://github.com/gtwototoo)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

📚 Documentation: [Bitget Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/)

### 🥞 PancakeSwap Solana CLMM Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#pancakeswap-solana-clmm-connector "Permanent link")

We've added complete support for **PancakeSwap on Solana**, bringing concentrated liquidity market making to Solana's fastest-growing DEX.

**Key Features**

*   **Full CLMM Support:** Open/close positions, add/remove liquidity, and collect fees on PancakeSwap V3 pools
*   **WSOL Wrapping:** Automatic SOL ↔ WSOL conversion for seamless trading
*   **Token-2022 Compatible:** Full support for Solana's new token standard and NFT position tracking
*   **Native Solana Integration:** Built on Solana's high-performance blockchain infrastructure

PancakeSwap Solana leverages the same concentrated liquidity mechanics as PancakeSwap V3 on EVM chains, now optimized for Solana's speed and low transaction costs. This integration enables sophisticated market making strategies on Solana's most liquid trading pairs.

🔗 Trade on [PancakeSwap Solana](https://solana.pancakeswap.finance/)

📚 Documentation: [PancakeSwap Gateway Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/)

### 🛠️ Gateway Infrastructure Improvements[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#gateway-infrastructure-improvements "Permanent link")

We’ve rolled out additional upgrades to the recently refactored [Gateway](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/)
 DEX middleware, spanning RPC handling, pool storage, and connector support across multiple networks.

**Highlights**

*   **RPC Provider System:** Introduced flexible provider abstraction with integrations for **Helius (Solana)** and **Infura (EVM networks)**, offering regional endpoints, Jito support, and dynamic command updates via `gateway config <provider> update`.
    
*   **Enhanced Pool Storage:** Migrated pool data structures to include canonical on-chain token addresses and fees, improving validation and data accuracy across 50 + pools (Raydium, Meteora, Uniswap, PancakeSwap).
    
*   **EIP-1559 Gas Controls:** Introduced configuration for `maxFeePerGas`, `maxPriorityFeePerGas`, and `baseFeeMultiplier`, enabling both fixed and dynamic gas pricing strategies with Etherscan integration.
    
*   **Client Integration:** Updated Hummingbot commands and schemas to align with the new pool structure (`baseTokenAddress`, `quoteTokenAddress`, `feePct`).
    

Collectively, these changes make Gateway more robust, modular, and transparent — paving the way for cross-chain liquidity management and advanced AMM strategies.

### Other Updates[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.10.0/#other-updates "Permanent link")

**hummingbot/hummingbot**

*   **[#7793](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7793)
    ** - Fixed `Unexpected error while processing event 198` on **Hyperliquid**.
*   **[#7796](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7796)
    ** - Implemented **TA-Lib** as the new technical-analysis library (replacing `pandas-ta`) **Thanks to [lgrawet](https://github.com/lgrawet)
     for this fix! 🙏**
*   **[#7797](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7797)
    ** - Added ping payload to keep **Hyperliquid** candle feeds active **Thanks to [mlguys](https://github.com/mlguys)
     for this fix! 🙏**
*   **[#7813](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7813)
    ** - Added `EUROP` pairs to the `XRPL` connector **Thanks to [mlguys](https://github.com/mlguys)
     for this fix! 🙏**
*   **[#7828](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7828)
    ** - Added a **safety check** for setting leverage on perpetual markets

**hummingbot/hummingbot-api**

*   **[#86](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api/pull/86)
    ** - Updated `pandas-ta` dependency alignment with Hummingbot core. **Thanks to [lgrawet](https://github.com/lgrawet)
     for this fix! 🙏**

**hummingbot/dashboard**

*   **[#266](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard/pull/266)
    ** - UUpdated compatibility with `pandas-ta ≥ 0.4` for consistency **Thanks to [lgrawet](https://github.com/lgrawet)
     for this fix! 🙏**
