# Tools Reference - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#mcp-tools-reference)

MCP Tools Reference[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#mcp-tools-reference "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================

The Hummingbot MCP Server exposes the following tools to AI assistants for automated trading and portfolio management.

Account Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#account-tools "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `get_accounts`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_accounts "Permanent link")

List all connected exchange accounts and their status.

**Returns:** Array of account objects with connection details

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-0-1) AI: "Show me all my connected exchange accounts"`

### `get_account_balance`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_account_balance "Permanent link")

Get balance for a specific exchange account.

**Parameters:** - `account_name` (string): Name of the exchange account

**Returns:** Balance details for the specified account

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-1-1) AI: "What's my balance on Binance?"`

Portfolio Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#portfolio-tools "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `get_portfolio_balances`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_portfolio_balances "Permanent link")

View aggregated portfolio across all connected exchanges.

**Returns:** Consolidated view of all assets across exchanges

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-2-1) AI: "Show me my total portfolio balances"`

### `get_portfolio_performance`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_portfolio_performance "Permanent link")

Analyze portfolio performance metrics including P&L.

**Returns:** Performance metrics, returns, and analysis

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-3-1) AI: "How has my portfolio performed this month?"`

Trading Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#trading-tools "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `place_order`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#place_order "Permanent link")

Execute buy/sell orders on supported exchanges.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string): Target exchange - `trading_pair` (string): Trading pair (e.g., "BTC-USDT") - `side` (string): "buy" or "sell" - `amount` (number): Order amount - `order_type` (string): "market" or "limit" - `price` (number, optional): Price for limit orders

**Returns:** Order confirmation with order ID

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-4-1) AI: "Buy 0.1 BTC at market price on Binance"`

### `cancel_order`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#cancel_order "Permanent link")

Cancel existing orders.

**Parameters:** - `order_id` (string): ID of order to cancel - `exchange` (string): Exchange where order was placed

**Returns:** Cancellation confirmation

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-5-1) AI: "Cancel order 12345 on OKX"`

### `get_open_orders`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_open_orders "Permanent link")

View all active orders across exchanges.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string, optional): Filter by specific exchange

**Returns:** List of open orders with details

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-6-1) AI: "Show me all my open orders"`

### `get_order_history`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_order_history "Permanent link")

Review past order execution history.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string, optional): Filter by exchange - `trading_pair` (string, optional): Filter by trading pair - `limit` (number, optional): Number of results to return

**Returns:** Historical order data

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-7-1) AI: "Show my last 10 BTC orders"`

Position Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#position-tools "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `get_positions`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_positions "Permanent link")

View open positions for derivatives trading.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string, optional): Filter by exchange

**Returns:** List of open positions with P&L data

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-8-1) AI: "What positions do I have open on Hyperliquid?"`

### `close_position`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#close_position "Permanent link")

Close a specific position programmatically.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string): Exchange where position is held - `symbol` (string): Position symbol - `amount` (number, optional): Partial close amount

**Returns:** Position close confirmation

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-9-1) AI: "Close my ETH position on Hyperliquid"`

### `get_position_history`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_position_history "Permanent link")

Review historical position data and performance.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string, optional): Filter by exchange - `limit` (number, optional): Number of results

**Returns:** Historical position data with P&L

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-10-1) AI: "Show my position history for the last month"`

Market Data Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#market-data-tools "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `get_ticker`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_ticker "Permanent link")

Get current price data for trading pairs.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string): Target exchange - `symbol` (string): Trading pair symbol

**Returns:** Current price, volume, and 24h statistics

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-11-1) AI: "What's the current BTC price on Binance?"`

### `get_orderbook`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_orderbook "Permanent link")

Access order book depth data.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string): Target exchange - `symbol` (string): Trading pair symbol - `depth` (number, optional): Order book depth level

**Returns:** Current bid/ask orders with quantities

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-12-1) AI: "Show me the BTC orderbook on OKX"`

### `get_funding_rates`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#get_funding_rates "Permanent link")

Monitor perpetual funding rates across exchanges.

**Parameters:** - `exchange` (string, optional): Filter by exchange - `symbol` (string, optional): Filter by symbol

**Returns:** Current funding rates and next funding time

**Example Usage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-13-1) AI: "What are the funding rates for BTC perpetuals?"`

Tool Usage Examples[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#tool-usage-examples "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Complex Workflows[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#complex-workflows "Permanent link")

**Portfolio Rebalancing:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-14-1) AI: "Analyze my portfolio and rebalance to 60% BTC, 30% ETH, 10% SOL" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-14-2) 1. Uses get_portfolio_balances to assess current allocation [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-14-3) 2. Calculates required trades using market data tools [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-14-4) 3. Executes rebalancing orders with place_order [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-14-5) 4. Confirms new allocation with updated portfolio data`

**Risk Management:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-15-1) AI: "Close any positions with more than 10% unrealized loss" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-15-2) 1. Uses get_positions to analyze all open positions [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-15-3) 2. Identifies positions exceeding loss threshold [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-15-4) 3. Uses close_position for each position meeting criteria [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-15-5) 4. Reports actions taken and updated risk exposure`

**Funding Rate Arbitrage:**

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-16-1) AI: "Find negative funding rate opportunities for BTC" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-16-2) 1. Uses get_funding_rates across multiple exchanges [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-16-3) 2. Identifies profitable funding rate spreads [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-16-4) 3. Opens positions to capture funding payments [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-16-5) 4. Monitors and manages positions automatically`

Gateway Tools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#gateway-tools "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### `manage_gateway_container`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#manage_gateway_container "Permanent link")

Start, stop, or check Gateway container status.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-1) # Start Gateway [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-2) manage_gateway_container(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-3)     action="start",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-4)     config={        [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-5)         "passphrase": "admin",        [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-6)         "image": "hummingbot/gateway:latest",        [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-7)         "port": 15888    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-8)     } [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-11) # Check status [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-12) manage_gateway_container(action="get_status") [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-14) # View logs [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-15) manage_gateway_container(action="get_logs", tail=100) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-16)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-17) # Restart [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-18) manage_gateway_container(action="restart") [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-20) # Stop [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-17-21) manage_gateway_container(action="stop")`

### `manage_gateway_config`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#manage_gateway_config "Permanent link")

Manage chains, networks, tokens, connectors, pools, and wallets.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-1) # List supported chains [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-2) manage_gateway_config(resource_type="chains", action="list") [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-4) # List networks [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-5) manage_gateway_config(resource_type="networks", action="list") [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-7) # Get specific network [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-8) manage_gateway_config(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-9)     resource_type="networks",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-10)     action="get",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-11)     network_id="solana-mainnet-beta" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-12) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-14) # List tokens on network [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-15) manage_gateway_config(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-16)     resource_type="tokens",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-17)     action="list",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-18)     network_id="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-19)     search="USDC"  # Optional search filter [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-20) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-21)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-22) # Add token [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-23) manage_gateway_config(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-24)     resource_type="tokens",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-25)     action="add",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-26)     network_id="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-27)     token_address="EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-28)     token_symbol="USDC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-29)     token_decimals=6,    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-30)     token_name="USD Coin" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-31) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-32)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-33) # Add wallet [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-34) manage_gateway_config(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-35)     resource_type="wallets",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-36)     action="add",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-37)     chain="solana",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-38)     private_key="your_private_key" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-39) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-40)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-41) # List DEX connectors [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-42) manage_gateway_config(resource_type="connectors", action="list") [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-43)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-44) # List pools [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-45) manage_gateway_config(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-46)     resource_type="pools",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-47)     action="list",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-48)     connector_name="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-49)     network="mainnet-beta" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-18-50) )`

### `manage_gateway_swaps`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#manage_gateway_swaps "Permanent link")

Quote and execute swaps on DEX routers like [Jupiter](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/)
.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-1) # Get quote [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-2) manage_gateway_swaps(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-3)     action="quote",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-4)     connector="jupiter",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-5)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-6)     trading_pair="SOL-USDC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-7)     side="BUY",  # or "SELL"    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-8)     amount="1.0",  # Amount of base token    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-9)     slippage_pct="1.0" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-10) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-12) # Execute swap [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-13) manage_gateway_swaps(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-14)     action="execute",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-15)     connector="jupiter",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-16)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-17)     trading_pair="SOL-USDC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-18)     side="BUY",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-19)     amount="1.0",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-20)     slippage_pct="1.0",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-21)     wallet_address="your_wallet_address"  # Optional [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-22) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-23)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-24) # Search swap history [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-25) manage_gateway_swaps(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-26)     action="search",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-27)     search_connector="jupiter",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-28)     search_network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-29)     status="CONFIRMED",  # SUBMITTED, CONFIRMED, FAILED    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-30)     limit=50 [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-31) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-32)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-33) # Check transaction status [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-34) manage_gateway_swaps(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-35)     action="get_status",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-36)     transaction_hash="your_tx_hash" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-19-37) )`

### `explore_gateway_clmm_pools`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#explore_gateway_clmm_pools "Permanent link")

Browse concentrated liquidity pools.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-1) # List pools [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-2) explore_gateway_clmm_pools(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-3)     action="list_pools",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-4)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-5)     page=0,    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-6)     limit=50,    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-7)     search_term="SOL",  # Optional filter    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-8)     sort_key="volume",  # volume, tvl, feetvlratio    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-9)     order_by="desc",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-10)     include_unknown=True,    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-11)     detailed=False  # Set True for more columns [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-12) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-14) # Get specific pool info [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-15) explore_gateway_clmm_pools(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-16)     action="get_pool_info",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-17)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-18)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-19)     pool_address="pool_address_here" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-20-20) )`

### `manage_gateway_clmm_positions`[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#manage_gateway_clmm_positions "Permanent link")

Open, close, collect fees from concentrated liquidity positions.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-1) # Open position [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-2) manage_gateway_clmm_positions(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-3)     action="open_position",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-4)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-5)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-6)     pool_address="pool_address",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-7)     lower_price="150",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-8)     upper_price="250",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-9)     base_token_amount="1.0",  # Optional    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-10)     quote_token_amount="200",  # Optional    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-11)     slippage_pct="1.0",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-12)     wallet_address="your_wallet",  # Optional    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-13)     extra_params={"strategyType": 0}  # Connector-specific [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-14) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-15)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-16) # Get positions for wallet/pool [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-17) manage_gateway_clmm_positions(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-18)     action="get_positions",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-19)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-20)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-21)     pool_address="pool_address",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-22)     wallet_address="your_wallet" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-23) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-24)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-25) # Collect fees [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-26) manage_gateway_clmm_positions(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-27)     action="collect_fees",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-28)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-29)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-30)     position_address="position_nft_address",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-31)     wallet_address="your_wallet" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-32) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-33)[](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-34) # Close position [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-35) manage_gateway_clmm_positions(     [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-36)     action="close_position",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-37)     connector="meteora",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-38)     network="solana-mainnet-beta",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-39)     position_address="position_nft_address",    [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-40)     wallet_address="your_wallet" [](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#__codelineno-21-41) )`

* * *

Tool Response Formats[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#tool-response-formats "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All tools return structured JSON responses that AI assistants can parse and present to users in natural language. The MCP server handles the technical API interactions while the AI provides user-friendly explanations and recommendations.

Error Handling[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#error-handling "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tools include comprehensive error handling for: - Invalid parameters - Exchange connectivity issues  
\- Insufficient balance errors - Rate limiting - Authentication failures

Error responses include descriptive messages that AI assistants can interpret and explain to users in plain language.

Security Notes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/mcp/tools/#security-notes "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   All trading operations require proper authentication
*   Position sizes and risk limits should be configured appropriately
*   Monitor AI trading activity regularly
*   Set up alerts for unusual trading behavior
*   Never share API credentials in conversations

.

# Bybit - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#connector-info)

Bybit
=====

Support Hummingbot

Hummingbot Foundation has a fee share partnership with Bybit. When you use our software to trade on Bybit, a custom API header tells Bybit that the trade was executed using Hummingbot, so they share a portion of your fees with us, at no cost to you. To support us, just enter your API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your support! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#connector-info "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#spot-candles-feed) | Not available |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#perp-candles-feed) | Not available |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.bybit.com](https://www.bybit.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bybit/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bybit/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bybit](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bybit)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://bybit-exchange.github.io/docs/v5/intro](https://bybit-exchange.github.io/docs/v5/intro)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://learn.bybit.com/en/bybit-guide/bybit-trading-fees/](https://learn.bybit.com/en/bybit-guide/bybit-trading-fees/)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Available to customers worldwide, except for countries with service restrictions such as the U.S, Singapore, Cuba, Crimea, Sevastopol, Iran, Syria, North Korea, Sudan, Mainland China.

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Log in to your Bybit account or Sign Up for a Bybit account.
    
*   Click on your account icon at the top right corner of the screen, and select API from the drop-down menu.
    
*   Navigate to the API Management tab and click on Create New Key.
    
*   Select System-generated API Keys.
    
*   Select API Transaction, and name the API key.
    
*   Set the permissions for the API key (e.g., account information, order placement, position information) and click on Submit
    
*   Copy the API key and secret, and save them somewhere safe.
    
*   Log in to the third-party application and link the saved API.
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bybit`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your bybit API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your bybit secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bybit`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bybit`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bybit](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bybit)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect bybit_paper_trade` instead of `connect bybit`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bybit_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/bybit\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/bybit_perpetual)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/#paper-trading_1 "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: [https://testnet.bybit.com/en-US/trade/spot/BTC/USDT](https://testnet.bybit.com/en-US/trade/spot/BTC/USDT)

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect bybit_perpetual_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available perpetual strategies / scripts.

.

# Bitstamp - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#connector-info)

Bitstamp
========

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#perp-connector) | Not available |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.bitstamp.net/](https://www.bitstamp.net/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitstamp/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitstamp/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitstamp](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitstamp)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitstamp.net/api/](https://www.bitstamp.net/api/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.bitstamp.net/fee-schedule/](https://www.bitstamp.net/fee-schedule/)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Not available

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Login
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/bitstamp-api1.png)
    
*   Click the profile icon and click on `Settings` in the menu.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/bitstamp-api2.png)
    
*   Click API access and press and press `New API key`.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/bitstamp-api3.png)
    
*   Create your API Key, optionally press `Advanced settings` to configure an IP Address filter or associate the API Key with a sub-account.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/bitstamp-api4.png)
    
*   Create Successfully. The Secret Key will only be displayed once. Please copy and save.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/bitstamp-api5.png)
    
*   Click `Activate API key` button to exit. Now you can use your new API.
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bitstamp`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your bitstamp API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your bitstamp secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bitstamp`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitstamp`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitstamp](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitstamp)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect bitstamp_paper_trade` instead of `connect bitstamp`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

Thanks for your feedback! Help us improve this page by [filing an issue](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-site/issues/new?title=[Feedback]+Bitstamp+-+/exchanges/bitstamp/)
.

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  Log into your NDAX account and click the user icon
2.  Select API from the dropdown menu
3.  Choose the account you want to create API Keys for
4.  Click Create API Keys

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect ndax`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your ndax user ID (uid) >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter the name of the account you want to use >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your ndax API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your ndax secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to ndax.`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `ndax`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/ndax](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/ndax)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ndax/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect ndax_paper_trade` instead of `connect ndax`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information. \`\`\`

# 🔥 dYdX - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#connector-info)

🔥 dYdX
=======

Foundation Sponsor

dYdX is a [sponsor](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on dYdX, you're supporting the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software.

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#connector-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (**DEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#spot-connector) | Not available |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#perp-connector) | ✅   | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#spot-candles-feed) | Not available |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#perp-candles-feed) | Not available |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://dydx.trade](https://dydx.trade/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/dydx-v4/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/dydx-v4/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/dydx-chain](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/dydx-chain)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.dydx.exchange/api\_integration-repositories](https://docs.dydx.exchange/api_integration-repositories)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.dydx.exchange/introduction-trading\_fees](https://docs.dydx.exchange/introduction-trading_fees)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://dydx.trade/terms](https://dydx.trade/terms)
    

⚙️ Install Instructions[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#install-instructions "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

At the moment there are some issues with dependencies and installing dydx can be a bit trickier due to some software conflicts. We've created these simple instructions to get you up and running quickly using either Docker or Source.

### Docker[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#docker "Permanent link")

Open your `docker-compose.yml` file. This file is usually located in your Hummingbot project directory.

Update the `image` line. Find the line that starts with `image:` under the `hummingbot` service. Change it to the following, depending on whether you are trying to run the `latest` or `development` branch.

For latest stable version:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-0-1) image: hummingbot/hummingbot:latest_dydx`

For development version:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-1-1) image: hummingbot/hummingbot:development_dydx`

### Source[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#source "Permanent link")

After cloning the Hummingbot repo, use the `--dydx` flag when running the `install` command

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-2-1) ./install --dydx`

See below for the full commands:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-3-1) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot.git [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-3-2) cd hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-3-3) ./install --dydx [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-3-4) conda activate hummingbot [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-3-5) ./compile`

🔑 How to Connect to dYdX (v4)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#how-to-connect-to-dydx-v4 "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  **Connect Your Wallet**:
2.  Open the dYdX exchange platform and connect your wallet (e.g., MetaMask or another supported wallet). This will allow you to interact with the exchange and manage your funds.
    
3.  **Deposit USDC**:
    
4.  Once your wallet is connected, deposit USDC into your dYdX account. USDC is required for trading on the platform.
    
5.  **Access Your Wallet Connection**:
    
6.  In the top right corner of the dYdX interface, locate and click on your wallet icon or address. This will open the wallet connection settings.
    
7.  **Copy Your dYdX Chain Address**:
    
8.  At the top of the wallet connection settings window, you’ll find your **dYdX Chain Address**. Copy this address and keep it secure for future reference.
    
9.  **Export Your Secret Phrase**:
    
10.  Scroll down within the wallet connection settings to find the option that says **Export your secret phrase**. Click on it to reveal and securely save your **dYdX v4 Secret Phrase**. This phrase is essential for account recovery and authentication.

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

You will need the following to connect Hummingbot to `dydx_v4_perpetual`:

*   dYdX v4 secret\_passphrase (24 words)
*   dYdX v4 chain address (starts with dydx)

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect dydx_v4_perpetual` in Hummingbot in order to connect your wallet:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-4-1) Enter your dydx v4 secret_phrase(24 words) >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#__codelineno-4-2) Enter your dydx_v4 chain address (starts with dydx)>>>`

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `dydx_v4_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/dydx\_v4\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/dydx_v4_perpetual)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

This exchange offers a staging (testnet) mode: [https://v4.testnet.dydx.exchange/](https://v4.testnet.dydx.exchange/)

While users can trade on testnet using the link above, it is not currently supported in Hummingbot.

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# BingX - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#connector-info)

BingX
=====

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (CLOB)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` and `LIMIT` order types |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://bingx.com/](https://bingx.com/invite/7VFN4OVG)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bingx](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bingx)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://bingx-api.github.io/docs/#/en-us/common/introduce](https://bingx-api.github.io/docs/#/en-us/common/introduce)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://bingx.com/support/costs/](https://bingx.com/support/costs/)
    
*   **Unsupported Countries**:
*   BingX does not accept certain customers. To maintain our strong reputation in the market and ensure a robust compliant marketplace, we have decided to not seek nor accept customers from certain jurisdictions, such as Canada, Mainland China, Hong Kong SAR, Macau SAR, Netherlands, Singapore, United States (including all US territories), United Kingdom, any country that is designated as a restricted country under BingX's AML/CTF policy and any other jurisdictions where the provision of the services is prohibited or will subject us to regulatory penalty ("Restricted Jurisdictions").

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  Go to [BingX Exchange](https://bingx.com/invite/7VFN4OVG)
     and log in or create a new account.
    
2.  When creating your account you can use our Referral Code (`7VFN4OVG`) to enjoy 20% rebate.
    

![Referral Code](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/bingx-api5.png)

1.  Complete your KYC if you haven't already and then open the API Key page by clicking over the profile icon in the top right corner and go to the API Management page at https://bingx.com/account/api/.
    
2.  Click on the **_Create API_** button
    

![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/bingx-api1.png)

1.  Write a label for your API Keys and then select the permission options that you want (enabling the withdrawal permission requires linking IP addresses on the box below) and click **_Confirm_**

![API Permission](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/bingx-api2.png)

1.  Enter your corresponding verification codes.

![Security Verification](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/bingx-api3.png)

1.  Copy your API keys and store them somewhere safe.

![Get API Key](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/bingx-api4.png)

1.  Now, you have created API keys for your BingX Exchange!

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bing_x`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect bing_x [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your BingX Exchange API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your BingX Exchange secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bing_x`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bing_x`
*   **Connection Type**: REST / WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bing\_x](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bing_x)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bing_x/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

# 2.0.1 - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#hummingbot-v201-release-notes)

Hummingbot v2.0.1 Release Notes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#hummingbot-v201-release-notes "Permanent link")

===============================================================================================================================

_Released on August 28, 2024_

Introduction[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#introduction "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hummingbot 2.0.1 continues to refine and expand the new graphical trading experience introduced in Hummingbot version 2.0.0, bringing several key updates and new features. This release includes an upgraded dYdX connector that supports the latest v4 chain, as a result of a grant from dYdX. Other new connectors in this release include Bitstamp, Hashkey and Telos. This release contains numerous other updates, including bug fixes and enhancements across the Hummingbot, Gateway, Dashboard, and Backend-API repositories, ensure a more robust and efficient trading experience.

| Repository | Description | GitHub Release | DockerHub Release |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Hummingbot](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot) | Core Client | [`v2.0.1`](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/releases/tag/v2.0.1) | [`version-2.0.1`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/hummingbot/tags?name=version-2.0.1) |
| [Dashboard](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard) | Hummingbot Frontend | [`v2.0.1`](https://github.com/hummingbot/dashboard/releases/tag/v2.0.1) | [`version-2.0.1`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/dashboard/tags?name=version-2.0.1) |
| [Backend-API](https://github.com/hummingbot/backend-api) | Hummingbot Backend | [`v2.0.1`](https://github.com/hummingbot/backend-api/releases/tag/v2.0.1) | [`version-2.0.1`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/backend-api/tags?name=version-2.0.1) |
| [Gateway](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway) | DEX Middleware | [`v2.0.1`](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/releases/tag/v2.0.1) | [`version-2.0.1`](https://hub.docker.com/r/hummingbot/gateway/tags?name=version-2.0.1) |
| [Deploy](https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy) | Deployment Repo |     |     |

How to Update[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#how-to-update "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Docker[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#docker "Permanent link")

Re-run the [Deploy](https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy)
 setup script:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-0-1) git clone https://github.com/hummingbot/deploy.git [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-0-2) cd deploy [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-0-3) bash setup.sh`

For individual images, exit running containers, pull the latest images, and restart:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-1-1) docker compose down [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-1-2) docker pull hummingbot/hummingbot:latest [](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-1-3) docker compose up -d`

### Source[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#source "Permanent link")

Update the branches of each repo to this release by running:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#__codelineno-2-1) git pull origin master`

Hummingbot 2.0.1 Highlights[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#hummingbot-201-highlights "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### dYdX Updated Installation Instructions[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#dydx-updated-installation-instructions "Permanent link")

The new **dYdX** API connector has been upgraded to v4 in this release, enabling users to run bots on one of the leading decentralized perpetual DEXs! Due to dependency conflicts, we have created a custom Docker image and custom scripts to help users install Hummingbot with dYdX. The complete install instructions can be found in the [dYdX connector docs](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/dydx/)
, and see the blog post announcing the new dYdX sponsorship [here](https://hummingbot.org/blog/announcing-the-new-dydx-v4-connector-in-hummingbot/)
!

### Dashboard Authentication[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#dashboard-authentication "Permanent link")

We’ve reintroduced the authentication feature in this release, providing an additional layer of security for users who share their dashboard with others, such as team members or collaborators.

Authentication is disabled by default. However, if you want to enable it, please follow the instructions provided for your specific setup: **[Docker](https://hummingbot.org/blog/hummingbot-dashboard-quickstart-guide/#docker)
** | **[Source](https://hummingbot.org/blog/hummingbot-dashboard-quickstart-guide/#source)
**.

### New Bitstamp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#new-bitstamp-connector "Permanent link")

Bitstamp is one of the oldest cryptocurrency exchanges, established in 2011. It offers a platform for buying, selling, and trading a variety of digital assets, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and other major cryptocurrencies. Known for its robust security measures and regulatory compliance, Bitstamp is popular among both individual and institutional traders.

**Pull Request:** [#7102](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7102)
 - Added [Bitstamp](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitstamp/)
 connector

**Thanks to [Jbekker](https://github.com/Jbekker)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

### New Hashkey Global Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#new-hashkey-global-connector "Permanent link")

Following Coinbase, HashKey Global also obtained a comprehensive exchange license for digital asset investor protection from the Bermuda Monetary Authority, making us a strong player in licensed crypto trading.

**Pull Request:** [#7170](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7170)
 - Added Hashkey Global connector

**Thanks to [dengyh](https://github.com/dengyh)
 for this contribution! 🙏**

### New Telos Chain & Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#new-telos-chain-connector "Permanent link")

TELOS is a blockchain platform known for its high-performance and versatile infrastructure, providing fast transaction speeds, low fees, and robust smart contract capabilities.

**Pull Request:** [#7119](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7119)
 | [#338](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/pull/338)
 - Added **Telos** connector

**Thanks to the Enflux Team for this contribution! 🙏**

### Updated Bybit Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/release-notes/2.0.1/#updated-bybit-spot-connector "Permanent link")

[Bybit](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bybit/)
, a leading cryptocurrency exchange known for its high-performance trading platform, has recently updated its API to version v5. This release updates the Bybit spot connector to the latest v5 API version. While the spot connector now uses v5, the perpetual contract connector is still under development. You can track its progress through this [Pull Request](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/7063)

**Pull Request:** [#6902](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/pull/6902)

**Thanks to [klpanagi](https://github.com/klpanagi)
 for this contribution! 🙏**
