# Configuration - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#configuration-overview)

Configuration
=============

Gateway uses a modular configuration system that allows you to customize various aspects of its operation. This guide explains the configuration structure and how to modify it to suit your needs.

Configuration Overview[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#configuration-overview "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gateway's configuration system consists of YAML files located in the `/conf` directory, along with JSON files for tokens and pools organized by chain and connector.

The initial configuration files are created automatically using the default templates in `/src/templates` when you run the setup script during [installation](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/)
.

### Configuration Structure[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#configuration-structure "Permanent link")

The `/conf/` folder contains the following types of configuration files:

1.  **Root Configuration** (`root.yml`): Defines the list of all configuration files and their schemas
2.  **Server Configuration** (`server.yml`): Controls Gateway server behavior
3.  **Chain Configurations** (e.g., `solana.yml`): Define blockchain network settings
4.  **Connector Configurations** (e.g., `raydium.yml`): Configure DEX-specific settings
5.  **Token Lists** (`/conf/tokens/{chain}/{network}.json`): Token definitions for each network
6.  **Pool Lists** (`/conf/pools/{connector}.json`): Liquidity pool definitions for each DEX connector

### Root Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#root-configuration "Permanent link")

The `root.yml` file serves as the entry point for Gateway's configuration system. It defines which configuration files are loaded and their corresponding schema files.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-1) version: 3 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-2) configurations:   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-3)   $namespace server:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-4)     configurationPath: server.yml    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-5)     schemaPath: server-schema.json [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-7)   $namespace solana:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-8)     configurationPath: solana.yml    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-9)     schemaPath: solana-schema.json [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-10)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-11)   $namespace jupiter:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-12)     configurationPath: jupiter.yml    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-0-13)     schemaPath: jupiter-schema.json`

This file tells Gateway:

*   Which configuration files to load
*   Where to find the schema files that validate each configuration, which are located in the `/src/services/schemas` directory
*   How to namespace each configuration section

### Server Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#server-configuration "Permanent link")

The `server.yml` file controls the core Gateway server behavior, including ports, logging, and security settings.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-1) # GMT Offset in hours (e.g. -8 for Pacific US Time, -5 for Eastern US Time) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-2) GMTOffset: -8 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-4) # Port on which to run the Gateway server [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-5) port: 15888 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-7) # Port on which to run the Swagger documentation UI.  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-8) # Set to 0 to serve docs at http://0.0.0.0:{port}/docs (same port as Gateway server) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-9) # Set to a specific port (e.g. 8080) to serve docs separately at http://0.0.0.0:{docPort} [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-10) docsPort: 0 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-12) # Path to folder where Hummingbot generates self-signed certificates [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-13) certificatePath: ./certs/ [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-14)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-15) # Path to folder where logs will be stored. [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-16) logPath: './logs' [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-17)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-18) # IPs allowed to access gateway. localhost is allowed by default. [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-19) ipWhitelist: [] [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-20)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-21) # If true, logs will be stored in logPath and printed to stdout. If false, they [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-22) # will only be stored in logPath and not printed to stdout. [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-23) logToStdOut: true [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-24)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-25) # If true, the server will print detailed Fastify logs for each request and response to stdout. If false, only standard logs will be emitted. [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-26) fastifyLogs: false [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-27)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-28) # Nonce database [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-29) nonceDbPath: 'nonce.level' [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-30)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-31) # Transaction database [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-1-32) transactionDbPath: 'transaction.level'`

### Chain Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#chain-configuration "Permanent link")

Chain configuration files (e.g., `/conf/chains/solana.yml`) now contain only the default network and wallet settings for each blockchain.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-2-1) defaultNetwork: mainnet-beta [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-2-2) defaultWallet: '<solana-wallet-address>'`

When you connect a wallet using `gateway connect`, it automatically becomes the `defaultWallet` for that chain. The `defaultNetwork` determines which network configuration Gateway uses by default for that chain.

Note

Network-specific configurations are now stored in separate files under `/conf/chains/{chain}/{network}.yml`

### Connector Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#connector-configuration "Permanent link")

Connector configuration files (e.g., `/conf/connectors/jupiter.yml`) define settings specific to each DEX connector, including slippage tolerance, routing preferences, and API configurations.

#### Example: Jupiter Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#example-jupiter-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-1) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (as a decimal, e.g., 1 = 1%) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-2) slippagePct: 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-4) # Priority level for swap transaction processing [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-5) # Options: medium, high, veryHigh [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-6) priorityLevel: 'veryHigh' [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-7)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-8) # Maximum priority fee in lamports (for dynamic priority fees) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-9) # Used when priorityLevel is set and no explicit priorityFeeLamports is provided [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-10) maxLamports: 1000000 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-12) # Restrict routing to only go through 1 market [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-13) # Default: false (allows multi-hop routes for better prices) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-14) onlyDirectRoutes: false [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-15)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-16) # Restrict routing through highly liquid intermediate tokens only [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-17) # Default: true (for better price and stability) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-18) restrictIntermediateTokens: true [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-20) # Jupiter API key (optional) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-21) # For free tier, leave empty (uses https://lite-api.jup.ag) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-22) # For paid plans, generate key at https://portal.jup.ag (uses https://api.jup.ag) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-3-23) apiKey: ''`

**Configuration Options Explained:**

*   **`slippagePct`**: Maximum acceptable price slippage for trades. If the execution price deviates more than this percentage from the quoted price, the transaction will fail.
    
*   **`priorityLevel`**: Controls transaction priority on Solana. Higher priority levels result in faster confirmation but cost more in fees. Set to `veryHigh` for time-sensitive trades.
    
*   **`maxLamports`**: Caps the maximum priority fee to prevent excessive costs during network congestion. 1,000,000 lamports = 0.001 SOL.
    
*   **`onlyDirectRoutes`**: When `true`, restricts swaps to direct pools only (no intermediate tokens). This can reduce price impact but may result in worse pricing or failed routes for less liquid pairs.
    
*   **`restrictIntermediateTokens`**: When `true`, only routes through major tokens (SOL, USDC, USDT) as intermediates. This increases reliability and reduces price impact risks.
    
*   **`apiKey`**: Optional API key for Jupiter's paid tier. The free tier (lite-api) is suitable for most users, while the paid tier offers higher rate limits and additional features.
    

### Network Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#network-configuration "Permanent link")

Network configuration files (e.g., `/conf/chains/solana/mainnet-beta.yml`) contain the detailed settings for each blockchain network, including RPC endpoints and transaction parameters.

#### Example: Solana mainnet-beta Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#example-solana-mainnet-beta-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-1) nodeURL: https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-2) nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-4) # Default compute units for a transaction [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-5) # This sets the compute unit limit for transactions when not specified by the user [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-6) defaultComputeUnits: 200000 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-7)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-8) # Confirmation polling interval in seconds [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-9) # How often to check if a submitted transaction has been confirmed (inner retry loop) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-10) confirmRetryInterval: 0.5 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-12) # Number of confirmation polling attempts [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-13) # How many times to poll for confirmation before considering the transaction unconfirmed [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-14) confirmRetryCount: 10 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-15)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-16) # Floor percentile of recent priority fee samples used to estimate gasPrice for a transaction [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-17) # Use the Nth percentile of recent priority fees as the base fee (90 = 90th percentile) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-18) basePriorityFeePct: 90 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-20) # Minimum priority fee per compute unit in lamports [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-21) # This sets the floor for priority fees to ensure transactions are processed (default: 0.1 lamports/CU) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-4-22) minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1`

You can view the current configuration for any network using Gateway commands:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-1) >>> gateway config solana-mainnet-beta [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-3) Gateway Configuration - namespace: solana-mainnet-beta: [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-4) nodeURL: https://dry-dawn-hill.solana-mainnet.quiknode.pro/41bbd7ad405c552f91cc928e044e5e04c66341d2 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-5) nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-6) defaultComputeUnits: 200000 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-7) confirmRetryInterval: 0.5 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-8) confirmRetryCount: 10 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-9) basePriorityFeePct: 90 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-5-10) minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1`

To update any network setting, use `gateway config [namespace] update`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-1) >>> gateway config solana-mainnet-beta update [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-3) Available configuration paths: nodeURL, nativeCurrencySymbol, defaultComputeUnits, confirmRetryInterval, confirmRetryCount, basePriorityFeePct, minPriorityFeePerCU [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-5) Enter configuration path (or 'exit' to cancel): nodeURL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-6) Current value for 'nodeURL': https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-6-7) Enter new value (or 'exit' to cancel): https://your-preferred-node-provider.com/your-api-key`

Common Configuration Tasks[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#common-configuration-tasks "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Changing Node Providers[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#changing-node-providers "Permanent link")

To change the RPC node provider for a blockchain network, you can either use Gateway commands or edit the configuration files directly.

#### Using Gateway Commands[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#using-gateway-commands "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-1) >>> gateway config solana-mainnet-beta update [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-3) Current configuration for solana-mainnet-beta: [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-4) nodeURL: https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-5) nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-6) defaultComputeUnits: 200000 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-7) confirmRetryInterval: 0.5 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-8) confirmRetryCount: 10 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-9) basePriorityFeePct: 90 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-10) minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-12) Available configuration paths: nodeURL, nativeCurrencySymbol, defaultComputeUnits, confirmRetryInterval, confirmRetryCount, basePriorityFeePct, minPriorityFeePerCU [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-14) Enter configuration path (or 'exit' to cancel): nodeURL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-15) Current value for 'nodeURL': https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-16) Enter new value (or 'exit' to cancel): https://your-preferred-node-provider.com/your-api-key [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-17)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-18) Successfully updated nodeURL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-7-19) Gateway will restart automatically for changes to take effect`

#### Editing Configuration Files[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#editing-configuration-files "Permanent link")

1.  Navigate to the network configuration folder (e.g., `/conf/chains/solana/`)
2.  Open the specific network file (e.g., `mainnet-beta.yml`)
3.  Locate the `nodeURL` field and replace it with your preferred node provider's URL
4.  Save the file and restart Gateway

Example for Solana mainnet (`/conf/chains/solana/mainnet-beta.yml`):

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-1) nodeURL: https://your-preferred-node-provider.com/your-api-key [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-2) nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-4) # Default compute units for a transaction [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-5) # This sets the compute unit limit for transactions when not specified by the user [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-6) defaultComputeUnits: 200000 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-7)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-8) # Confirmation polling interval in seconds [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-9) # How often to check if a submitted transaction has been confirmed (inner retry loop) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-10) confirmRetryInterval: 0.5 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-12) # Number of confirmation polling attempts [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-13) # How many times to poll for confirmation before considering the transaction unconfirmed [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-14) confirmRetryCount: 10 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-15)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-16) # Floor percentile of recent priority fee samples used to estimate gasPrice for a transaction [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-17) # Use the Nth percentile of recent priority fees as the base fee (90 = 90th percentile) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-18) basePriorityFeePct: 90 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-20) # Minimum priority fee per compute unit in lamports [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-21) # This sets the floor for priority fees to ensure transactions are processed (default: 0.1 lamports/CU) [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-8-22) minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1`

Example for Ethereum mainnet (`/conf/chains/ethereum/mainnet.yml`):

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-9-1) chainID: 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-9-2) nodeURL: https://your-preferred-node-provider.com/your-api-key [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-9-3) nativeCurrencySymbol: ETH [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-9-4) minGasPrice: 0.1`

### Adding Tokens[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#adding-tokens "Permanent link")

Tip

The new Gateway endpoints accept addresses for `baseToken` and `quoteToken` in addition to symbols, so you should be able to use addresses directly before adding their symbols into the network's token list.

Gateway uses standardized token lists organized by chain and network. Each network has its own token list file that contains metadata for all supported tokens on that network.

#### Using Gateway Commands[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#using-gateway-commands_1 "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-1) >>  gateway token HERMES update                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-3)   Enter chain (e.g., ethereum, solana): solana                                                                                                                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-4)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-5)   Token 'HERMES' not found. Let's add it to solana (mainnet-beta).                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-7)   Enter token information:                                                                                                                                                            [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-8)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-9)   Symbol [HERMES]:                                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-10)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-11)   Name: HermesWizard                                                                                                                                                                  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-12)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-13)   Contract address: 24R8j15RDq3VoeRaSDFXMvSw4W7RLLZLdpTwK8ynx777                                                                                                                      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-14)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-15)   Decimals [18]: 9                                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-16)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-17)   Token to add/update:  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-18)   {    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-19)     "symbol": "HERMES",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-20)     "name": "HermesWizard",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-21)     "address": "24R8j15RDq3VoeRaSDFXMvSw4W7RLLZLdpTwK8ynx777",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-22)     "decimals": 9  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-23)   }                                                                                                                                                                                   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-24)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-25)   Add/update this token? (Yes/No) >>> Yes                                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-26)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-27)   Adding/updating token...  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-28)   ✓ Token successfully added/updated!                                                                                                                                                 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-29)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-30)   Restarting Gateway for changes to take effect...  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-31)   ✓ Gateway restarted successfully                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-32)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-10-33)   You can now use 'gateway token HERMES' to view the token information.`

#### Editing Token Files[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#editing-token-files "Permanent link")

1.  Navigate to the `/conf/tokens/{chain}/` folder (e.g., `/conf/tokens/solana/`)
2.  Open the appropriate network file (e.g., `mainnet-beta.json` for Solana mainnet)
3.  Add a new token entry to the array following the existing format below
4.  Make sure that the resulting file is still valid JSON!
5.  Save the file and restart Gateway

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-2)   "chainId": 101,  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-3)   "name": "ai16z",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-4)   "symbol": "AI16Z",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-5)   "address": "HeLp6NuQkmYB4pYWo2zYs22mESHXPQYzXbB8n4V98jwC",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-6)   "decimals": 9 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-11-7) }`

The token list structure follows the [Token Lists](https://tokenlists.org/)
 standard, which helps users avoid scams and find legitimate tokens across different networks.

### Adding Pools[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#adding-pools "Permanent link")

Each AMM and CLMM DEX may have different pools for the same trading pair, with varying parameters like fee tier and bin step. Gateway now stores pool definitions in dedicated JSON files for each DEX connector.

#### Using Gateway Commands[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#using-gateway-commands_2 "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-1) >>>  gateway pool raydium/amm LIGHT-SOL update                                                                                                                                      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-3)   === Add Pool for LIGHT-SOL on raydium/amm ===  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-4)   Chain: solana  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-5)   Network: mainnet-beta                                                                                                                                                               [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-7)   Pool 'LIGHT-SOL' not found. Let's add it to solana (mainnet-beta).                                                                                                                  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-8)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-9)   Enter pool information:                                                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-10)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-11)   Pool contract address: 7YZEyZ3DuHQTmgmKwzuXMYG6SHD3sCWZ3mLkU7HuLrfC                                                                                                                 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-12)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-13)   Pool to add:  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-14)   {    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-15)     "address": "7YZEyZ3DuHQTmgmKwzuXMYG6SHD3sCWZ3mLkU7HuLrfC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-16)     "baseSymbol": "LIGHT",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-17)     "quoteSymbol": "SOL",    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-18)     "type": "amm"  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-19)   }                                                                                                                                                                                   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-20)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-21)   Add this pool? (Yes/No) >>> Yes                                                                                                                                                     [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-22)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-23)   Adding pool...  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-24)   ✓ Pool successfully added!                                                                                                                                                          [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-25)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-26)   Restarting Gateway for changes to take effect...  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-27)   ✓ Gateway restarted successfully                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-28)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-12-29)   Pool has been added. You can view it with: gateway pool raydium/amm LIGHT-SOL`

#### Editing Pool Files[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#editing-pool-files "Permanent link")

1.  Navigate to the `/conf/pools/` folder
2.  Open the connector's pool file (e.g., `raydium.json`)
3.  Add a new pool entry to the array following the existing format
4.  Make sure that the resulting file is still valid JSON!
5.  Save the file and restart Gateway

Example pool entry:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-2)   "type": "amm",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-3)   "network": "mainnet-beta",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-4)   "baseSymbol": "WIF",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-5)   "quoteSymbol": "SOL",  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-6)   "address": "EP2ib6dYdEeqD8MfE2ezHCxX3kP3K2eLKkirfPm5eyMx" [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#__codelineno-13-7) }`

For CLMM pools, use `"type": "clmm"` instead. The pool file structure allows you to specify different pools for different networks and trading types (AMM vs CLMM) within the same connector.

### Updating Configurations[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/configuration/#updating-configurations "Permanent link")

There are two ways to update your Gateway configurations:

1.  **Manual Update**:
2.  Edit the configuration files directly
3.  Restart Gateway to apply changes
    
4.  **API Update**:
    
5.  Use the `/config/update` API endpoint to update configurations
6.  This allows for dynamic updates without restarting Gateway

Tip

Always validate your configuration changes before applying them to a production environment. You can use the schema files referenced in `root.yml` to ensure your configurations are valid.

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# AscendEx - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#connector-info)

AscendEx
========

Support Hummingbot

Hummingbot Foundation has a fee share partnership with Ascendex. When you use our software to trade on Ascendex, a custom API header tells Ascendex that the trade was executed using Hummingbot, so they share a portion of your fees with us, at no cost to you. To support us, create an account using our [Ascendex referral link](https://ascendex.com/register?inviteCode=UEIXNXKW)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your support! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (CLOB)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.0 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#perp-connector) | Not built |     |     | API only allows institutional accounts |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.ascendex.com](https://www.ascendex.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/ascendex/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/ascendex/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/ascendex](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/ascendex)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://ascendex.github.io/ascendex-pro-api/](https://ascendex.github.io/ascendex-pro-api/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://ascendex.com/en/support](https://ascendex.com/en/support)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://www.ascendex.com/support/10247584234521](https://www.ascendex.com/support/10247584234521)
    
*   **Ascendex referral link:** [https://ascendex.com/register?inviteCode=UEIXNXKW](https://ascendex.com/register?inviteCode=UEIXNXKW)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

Log in to your AscendEX account using your PC and visit profile icon – \[API Setting\].

[![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api1.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api1.png)

Click \[New API Key\] in the upper right corner of the page.

[![New API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api2.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api2.png)

Create a name for the new API key and set up API permissions and IP address restrictions. Complete a three-step verification by entering your phone, email, and Google verification code. Click \[Generate API Key\] to complete the process.

[![Create API name](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api3.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api3.png)

A pop-up containing both public and private API keys will appear on your screen. Please keep a copy of both keys, as they will only be viewable to you during this stage of the setup. For account security, never share your API keys. In the case of a lost or forgotten API key, it is advised to delete the old API and create new keys immediately.

[![API text](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api4.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api4.png)

After creating an API key, you can Edit or Delete your API keys under the Action tab.

[![API Done](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api5.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/ascendex-api5.png)

### Notes:[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#notes "Permanent link")

*   API keys without an IP address will only remain valid for 365 days.
*   Up to 20 IP addresses can be bound to one API key.
*   For security enhancement, it is recommended that only IP addresses in users API's whitelist make API calls to users' network. An "unrestricted" setting will allow all IPs to access the network, decreasing account security.
*   Multiple IP addresses must be separated by half-width commas during the setup.

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect ascend_ex [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your ascend_ex API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your ascend_ex secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to ascend_ex`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `ascendex`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/ascend\_ex](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/ascend_ex)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect ascendex_paper_trade` instead of `connect ascendex`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🕯 Spot Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#spot-candles-feed "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Collect historical OHCLV data from this exchange's spot markets_

*   **ID**: `ascendex`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1min | 5min | 15min | 30min | 1hour | 2hour | 4hour | 6hour | 12hour | 1day | 1week | 1M
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data\_feed/candles\_feed/ascend\_ex\_spot\_candles](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/ascend_ex_spot_candles)
    

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#usage "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-2-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-2-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="ascendex",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-2-3)                                         trading_pair="ETH-USDT",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/ascendex/#__codelineno-2-4)                                         interval="1m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

Thanks for your feedback! Help us improve this page by [filing an issue](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-site/issues/new?title=[Feedback]+AscendEx+-+/exchanges/ascendex/)
.

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#jupiter)

Jupiter[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#jupiter "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#connector-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/jupiter](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/jupiter)
    
*   **Default Configs**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/jupiter.yml](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/jupiter.yml)
    

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Router Connector | ✅   | DEX Aggregator |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://jup.ag](https://jup.ag/)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://station.jup.ag/docs/apis/swap-api](https://station.jup.ag/docs/apis/swap-api)
    
*   **Chain**: Solana
*   **Networks**: `mainnet-beta`, `devnet`

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Jupiter operates on Solana networks.

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `solana` | `mainnet-beta`, `devnet` |

See [Gateway Connect](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-connect)
 for instructions on connecting your wallet to Gateway.

Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#configuration "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configure Jupiter settings in `/conf/connectors/jupiter.yml`.

Below are the Jupiter configuration parameters and their default values:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-1) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (as a decimal, e.g., 1 = 1%) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-2) slippagePct: 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-4) # Priority level for swap transaction processing [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-5) # Options: medium, high, veryHigh [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-6) priorityLevel: 'veryHigh' [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-7)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-8) # Maximum priority fee in lamports (for dynamic priority fees) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-9) # Used when priorityLevel is set and no explicit priorityFeeLamports is provided [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-10) maxLamports: 1000000 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-12) # Restrict routing to only go through 1 market [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-13) # Default: false (allows multi-hop routes for better prices) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-14) onlyDirectRoutes: false [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-15)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-16) # Restrict routing through highly liquid intermediate tokens only [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-17) # Default: true (for better price and stability) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-18) restrictIntermediateTokens: true [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-20) # Jupiter API key (optional) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-21) # For free tier, leave empty (uses https://lite-api.jup.ag) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-22) # For paid plans, generate key at https://portal.jup.ag (uses https://api.jup.ag) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#__codelineno-0-23) apiKey: ''`

Router Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/#router-endpoints "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Jupiter DEX aggregator for optimal swap routing across Solana_

*   `/connectors/jupiter/router/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/jupiter/router/execute-quote`
*   `/connectors/jupiter/router/execute-swap`

For more info, run Gateway in development mode and go to [http://localhost:15888](http://localhost:15888/)
 in your browser to see detailed documentation for each endpoint.

.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-1) # Global settings for Meteora [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-2) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (e.g., 1 = 1%) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-3) slippagePct: 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-5) # default DLMM strategy type for positions [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-6) # SpotImBalanced = 0, [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-7) # CurveImBalanced = 1, [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-8) # BidAskImBalanced = 2, [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-9) # SpotBalanced = 3, [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-10) # CurveBalanced = 4, [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-11) # BidAskBalanced = 5 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/#__codelineno-0-12) strategyType: 0`

*   `/connectors/meteora/clmm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/meteora/clmm/remove-liquidity`

For more info, run Gateway in development mode and go to [http://localhost:15888](http://localhost:15888/)
 in your browser to see detailed documentation for each endpoint.

# 🔥 Bitget - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#connector-info)

🔥 Bitget
=========

Foundation Partner

Bitget is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Bitget, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To enable this, create an account using our [Bitget referral link](https://www.bitget.com/expressly?channelCode=v9cb&vipCode=26rr&languageType=0)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your support! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.0 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.0 | Yes |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.bitget.com/](https://www.bitget.com/expressly?channelCode=v9cb&vipCode=26rr&languageType=0)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitget/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitget/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitget](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitget)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/common/intro](https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/common/intro)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.bitget.com/academy/en/article-details/Fee-Structure-and-Fee-Calculations-on-Bitget](https://www.bitget.com/academy/en/article-details/Fee-Structure-and-Fee-Calculations-on-Bitget)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Not available
*   **Referral link:** [https://www.bitget.com/expressly?channelCode=v9cb&vipCode=26rr&languageType=0](https://www.bitget.com/expressly?channelCode=v9cb&vipCode=26rr&languageType=0)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  Go to [Bitget Exchange](https://www.bitget.com/expressly?channelCode=v9cb&vipCode=26rr&languageType=0)
     and log in or create a new account.
    
2.  Go to the API Management page at https://www.bitget.com/account/newapi.
    
3.  Click on the **_Create API key_** button
    

![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/bitget-api1.png)

1.  Click on **_System-generated API key_** button ![Select API key type](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/bitget-api2.png)
    
2.  Write a label (note) and passphrase for your API key and then select the permission options that you want and click **_Next_**
    

![Create new API key](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/bitget-api3.png)

1.  Enter all the keys for key creation verification and click **_Confirm_**.
    
2.  Copy your API keys and store them somewhere safe.
    
3.  Now, you have created API keys (API, secret key, passphrase) for your Bitget Exchange!
    

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#generate-api-keys_1 "Permanent link")

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bitget`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect bitget [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your Bitget API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your Bitget secret key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-0-5) Enter your Bitget passphrase >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bitget`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitget`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/spot/intro](https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/spot/intro)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitget)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitget_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/contract/intro](https://www.bitget.com/api-doc/contract/intro)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/bitget_perpetual)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitget/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

# ETCSwap - Hummingbot

ETCSwap
=======

This connector need to be migrated to the new Gateway architecture. See [Legacy Connectors](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/)
 for more information.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (DEX)
*   **Market Type**: Automatic Market Maker (AMM)

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [2️⃣ AMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/etcSwap/#2-amm-connector) | ✅   |     |
| [3️⃣ Range AMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/etcSwap/#3-range-amm-connector) | ✅   |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/etcSwap/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Orca - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#orca)

Orca[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#orca "Permanent link")

==============================================================================

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/orca](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/orca)
    
*   **Default Configs**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/orca.yml](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/orca.yml)
    

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [AMM Connector](https://www.google.com/search?q=%23amm-connector) | ✅   | Legacy Pools |
| [CLMM Connector](https://www.google.com/search?q=%23clmm-connector) | ✅   | Whirlpools (V3) |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.orca.so/](https://www.orca.so/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/orca/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/orca/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/orca](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/orca)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.orca.so/reference/fees](https://www.google.com/search?q=https://docs.orca.so/reference/fees)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.orca.so/](https://docs.orca.so/)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Orca operates exclusively on the Solana blockchain. To transact on Orca, you must configure a Solana wallet within Gateway.

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `solana` | `mainnet-beta`, `devnet` |

### Solana[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#solana "Permanent link")

Orca's primary liquidity pools are "Whirlpools," which utilize concentrated liquidity (CLMM) technology similar to V3 pools on EVM chains.

**To connect your Solana wallet:**

1.  Run the Gateway connect command:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-0-1) gateway connect solana`

1.  Follow the prompts to either:
    
    *   Import an existing wallet using your private key
    *   Generate a new Solana wallet
2.  Select your network:
    
    *   `mainnet-beta` for production trading
    *   `devnet` for testing

The connector includes automatic WSOL (Wrapped SOL) handling and support for the Token-2022 standard.

Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#configuration "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configure Orca settings in `/conf/connectors/orca.yml`.

Below are the Orca configuration parameters and their default values:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-1) # Global settings for Orca [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-2) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (2%) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-3) slippagePct: 2 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-5) # For each swap, the maximum number of hops to consider [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#__codelineno-1-6) maximumHops: 4`

CLMM Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/#clmm-endpoints "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to Orca Whirlpools (concentrated liquidity)_

*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/execute-swap`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/pool-info`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/position-info`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/positions-owned`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/quote-position`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/open-position`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/close-position`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/remove-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/orca/clmm/collect-fees`

For more info, run Gateway in development mode and go to [http://localhost:15888](https://www.google.com/search?q=http://localhost:15888)
 in your browser to see detailed documentation for each endpoint.

# Cube - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#connector-info)

Cube
====

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#connector-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (CLOB)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.cube.exchange](https://www.cube.exchange/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/cube](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/cube)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://cubexch.gitbook.io/cube-api](https://cubexch.gitbook.io/cube-api)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.cube.exchange/fees](https://www.cube.exchange/fees)
    
*   **Unsupported Countries**:
*   Cube does not engage in business with: Afghanistan, Algeria, Angola, Belarus, Bosnia & Herzegovina, Burundi, Cambodia, Central African Republic, China, Crimea (Ukraine), Cuba, North Korea, Donetsk and Luhansk (Ukraine), Egypt, Guyana, Haiti, Iran, Iraq, Laos, Lebanon, Libya, Mali, Macao, Myanmar, Pakistan, Qatar, Russia, Somalia, Sudan, South Sudan, United States of America, Yemen.
*   Sanctioned countries include: Central African Republic, Democratic Republic of the Congo, North Korea, Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Libya, Mali, Myanmar, Russia, Somalia, Sudan, South Sudan, Syria, Yemen, Zimbabwe.

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  Go to [Cube Exchange](https://www.cube.exchange/)
     and log in or create a new account.
    
2.  Open the API Key page by clicking over the profile icon on the top right corner and go to the Setting/API page at https://www.cube.exchange/settings/api.
    
3.  Click on the **_Add another API_** button
    
    ![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/cube-api1.png)
    
4.  Choose your account, select **_WRITE_** permission and click **_Create API Key_**
    
    ![API Persmission](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/cube-api2.png)
    
5.  Copy your API keys and store them somewhere safe.
    
    ![Get API Key](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/cube-api3.png)
    
6.  Go to Subaccounts page and copy your **_Subaccount ID_** number. You will need this to connect to Hummingbot.
    
    ![Subaccount ID](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/cube-api4.png)
    
7.  Now, you have created API keys for your Cube Exchange!
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect cube`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect cube [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your Cube Exchange API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your Cube Exchange secret key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-5) Enter your Cube Exchange Subaccount ID >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-0-6) Enter your Cube environment (live or staging) >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to cube`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `cube`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/cube](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/cube)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

🔮 Rate Orcale[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#rate-orcale "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The connector comes with its own rate oracle implementation. You can use it by using the folllowing command:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-2-1) config rate_oracle_source cube`

Make sure to set global token name to `USDC` as `USDC` is the main quote token for trading on Cube Exchange

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/cube/#__codelineno-3-1) config global_token.global_token_name USDC`

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# Gateway DEX Connectors - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#gateway-dex-connectors)

Gateway DEX Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#gateway-dex-connectors "Permanent link")

==============================================================================================================

Gateway provides standardized connectors for interacting with decentralized exchanges (DEXs) across different blockchain networks. Each connector implements one or more trading types (Router, AMM, CLMM) to support various DeFi protocols.

Supported Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#supported-connectors "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Note

The Gateway refactoring approved in [NCP-22](https://snapshot.box/#/s:hbot-ncp.eth/proposal/0x5cc3540ee219787d5c842bc1ccdb11aab46203bb7f0be658b6b40858501a8e4c)
 has been completed with the v2.8.0 release. The new standard is now ready, and developers can help upgrade the legacy connectors to the new architecture. Community developers can claim bounties for these upgrades where available.

### Active Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#active-connectors "Permanent link")

| Protocol | Chain | Router | AMM | CLMM | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **[Jupiter](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/jupiter/)<br>** | Solana | ✅   | ❌   | ❌   | Leading DEX aggregator on Solana |
| **[Meteora](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/meteora/)<br>** | Solana | ❌   | ❌   | ✅   | Supports for Dynamic Liquidity Market Maker (DLMM) |
| **[Raydium](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/raydium/)<br>** | Solana | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   | Supports for Standard and Concentrated Pools |
| **[Orca](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/orca/)<br>** | Solana | ❌   | ❌   | ✅   | Supports Standard CLMM Pools |
| **[Uniswap](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/)<br>** | Ethereum | ✅   | ✅   | ✅   | Support for V2, V3, and Universal Router |
| **[PancakeSwap](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/)<br>** | Ethereum/BNB | ✅   | ✅   | ✅   | Support for V2, V3, and Smart Router |

### Legacy Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#legacy-connectors "Permanent link")

The following connectors are available in legacy versions but need to be upgraded to the v2.8.0 standard:

| Protocol | Chain | Router | AMM | CLMM | Bounty |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **[Balancer](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/balancer/)<br>** | Ethereum/EVM | ❌   | ✅   | ❌   | [#7653](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/issues/7653) |
| **[Curve](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/curve/)<br>** | Ethereum/EVM | ❌   | ✅   | ❌   | [#7652](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/issues/7652) |
| **[SushiSwap](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/sushiswap/)<br>** | Ethereum/EVM | ✅   | ✅   | ✅   | \-  |
| **[QuickSwap](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/quickswap/)<br>** | Polygon | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   | \-  |
| **[TraderJoe](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/traderjoe/)<br>** | Avalanche | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   | \-  |
| **[ETCSwap](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/etcSwap/)<br>** | Ethereum Classic | ❌   | ✅   | ✅   | \-  |

Connector Schemas[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#connector-schemas "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Gateway implements three standardized schemas that define the API structure for different trading types. Each connector must implement one or more of these schemas to ensure compatibility with Hummingbot.

### Router Schema[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#router-schema "Permanent link")

For DEX aggregators and swap-only protocols. Focuses on quoting optimal trade routes across multiple liquidity sources and executing quotes.

**Key Endpoints:**

*   `quote-swap`: Get optimal swap quote with routing details
*   `execute-swap`: Execute swap directly
*   `execute-quote`: Execute pre-fetched quote

### AMM Schema[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#amm-schema "Permanent link")

For traditional Automated Market Maker pools with constant product (x\*y=k) formulas, such as Uniswap V2 and Raydium Standard Pools.

**Key Endpoints:**

*   `pool-info`: Get pool reserves and pricing
*   `position-info`: Get current liquidity position details
*   `quote-liquidity`: Calculate liquidity provision amounts
*   `add-liquidity`: Add liquidity to pool
*   `remove-liquidity`: Remove liquidity from pool

### CLMM Schema[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#clmm-schema "Permanent link")

For Concentrated Liquidity Market Maker pools where liquidity providers can specify custom price ranges such as Uniswap V3 and Raydium Concentrated Pools.

**Key Endpoints:**

*   `positions-owned`: List all positions for an address
*   `quote-position`: Calculate position parameters for price range
*   `open-position`: Create new concentrated liquidity position
*   `add-liquidity`: Add liquidity to existing position
*   `remove-liquidity`: Remove liquidity from position
*   `collect-fees`: Collect earned fees
*   `close-position`: Close position and withdraw all liquidity

Building Custom Connectors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/#building-custom-connectors "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

For detailed instructions on building custom Gateway DEX connectors, see [Building Gateway Connectors](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/)
.

.
