# 🔥 Bitmart - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#connector-info)

🔥 Bitmart
==========

Foundation Partner

Bitmart is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Bitmart, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [Bitmart referral link](https://www.bitmart.com/invite/Hummingbot/en)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#connector-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.bitmart.com/](https://www.bitmart.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitmart/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/bitmart/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitmart](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/bitmart)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.bitmart.com/api-docs](https://www.bitmart.com/api-docs)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.bitmart.com/fee/en](https://www.bitmart.com/fee/en)
    
*   **Referral link:** [https://www.bitmart.com/invite/Hummingbot/en](https://www.bitmart.com/invite/Hummingbot/en)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Login
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/bitmart-api1.png)
    
*   Click Account tab
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/bitmart-api2.png)
    
*   Click Settings in the API tab
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/bitmart-api3.png)
    
*   Create your API KEY
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/bitmart-api4.png)
    
*   Create Successfully. The Secret Key will only be displayed once. Please copy and save.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/bitmart-api5.png)
    
*   Click Confirm button to exit. Now you can use your new API.
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect bitmart`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your bitmart API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your bitmart secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to bitmart`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitmart`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitmart](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/bitmart)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect bitmart_paper_trade` instead of `connect bitmart`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `bitmart_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/bitmart\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/bitmart_perpetual)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/bitmart/#paper-trading_1 "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect bitmart_paper_trade` instead of `connect bitmart_perpetual`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

# 🔥 XRP Ledger - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#connector-info)

🔥 XRP Ledger
=============

Foundation Sponsor

XRP Ledger (XRPL) is a [sponsor](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on XRPL, you're supporting the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software.

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#connector-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (**DEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#spot-connector) | ✅   | Supports testnet |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#perp-connector) | Not available |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#spot-candles-feed) | Not available |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#perp-candles-feed) | Not available |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://xrpl.org/](https://xrpl.org/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/xrp/](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/xrp/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/xrp](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/xrp)

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Create and fund a XRPL Wallet[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#create-and-fund-a-xrpl-wallet "Permanent link")

*   Please follow the steps in this guide to create a XRPL wallet: [Ripple - Create wallet](https://xrpl.org/)
    
*   Make sure you fund your wallet with enough XRP and tokens for trading

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `xrpl` | `mainnet`, `testnet`, `devnet` |

### Add XRP Credentials to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#add-xrp-credentials-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect xrpl` in order to connect your wallet:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your XRPL wallet secret key >>>  ***************************** [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-0-2) ***********************************`

Enter the `seed` from the account creation script, which starts with "s".

Afterwards, run `balance` If your keys are correct and the node is online, you should see your XRPL balances:

### Modify the XRPL configuration file[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#modify-the-xrpl-configuration-file "Permanent link")

Open the newly created `/conf/connectors/xrpl.yml` file:

[![](https://hummingbot.org/assets/img/xrpl.png)](https://hummingbot.org/assets/img/xrpl.png)

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-1) connector: xrpl [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-3) xrpl_secret_key:  [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-5) custom_markets:   [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-6)   SOLO-XRP:    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-7)     base: SOLO    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-8)     quote: XRP    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-9)     base_issuer: rsoLo2S1kiGeCcn6hCUXVrCpGMWLrRrLZz    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-10)     quote_issuer: '' [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-11)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-12) wss_node_url: wss://s1.ripple.com/ [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-13)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-1-14) wss_second_node_url: wss://s1.ripple.com/`

*   Please check if your trading pairs can be found in these lists (most of them are from [https://gatehub.net/markets](https://gatehub.net/markets)
    ):

Default trading pairs with token issuer address: \`\`\`bash MARKETS = { "XRP-USD": { "base": "XRP", "quote": "USD", "base\_issuer": "", "quote\_issuer": "rhub8VRN55s94qWKDv6jmDy1pUykJzF3wq", }, *   If you can’t find your trading pairs, add them as an entry in `custom_markets` in the connector config file at `/conf/connectors/xrpl.yml`, please note that `custom_markets` will overwrite the default trading pairs. Example:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-1) custom_markets:   [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-2)   SOLO-XRP:    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-3)     base: SOLO    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-4)     quote: XRP    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-5)     base_issuer: rsoLo2S1kiGeCcn6hCUXVrCpGMWLrRrLZz    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-6)     quote_issuer: ''  [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-7)   CORE-XRP:    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-8)     base: CORE    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-9)     quote: XRP    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-10)     base_issuer: rcoreNywaoz2ZCQ8Lg2EbSLnGuRBmun6D    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#__codelineno-2-11)     quote_issuer: ''`

*   You can find token information like issuer or currency code at [https://xrpl.services/tokens](https://xrpl.services/tokens)
    
*   See more pairs on Gatehub: [https://gatehub.net/markets](https://gatehub.net/markets)
    
*   Top 10 traded pairs on Sologenics: [https://sologenic.org/market-index](https://sologenic.org/market-index)
    *   SOLO/XRP
    *   CORE/XRP
    *   RPR/XRP
    *   FURY/XRP
    *   CSC/XRP
    *   XSPECTAR/XRP
    *   EQUILIBRIUM/XRP
    *   RLS/XRP
    *   XRDOGE/XRP
    *   XMEME/XRP

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `xrpl`
*   **Connection Type**: Websocket via gRPC
*   **Folder**: <[https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/xrpl.md](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/xrpl.md)
    \>

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/xrpl/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`

# Pancakeswap - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#pancakeswap)

PancakeSwap[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#pancakeswap "Permanent link")

===================================================================================================

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#connector-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/pancakeswap](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/pancakeswap)
    
*   **Default Configs**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/pancakeswap.yml](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/pancakeswap.yml)
    

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Router Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#router-connector) | ✅   | Smart Router |
| [AMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#amm-connector) | ✅   | V2 Pools |
| [CLMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#clmm-connector) | ✅   | V3 Pools |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website (EVM)**: [https://pancakeswap.finance](https://pancakeswap.finance/)
    
*   **Website (Solana)**: [https://solana.pancakeswap.finance/](https://solana.pancakeswap.finance/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/pancakeswap/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/pancakeswap/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/pancakeswap](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/pancakeswap)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.pancakeswap.finance/products/pancakeswap-exchange/pancakeswap-pools#trading-fees](https://docs.pancakeswap.finance/products/pancakeswap-exchange/pancakeswap-pools#trading-fees)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://developer.pancakeswap.finance/](https://developer.pancakeswap.finance/)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

PancakeSwap operates on multiple blockchain networks including EVM-compatible chains and Solana.

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `ethereum` | `bsc`, `mainnet`, `arbitrum`, `base` |
| `solana` | `mainnet-beta`, `devnet` |

### EVM Chains[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#evm-chains "Permanent link")

For EVM-based networks (BNB Chain, Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base), see [Gateway Connect](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-connect)
 for instructions on connecting your wallet to Gateway.

### Solana[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#solana "Permanent link")

For Solana networks, you'll need to configure a Solana wallet. PancakeSwap on Solana uses the same concentrated liquidity (CLMM) technology as V3 pools on EVM chains.

**To connect your Solana wallet:**

1.  Run the Gateway connect command:
    
    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-0-1) gateway connect solana`
    
2.  Follow the prompts to either:
    
3.  Import an existing wallet using your private key
4.  Generate a new Solana wallet
    
5.  Select your network:
    
6.  `mainnet-beta` for production trading
7.  `devnet` for testing

The connector includes automatic WSOL (Wrapped SOL) handling and full support for Token-2022 standard tokens and NFT position tracking.

Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#configuration "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configure PancakeSwap settings in `/conf/connectors/pancakeswap.yml`.

Below are the PancakeSwap configuration parameters and their default values:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-1) # Global settings for PancakeSwap [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-2) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (2%) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-3) slippagePct: 2 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-5) # For each swap, the maximum number of hops to consider [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#__codelineno-1-6) maximumHops: 4`

Router Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#router-endpoints "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to PancakeSwap's Smart Router for optimal trade execution_

*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/router/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/router/execute-quote`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/router/execute-swap`

AMM Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#amm-endpoints "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to PancakeSwap V2 classic AMM pools_

*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/execute-swap`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/pool-info`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/position-info`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/quote-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/amm/remove-liquidity`

CLMM Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/pancakeswap/#clmm-endpoints "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to PancakeSwap V3 concentrated liquidity pools_

*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/execute-swap`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/pool-info`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/position-info`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/positions-owned`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/quote-position`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/open-position`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/close-position`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/remove-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/pancakeswap/clmm/collect-fees`

For more info, run Gateway in development mode and go to [http://localhost:15888](http://localhost:15888/)
 in your browser to see detailed documentation for each endpoint.

# 🔥 Binance - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#connector-info)

🔥 Binance
==========

Foundation Partner

Binance is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Binance, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To enable this, create an account using our [Binance referral link](https://accounts.binance.com/register?ref=CBWO4LU6)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your support! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#connector-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [📓 Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/using-binance-with-hummingbot/) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.binance.com](https://www.binance.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/binance/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/binance/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/binance](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/binance)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.binance.com/en/fee/schedule](https://www.binance.com/en/fee/schedule)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/115003824812](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/115003824812)
    
*   **Binance referral link:** [https://accounts.binance.com/register?ref=CBWO4LU6](https://accounts.binance.com/register?ref=CBWO4LU6)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tip

See the [Binance Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/using-binance-with-hummingbot/)
 for details on create API keys on Binance.

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect binance`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect binance [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your binance API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your binance secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to binance`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `binance`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://binance-docs.github.io/apidocs/spot/en/](https://binance-docs.github.io/apidocs/spot/en/)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/binance)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect binance_paper_trade` instead of `connect binance`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `binance_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/binance_perpetual)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#usage "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect binance_perpetual`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-2-1) >>> connect binance_perpetual [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-2-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-2-3) Enter your binance_perpetual API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-2-4) Enter your binance_perpetual secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-3-1) You are now connected to binance_perpetual`

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#paper-trading_1 "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: [https://testnet.binancefuture.com](https://testnet.binancefuture.com/)

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect binance_perpetual_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available perpetual strategies / scripts.

🕯 Spot Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#spot-candles-feed "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_OHLCV candles data collector from spot markets_

*   **ID**: `binance`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1s | 1m | 3m | 5m | 15m | 30m | 1h | 2h | 4h | 6h | 8h | 12h | 1d | 3d | 1w | 1M
*   **API Docs**: [https://binance-docs.github.io/apidocs/futures/en/](https://binance-docs.github.io/apidocs/futures/en/)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/binance_spot_candles)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#usage_1 "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-4-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-4-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="binance",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-4-3)                                         trading_pair="ETH-USDT",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-4-4)                                         interval="1m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

🕯 Perp Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#perp-candles-feed "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_OHLCV candles data collector from perpetual futures markets_

*   **ID**: `binance_perpetual`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1s | 1m | 3m | 5m | 15m | 30m | 1h | 2h | 4h | 6h | 8h | 12h | 1d | 3d | 1w | 1M
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/binance_perpetual_candles)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#usage_2 "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-5-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-5-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="binance_perpetual",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-5-3)                                         trading_pair=trading_pair,                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/#__codelineno-5-4)                                         interval="3m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# 🔥 Hyperliquid - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#connector-info)

🔥 Hyperliquid
==============

Foundation Sponsor

Hyperliquid is a [sponsor](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Hyperliquid, you're supporting the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software.

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#connector-info "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (**DEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#spot-connector) | ✅   |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#perp-connector) | ✅   | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |
| [📓 Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/funding-rate-arbitrage-and-creating-vaults-on-hyperliquid/) | ✅   |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/](https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/hyperliquid/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/hyperliquid/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/hyperliquid](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/hyperliquid)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api](https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/trading/fees](https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/trading/fees)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Not available

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Tip

See the [Hyperliquid Vault Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/funding-rate-arbitrage-and-creating-vaults-on-hyperliquid/)
 for more details on how to use Hyperliquid VauLts.

### New: Hyperliquid API Key Support[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#new-hyperliquid-api-key-support "Permanent link")

Hummingbot now supports **API key authentication** for both the `hyperliquid` (spot) and `hyperliquid_perpetual` (perp) connectors, in addition to the existing **Arbitrum wallet + private key** mode.

This lets you trade and manage positions using API key / secret credentials generated from the Hyperliquid web interface.

You can choose whichever auth method best fits your setup and security preferences when configuring the connector in Hummingbot.

### How to Create Hyperliquid API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#how-to-create-hyperliquid-api-keys "Permanent link")

Follow these steps to create API keys on Hyperliquid:

1.  **Open the Hyperliquid API page**
    
    *   Log in to your Hyperliquid account.
        
    *   In the top menu, go to **More → API**, or open: [https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/API](https://app.hyperliquid.xyz/API)
        .
        
2.  **Create an API wallet**
    
    *   Enter a **name** for your API wallet (e.g. `hummingbot`).
        
    *   Paste your **main account wallet address** (the wallet you connected to Hyperliquid).
        
    *   Click **Generate** to create the API wallet, then click **Authorize API Wallet** when prompted.
        
3.  **Configure API settings and save the private key**
    
    *   In **Days Valid**, choose your desired validity (many guides recommend **MAX** / 180 days, if available).
        
    *   Copy the **Private Key** shown on the screen and store it in a secure password manager. This key functions as your **API secret** for bots.
        
    *   Click **Authorize** and sign the transaction in your wallet to finalize the API wallet. Note: you may need to have funds deposited before authorization succeeds.
        
4.  **Get your account wallet address**
    
    *   In the top-right corner of the Hyperliquid app, click your **email / wallet address** next to the Deposit button.
        
    *   Copy your **Account Wallet Address** from this menu. This is your main / master account address, which bots often need alongside the API key.
        
    *   In most bot integrations, you only need the **Account Wallet Address**, not the separate **API Wallet Address**.
        
5.  **Store your credentials safely**
    
    *   Keep the following in a secure place:
        
        *   **Account Wallet Address** (main account / master account)
            
        *   **API public key / wallet address** (if shown)
            
        *   **API private key / secret**
            
    *   Never share your **private key / secret** with anyone, and do not paste it into untrusted tools.
        

Once you have these values, you can supply them to Hummingbot when using API key authentication for the Hyperliquid connectors.

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect hyperliquid` in Hummingbot in order to connect your wallet:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your Arbitrum wallet address >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your Arbitrum wallet private key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to hyperliquid.`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `hyperliquid`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api](https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/hyperliquid)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `hyperliquid_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/hyperliquid\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/hyperliquid_perpetual)
    

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#usage "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect hyperliquid_perpetual`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-2-1) >>> connect hyperliquid_perpetual`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-3-1) Enter your Arbitrum wallet address >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-3-2) Enter your Arbitrum wallet private key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-4-1) You are now connected to hyperliquid_perpetual`

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: [https://app.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/trade](https://app.hyperliquid-testnet.xyz/trade)

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect hyperliquid_perpetual_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available perpetual strategies / scripts.

🕯 Spot Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#spot-candles-feed "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_OHLCV candles data collector from spot markets_

*   **ID**: `hyperliquid`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1m | 3m | 5m | 15m | 30m | 1h | 2h | 4h | 6h | 8h | 12h | 1d | 1w | 1M
*   **API Docs**: [https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api](https://hyperliquid.gitbook.io/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/hyperliquid_spot_candles)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#usage_1 "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-5-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-5-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="hyperliquid",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-5-3)                                         trading_pair="ETH-USDC",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-5-4)                                         interval="1m", max_records=50)`

🕯 Perp Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#perp-candles-feed "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_OHLCV candles data collector from perpetual futures markets_

*   **ID**: `hyperliquid_perpetual`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1m | 3m | 5m | 15m | 30m | 1h | 2h | 4h | 6h | 8h | 12h | 1d | 1w | 1M
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/hyperliquid_perpetual_candles)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#usage_2 "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-6-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-6-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="hyperliquid_perpetual",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-6-3)                                         trading_pair=trading_pair,                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/#__codelineno-6-4)                                         interval="3m", max_records=50)`

# 🔥 Gate.io - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#connector-info)

🔥 Gate.io
==========

Foundation Partner

Gate.io is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Gate.io, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [Gate.io referral link](https://www.gate.io/referral/invite/HBOTGATE_0_103)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#connector-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (CEX)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (CLOB)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.gate.io](https://www.gate.io/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/gate-io](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/gate-io)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.gate.io/docs/apiv4/en/index.html](https://www.gate.io/docs/apiv4/en/index.html)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.gate.io/fee?](https://www.gate.io/fee?)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://www.gate.io/help/c2c/c2ctrade/21130/Which-Counties-Regions-are-supported-by-our-OTC-Services](https://www.gate.io/help/c2c/c2ctrade/21130/Which-Counties-Regions-are-supported-by-our-OTC-Services)
    
*   **Gate.io referral link:** [https://www.gate.io/referral/invite/HBOTGATE\_0\_103](https://www.gate.io/referral/invite/HBOTGATE_0_103)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

**Step 1**

1.  Go to Gate.io Log in or create a new account at https://www.gate.io/.
    
2.  Open the API Management page Hover over the profile icon on the top right corner and go to the [API Management](https://www.gate.io/myaccount/api_key_manage)
     page:
    
3.  Click on the Create API Key button
    
    ![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/gate.io-api1.png)
    
4.  Name your API keys
    
5.  Add IP whitelist (optional) Enable `Bind IP` and input the IP addresses, separated by a comma. You'll need to find the public IP address of the machine you are running Hummingbot If you don't want to whitelist your IP then select `Later` instead but the API keys you create will only be valid for 90 days.
    
6.  Choose API v4 Key and a Classic Account type
    
    ![API Trading](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/gate.io-api4.png)
    
7.  Select Permissions Please select the following permissions and then click on the Submit button.
    
    *   \[Spot/Margin Trade\] -> \[Read And Write\] - it allows trading Spot and Margin
    *   \[Perpetual Contract\] -> \[Read And Write\] - this will allow trading Futures.
    *   \[Wallet \] -> \[Read Only\] -> this is necessary to display the balances correctly.
8.  Carefully read the **Risk Reminder**, tick both paragraphs, and click **I Accept**
    
    ![accept](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/gate.io-api2.png)
    
9.  Enter **Fund Password**, choose **2FA Authentication** method and enter its code
    
    ![fund password](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/gate.io-api3.png)
    
10.  Copy your API keys and store them somewhere safe.
    
11.  Now, you have created API keys for your Gate.io exchange!
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect gate_io`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect gate_io [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your gate_io API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your gate_io secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to gate_io`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `gate_io`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/gate\_io](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/gate_io)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect gate_io_paper_trade` instead of `connect gate_io`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `gate_io_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/gate\_io\_perpetual](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/gate_io_perpetual)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#paper-trading_1 "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: https://www.gate.io/testnet/futures\_trade/USDT/BTC\_USDT

Users can use the perpetual testnet by clicking on the link above - however the testnet does not currently work with Hummingbot

🕯 Spot Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#spot-candles-feed "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Collect historical OHCLV data from this exchange's spot markets_

*   **ID**: `gate_io`
*   **Supported Intervals**: `10s` | `1m` | `5m` | `15m` | `30m` | `1h` | `2h` | `4h` | `6h` | `8h` | `12h` | `1d` | `7d` | `30d`
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data\_feed/candles\_feed/gate\_io\_spot\_candles](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/gate_io_spot_candles)
    

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#usage "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-2-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-2-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="gate_io",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-2-3)                                         trading_pair="ETH-USDT",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-2-4)                                         interval="1m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

🕯 Perp Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#perp-candles-feed "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Collect historical OHCLV data from this exchange's perp markets_

*   **ID**: `gate_io_perpetual`
*   **Supported Intervals**: `1m` | `5m` | `15m` | `30m` | `1h` | `2h` | `4h` | `6h` | `8h` | `12h` | `1d` | `7d`
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data\_feed/candles\_feed/gate\_io\_perpetual\_candles](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/gate_io_perpetual_candles)
    

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#usage_1 "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-3-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-3-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="gate_io_perpetual",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-3-3)                                         trading_pair=trading_pair,                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gate-io/#__codelineno-3-4)                                         interval="3m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

# Guides - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#quickstart-guides)

Guides
======

This page serves as a comprehensive resource hub for learning about algorithmic trading with Hummingbot. With content for new crypto traders to advanced quant developers, you'll find step-by-step guides, Youtube videos, and other content to help you master crypto market making!

🚀 Quickstart Guides[¶](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#quickstart-guides "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get started with Hummingbot using different installation methods:

*   **[Hummingbot Client Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-client/)
    ** Step-by-step guide to install and run the Hummingbot Client using Docker. Best for local usage, learning Hummingbot, and running V1 strategies.
    
*   **[Hummingbot API Quickstart](https://hummingbot.org/installation/hummingbot-api/)
    ** Install Hummingbot API for multi-bot management, cloud deployments, and modern interfaces like Condor (Telegram) and MCP (AI agents).
    
*   **[Hummingbot API Developer Guide](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/)
    ** Learn how to use the Hummingbot API directly with curl or the Python client to add credentials, view portfolios, and place orders.
    
*   **[Dashboard Quickstart Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/hummingbot-dashboard-quickstart-guide/)
    ** _(deprecated)_ Learn how to use the Dashboard app to connect exchange credentials and deploy bots. Note: Dashboard is being deprecated in favor of Condor.
    

🎓 Hummingbot Academy[¶](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#hummingbot-academy "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Just getting started with crypto market making? Start your journey with these foundational articles about crypto algorithmic trading:

*   **[What is Market Making](https://hummingbot.org/blog/what-is-market-making/)
    ** Deep dive into market making, one of the most popular algorithmic trading strategies
    
*   **[What is Cross Exchange Market Making?¶](https://hummingbot.org/blog/what-is-cross-exchange-market-making/)
    ** Essential principles for managing risk in automated trading systems
    
*   **[Liquidity Mining in Hummingbot vs DeFi](https://hummingbot.org/blog/liquidity-mining-in-hummingbot-vs-defi/)
    ** Comparison of liquidity mining approaches in Hummingbot versus traditional DeFi protocols, highlighting key differences and benefits
    

Take your skills to the next level in [Hummingbot Botcamp](https://botcamp.xyz/)
, the official training and certification program for Hummingbot.

🧙 Strategy Guides[¶](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#strategy-guides "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check out the [Strategy Guides](https://hummingbot.org/blog/category/strategy-guides/)
 category in our blog for step-by-step guides in setting up various Hummingbot strategies:

*   **[Strategy Guide: Grid Strike](https://hummingbot.org/blog/strategy-guide-grid-strike/)
    ** This guide walks you through setting up the Grid Strike strategy that sets a long or short grid of orders. Works on both spot or perp exchanges.
    
*   **[How to Configure V2 Strategies](https://hummingbot.org/blog/how-to-configure-a-v2-strategy-controller-in-hummingbot/)
    ** This guide walks you through configuring and running V2 strategy controllers in Hummingbot to automate and optimize your trading strategies.
    
*   **[Coding a Custom Liquidation Strategy](https://hummingbot.org/blog/coding-a-liquidation-sniper-v2-strategy-controller/)
    ** Explore how to create a custom V2 Controller for Hummingbot to snipe future liquidations on Binance
    
*   **[Directional Trading with MACD and Bollinger Bands](https://hummingbot.org/blog/directional-trading-with-macd-and-bollinger-bands/)
    ** Learn how to implement a directional trading strategy using MACD and Bollinger Bands technical indicators for trend identification and entry/exit signals
    
*   **[Technical Deep Dive into the Avellaneda & Stoikov Strategy](https://hummingbot.org/blog/technical-deep-dive-into-the-avellaneda--stoikov-strategy/)
    ** Comprehensive analysis of the mathematical model behind the Avellaneda & Stoikov paper and how it's implemented in Hummingbot
    

📺 YouTube Playlists[¶](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#youtube-playlists "Permanent link")

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Watch and learn from our curated video content:

*   **[Introduction to Market Making](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLDwlFmGQJwQ)
    ** Step-by-step video tutorials for market making with Hummingbot
    
*   **[Using Quants Lab to Conduct Research](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Re2OrY2plao&list=PLDwlNkL_4MMdICXKUEscgUeihRS1ojGV0&index=5)
    ** Learn how to use Hummingbot's Quants Lab for backtesting strategies, analyzing market data, and conducting quantitative research
    
*   **[Botcamp Member Stories](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QPnOPPoXcrM&list=PLDwlNkL_4MMeI3oyeACxbn-PZsobcEWJn)
    ** Hear from real users who have successfully completed the Botcamp certification program
    

🔌 Connector Guides[¶](https://hummingbot.org/guides/#connector-guides "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Learn how to setup and run Hummingbot on various CEXs and DEXs:

*   **[Using Binance with Hummingbot](https://hummingbot.org/blog/using-binance-with-hummingbot/)
    ** Step-by-step guide to using Hummingbot with Binance, including generating exchange API keys and adding them to Hummingbot
    
*   **[Funding Rate Arbitrage and Creating Vaults on Hyperliquid](https://hummingbot.org/blog/funding-rate-arbitrage-and-creating-vaults-on-hyperliquid/)
    ** Guide on using Hyperliquid Vaults as exchange wallets for individual traders or automated market makers
    
*   **[Running a Trading Bot with Hummingbot Dashboard on dYdX V4](https://hummingbot.org/blog/running-a-trading-bot-with-hummingbot-dashboard-on-dydx-v4/)
    ** Guide to integrating and trading on dYdX's perpetual contracts using Hummingbot Dashboard
    
*   **[Running a Trading Bot with Hummingbot on Derive](https://hummingbot.org/blog/running-a-trading-bot-with-hummingbot-on-derive/)
    ** Comprehensive resource for integrating and trading on Derive's decentralized derivatives platform using Hummingbot
    
*   **[Trading on XRPL with Hummingbot](https://hummingbot.org/blog/-using-xrp-ledger-with-hummingbot/)
    ** Guide to setting up and trading on the XRP Ledger's decentralized exchange using Hummingbot
    

See more examples in the [Connector Guides](https://hummingbot.org/blog/category/connector-guides/)
 category in our blog.

Was this page helpful?

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# 🔥 Derive - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#connector-info)

Foundation Sponsor

Derive is a [sponsor](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Derive, you're supporting the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [Derive referral link](https://www.derive.xyz/invite/7SA0V)
. Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Decentralized Exchange (**DEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#spot-candles-feed) |     |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#perp-candles-feed) |     |     |     |     |
| [📓 Connector Guide](https://hummingbot.org/blog/running-a-trading-bot-with-hummingbot-on-derive/) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.derive.xyz](https://www.derive.xyz/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/derive/](https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/derive/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/derive](https://www.coingecko.com/en/coins/derive)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/fees-1](https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/fees-1)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://www.derive.xyz/terms-of-use#:~:text=restricted%20region](https://www.derive.xyz/terms-of-use#:~:text=restricted%20region)
    
*   **Referral link:** [https://www.derive.xyz/invite/7SA0V](https://www.derive.xyz/invite/7SA0V)
    

🔑 About Rate Limits[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#about-rate-limits "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   The system enforces rate limits using a fixed window algorithm, replenishing the request allowance every 5 seconds to maintain system stability. Market makers can access higher rate limits upon request by contacting the support team.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/rate-limit-api1.png)
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/rate-limit-api9.png)
    
*   **Derive Rate Limit:** [https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/rate-limits](https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/rate-limits)
    

Rate Limits[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#rate-limits "Permanent link")

======================================================================================

The below rate limits have been implemented to safeguard our system. Rate limiters use a **"fixed window" algorithm** to discretely refill the request allowance every 5 seconds.

**Market makers are eligible for higher rate limits.**  
To apply for increased rates, please contact our support team.

| Type | Matching | Per-Instrument Matching | Non-Matching | Connections | Burst Multiplier |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Trader | 1 TPS | 1 TPS | 5 TPS | 4x per IP | 5x  |
| Market Maker | 500+ TPS | 10+ TPS | 500+ TPS | up to 64x per IP | 5x  |

> **Note:**  
> Burst requests for both REST and WebSockets are refreshed every 5 seconds.  
> For example, a trader can send 5× matching requests in a single burst but must wait 5 seconds before any further requests can be sent.

Matching, Non-Matching, and Custom Requests[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#matching-non-matching-and-custom-requests "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The below requests are counted as **matching** and **per-instrument matching** requests:

*   `private/order`
*   `private/replace` _(counted as 1 request)_
*   `private/cancel`
*   `private/cancel_by_nonce`
*   `private/cancel_by_instrument`
*   `private/cancel_by_label` _(if `instrument_name` param is set)_

### Custom Rate-Limited Requests[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#custom-rate-limited-requests "Permanent link")

*   `private/cancel_all` – **1 TPS**
*   `private/cancel_by_label` – **10 TPS** _(if `instrument_name` param is_ _NOT_ _set)_

All requests outside of the above are counted as **non-matching**.

* * *

REST[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#rest "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------

All **non-matching** requests over the **REST API** are rate limited per IP at a flat **10 TPS** with a **5x burst**.

If the limit is crossed, a **`429 Too Many Requests`** response is returned.

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Connect
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api2.png)
    
*   Click Home tab
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api3.png)
    
*   Click Developers tab
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api3.png)
    
*   Register your session KEY (i.e your public address e.g metamask)
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api4.png)
    
*   Input a Name and your public address
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api5.png)
    
*   Click Register button to exit. Now you can use your new Session Key.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api6.png)
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect derive`:

*   Input a Derive address as Derive Wallet address
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api8.png)
    
*   Input your Subaccount ID
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api7.png)
    

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect derive [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter Your Derive Wallet address >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-5) Enter your wallet private key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-7) Enter your Subaccount ID >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-8)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-0-9) Enter your Derive Account Type (trader/market_maker) >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to derive`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `derive`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.derive.xyz](https://docs.derive.xyz/)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/derive)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect derive_paper_trade` instead of `connect derive`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `derive_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/derive_perpetual)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#usage "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect derive_perpetual`:

*   Input a Derive address as DerivePerpetual Wallet address
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api8.png)
    
*   Input your Subaccount ID
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api7.png)
    

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-1) >>> connect derive_perpetual [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-3) Enter Your DerivePerpetual Wallet address >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-4) Enter your wallet private key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-5) Enter your Subaccount ID >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-2-6) Enter your Derive Account Type (trader/market_maker) >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#__codelineno-3-1) You are now connected to derive_perpetual`

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way

### Paper Trading (Derive Testnet)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#paper-trading-derive-testnet "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: [https://testnet.derive.xyz](https://testnet.derive.xyz/)

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect derive_perpetual_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available perpetual strategies / scripts.

### Additional Information: Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/#additional-information-perp-connector "Permanent link")

*   Note: Only for perps. Leverage of the position, defined as abs(notional) / collateral net of options.
*   **Derive Leverage:** [https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/private-get\_positions#:~:text=leverage](https://docs.derive.xyz/reference/private-get_positions#:~:text=leverage)
    
*   Sample View ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/derive/derive-api10.png)

Uniswap[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#uniswap "Permanent link")

=======================================================================================

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#connector-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/uniswap](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/tree/development/src/connectors/uniswap)
    
*   **Default Configs**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/uniswap.yml](https://github.com/hummingbot/gateway/blob/development/src/templates/uniswap.yml)
    

| Component | Status | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| [Router Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#router-connector) | ✅   | Universal Router |
| [AMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#2-amm-connector) | ✅   | V2 Pools |
| [CLMM Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#3-clmm-connector) | ✅   | V3 Pools |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://app.uniswap.org](https://app.uniswap.org/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/uniswap-v3/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/uniswap-v3/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/uniswap](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/uniswap)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://docs.uniswap.org/protocol/V2/concepts/advanced-topics/fees](https://docs.uniswap.org/protocol/V2/concepts/advanced-topics/fees)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.uniswap.org/sdk/v3/overview](https://docs.uniswap.org/sdk/v3/overview)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Uniswap operates on Ethereum and EVM-compatible networks.

| Chain | Networks |
| --- | --- |
| `ethereum` | `mainnet`, `arbitrum`, `optimism`, `base`, `polygon`, `avalanche`, `bsc`, `celo` |

See [Gateway Connect](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-connect)
 for instructions on connecting your wallet to Gateway.

Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#configuration "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Configure Uniswap settings in `/conf/connectors/uniswap.yml`.

Below are the Uniswap configuration parameters and their default values:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-1) # Global settings for Uniswap [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-2) # Default slippage percentage for swaps (2%) [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-3) slippagePct: 2 [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-5) # For each swap, the maximum number of hops to consider [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#__codelineno-0-6) maximumHops: 4`

Router Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#router-endpoints "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to Uniswap's Universal Router for optimal trade execution_

*   `/connectors/uniswap/router/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/router/execute-quote`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/router/execute-swap`

AMM Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#amm-endpoints "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to Uniswap V2 classic AMM pools_

*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/execute-swap`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/pool-info`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/position-info`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/quote-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/amm/remove-liquidity`

CLMM Endpoints[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/#clmm-endpoints "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to Uniswap V3 concentrated liquidity pools_

*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/quote-swap`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/execute-swap`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/pool-info`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/position-info`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/positions-owned`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/quote-position`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/open-position`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/close-position`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/add-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/remove-liquidity`
*   `/connectors/uniswap/clmm/collect-fees`

For more info, run Gateway in development mode and go to [http://localhost:15888](http://localhost:15888/)
 in your browser to see detailed documentation for each endpoint.

.
