# Developer Guide - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#hummingbot-api-developer-guide)

Hummingbot API Developer Guide[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#hummingbot-api-developer-guide "Permanent link")

=====================================================================================================================================

This guide demonstrates how to use the Hummingbot API directly using `curl` or the Python client. It covers adding exchange credentials, viewing your portfolio, and placing orders.

### Prerequisites[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#prerequisites "Permanent link")

*   Hummingbot API installed and running (see [Installation Guide](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/installation/)
    )
*   Exchange API keys. For more information, see this [guide on API keys](https://support.binance.com/en/support/faq/how-to-create-api-keys-on-binance-360002502072)
    .
*   Python 3.7+ with `hummingbot-api-client` installed (optional)

### Setup Python Client (Optional)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#setup-python-client-optional "Permanent link")

If you want to use the Python client for the examples below:

1.  Install the [Hummingbot API Client](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot-api-client)
    :
    
    `[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-0-1) pip install hummingbot-api-client`
    
2.  Create a new Python file (e.g., `hummingbot_api_demo.py`):
    
    `[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-1-1) touch hummingbot_api_demo.py`
    
3.  Add the following code to initialize the client:
    
    `[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-2-9) )`
    
4.  To run any of the examples below, use:
    
    `[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-3-1) python hummingbot_api_demo.py`
    

### List Available Exchanges[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#list-available-exchanges "Permanent link")

Get a list of all available exchange connectors. Note that spot and perpetual markets are separate connectors (e.g., `hyperliquid` for spot and `hyperliquid_perpetual` for perps).

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-4-1) curl -u admin:admin -X 'GET' \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-4-2)   'http://localhost:8000/connectors/' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-4-3)   -H 'accept: application/json'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-11) async def list_exchanges():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-12)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-13)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-14)         connectors = await client.connectors.list_connectors()        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-15)         print("\U0001F4CB Available exchanges/connectors:")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-16)         for connector in connectors:            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-17)             print(f"  - {connector}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-18)         return connectors    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-19)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-20)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-21)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-22) def main():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-23)     connectors = asyncio.run(list_exchanges())    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-24)     return connectors [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-25)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-26) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-5-27)     main()`

**Response:**

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-1) [   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-2)   "binance",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-3)   "binance_perpetual",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-4)   "hyperliquid",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-5)   "hyperliquid_perpetual",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-6)   "okx",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-7)   "okx_perpetual", [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-6-8) ]`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-1) 📋 Available exchanges/connectors:   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-2)   - binance  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-3)   - binance_perpetual  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-4)   - hyperliquid  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-5)   - hyperliquid_perpetual  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-6)   - okx  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-7-7)   - okx_perpetual`

### Get Connector Configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#get-connector-configuration "Permanent link")

Before adding credentials, check what configuration fields are required for your connector:

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-8-1) curl -u admin:admin -X 'GET' \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-8-2)   'http://localhost:8000/connectors/hyperliquid/config-map' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-8-3)   -H 'accept: application/json'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-11) async def get_connector_config():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-12)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-13)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-14)         # Get required config fields for hyperliquid        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-15)         config_fields = await client.connectors.get_config_map("hyperliquid")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-16)         print("\U0001F4CB Required configuration fields for hyperliquid:")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-17)         for field in config_fields:            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-18)             print(f"  - {field}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-19)         return config_fields    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-20)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-21)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-22)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-23) # Run the async function [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-9-24) config_fields = asyncio.run(get_connector_config())`

**Response:**

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-10-1) [   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-10-2)   "hyperliquid_api_secret",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-10-3)   "use_vault",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-10-4)   "hyperliquid_api_key" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-10-5) ]`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-11-1) 📋 Required configuration fields for hyperliquid:   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-11-2)   - hyperliquid_api_secret  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-11-3)   - use_vault  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-11-4)   - hyperliquid_api_key`

### Add Exchange Credentials[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#add-exchange-credentials "Permanent link")

Add your exchange credentials to the API. By default, only the `master_account` is created. You can add multiple accounts with different names if needed.

For Hyperliquid:

*   `hyperliquid_api_secret`: Your Hyperliquid public address or vault address
*   `hyperliquid_api_key`: Your API private key
*   `use_vault`: Set to `true` if using vault address, `false` for normal account

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-1) curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/accounts/add-credential/master_account/hyperliquid \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-2)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-3)   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-4)   -d '{    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-5)     "hyperliquid_api_key": "0x1234...abcd",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-6)     "hyperliquid_api_secret": "your-private-key",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-7)     "use_vault": false  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-12-8)   }'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-11) async def add_hyperliquid_credentials():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-12)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-13)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-14)         data = {            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-15)             "hyperliquid_api_key": "0x1234....abcde",  # Your public/vault address            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-16)             "hyperliquid_api_secret": "your-api-private-key",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-17)             "use_vault": False  # True if using vault address        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-18)         }        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-19)         # Add credentials for hyperliquid to the 'master_account'        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-20)         result = await client.accounts.add_credential("master_account", "hyperliquid", data)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-21)         print("\U0001F511 Added hyperliquid credentials:")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-22)         print(result)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-23)         return result    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-24)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-25)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-26)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-27) # Run the async function [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-13-28) asyncio.run(add_hyperliquid_credentials())`

**Response:**

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-14-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-14-2)   "message": "Connector credentials added successfully, [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-14-3) }`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-15-1) 🔑 Added hyperliquid credentials: [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-15-2) {'message': 'Connector credentials added successfully.'}`

### View Your Portfolio[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#view-your-portfolio "Permanent link")

Check your portfolio balances across all connected exchanges:

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-16-1) curl -u admin:admin -X 'POST' \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-16-2)   'http://localhost:8000/portfolio/state' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-16-3)   -H 'accept: application/json' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-16-4)   -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-16-5)   -d '{}'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-11) async def view_portfolio():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-12)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-13)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-14)         # Get portfolio state        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-15)         portfolio = await client.portfolio.get_state()        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-16)         print(f"\n\U0001F4CA Portfolio Summary")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-17)         for account_name, exchanges in portfolio.items():            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-18)             print(f"\n{account_name}:")            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-19)             for exchange, balances in exchanges.items():                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-20)                 print(f"  {exchange}:")                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-21)                 for balance in balances:                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-22)                     print(f"    {balance['token']}:")                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-23)                     print(f"      Units: {balance['units']}")                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-24)                     print(f"      Price: ${balance['price']:.2f}")                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-25)                     print(f"      Value: ${balance['value']:.2f}")                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-26)                     print(f"      Available: {balance['available_units']}")    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-27)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-28)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-29)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-30) # Run the async function [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-17-31) asyncio.run(view_portfolio())`

**Response:**

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-2)   "master_account": {    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-3)     "hyperliquid": [      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-4)       {        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-5)         "token": "USDC",        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-6)         "units": 100.00,        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-7)         "price": 1,        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-8)         "value": 100.00,        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-9)         "available_units": 100.00      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-10)       }    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-11)     ]  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-12)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-18-13) }`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-1) 📊 Portfolio Summary [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-3) master_account:   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-4)   hyperliquid:    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-5)     USDC:      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-6)       Units: 100.00      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-7)       Price: $1.00      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-8)       Value: $100.00      [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-19-9)       Available: 100.00`

### Get Trading Rules[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#get-trading-rules "Permanent link")

Before placing orders, fetch the trading rules for your intended trading pair to understand order size limits and price increments:

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-20-1) curl -u admin:admin -X 'GET' \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-20-2)   'http://localhost:8000/connectors/hyperliquid/trading-rules?trading_pairs=HYPE-USDC' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-20-3)   -H 'accept: application/json'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-4) async def get_trading_rules():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-5)     client = HummingbotAPIClient(        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-6)         base_url="http://localhost:8000",        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-7)         username="admin",        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-8)         password="admin"    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-9)     )    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-10)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-11)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-12)         # Get trading rules for HYPE-USDC        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-13)         rules = await client.connectors.get_trading_rules(            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-14)             connector_name="hyperliquid",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-15)             trading_pairs=["HYPE-USDC"]        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-16)         )        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-17)         hype_rules = rules["HYPE-USDC"]        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-18)         print("\U0001F4CF Trading Rules for HYPE-USDC:")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-19)         print(f"  Min Order Size: {hype_rules['min_order_size']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-20)         print(f"  Max Order Size: {hype_rules['max_order_size']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-21)         print(f"  Min Price Increment: {hype_rules['min_price_increment']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-22)         print(f"  Min Base Amount Increment: {hype_rules['min_base_amount_increment']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-23)         print(f"  Supports Limit Orders: {hype_rules['supports_limit_orders']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-24)         print(f"  Supports Market Orders: {hype_rules['supports_market_orders']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-25)         return rules    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-26)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-27)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-28)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-29) # Run the async function [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-30) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-21-31)     asyncio.run(get_trading_rules())`

**Response:**

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-2)   "HYPE-USDC": {    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-3)     "min_order_size": 0,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-4)     "max_order_size": 1e+56,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-5)     "min_price_increment": 0.0001,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-6)     "min_base_amount_increment": 0.01,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-7)     "min_quote_amount_increment": 1e-56,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-8)     "min_notional_size": 0,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-9)     "min_order_value": 0,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-10)     "max_price_significant_digits": 1e+56,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-11)     "supports_limit_orders": true,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-12)     "supports_market_orders": true,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-13)     "buy_order_collateral_token": "USDC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-14)     "sell_order_collateral_token": "USDC"  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-15)   } [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-22-16) }`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-1) 📏 Trading Rules for HYPE-USDC:   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-2)   Min Order Size: 0  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-3)   Max Order Size: 1e+56  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-4)   Min Price Increment: 0.0001  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-5)   Min Base Amount Increment: 0.01  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-6)   Supports Limit Orders: True  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-23-7)   Supports Market Orders: True`

### Place a Limit Order[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#place-a-limit-order "Permanent link")

Execute a limit sell order for HYPE:

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-1) curl -u admin:admin -X 'POST' \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-2)   'http://localhost:8000/trading/orders' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-3)   -H 'accept: application/json' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-4)   -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-5)   -d '{  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-6)   "account_name": "master_account",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-7)   "connector_name": "hyperliquid",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-8)   "trading_pair": "HYPE-USDC",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-9)   "trade_type": "SELL",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-10)   "amount": 1,  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-11)   "order_type": "LIMIT",  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-12)   "price": 47.1,  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-13)   "position_action": "OPEN" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-24-14) }'`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-4) # Create client instance [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-5) client = HummingbotAPIClient(     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-6)     base_url="http://localhost:8000",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-7)     username="admin",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-8)     password="admin" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-9) ) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-10)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-11) async def place_limit_order():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-12)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-13)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-14)         # Place a limit sell order        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-15)         order = await client.trading.place_order(            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-16)             account_name="master_account",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-17)             connector_name="hyperliquid",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-18)             trading_pair="HYPE-USDC",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-19)             trade_type="SELL",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-20)             amount=1,            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-21)             order_type="LIMIT",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-22)             price=47.1,            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-23)             position_action="OPEN"        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-24)         )        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-25)         print(f"\n✅ Order Placed Successfully!")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-26)         print(f"  Order ID: {order['order_id']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-27)         print(f"  Status: {order['status']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-28)         print(f"  Connector: {order['connector_name']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-29)         print(f"  Trading Pair: {order['trading_pair']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-30)         print(f"  Type: {order['order_type']} {order['trade_type']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-31)         print(f"  Amount: {order['amount']} HYPE")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-32)         print(f"  Price: ${order['price']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-33)         return order    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-34)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-35)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-36)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-37) # Run the async function [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-25-38) asyncio.run(place_limit_order())`

Geo-Restriction Error

If you receive an error like:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-26-1) {   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-26-2)   "detail": "Failed to place trade: No order book exists for 'HYPE-USDC'." [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-26-3) }`

This may indicate you are geo-restricted from trading on the exchange. Check your API logs for more details:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-27-1) docker logs hummingbot-api`

### Complete Example[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#complete-example "Permanent link")

Here's a complete example that performs all three operations:

curlPython Client

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-1) echo "🔑 Adding Exchange Account..." [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-2) curl -X POST "http://localhost:8000/accounts/add-account" \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-3)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-4)   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-5)   -d '{"account_name": "master_account"}' [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-6)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-7) # Step 2: Add credentials for hyperliquid [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-8) curl -X POST "http://localhost:8000/accounts/add-credential/master_account/hyperliquid" \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-9)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-10)   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-11)   -d '{    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-12)     "hyperliquid_api_key": "0x1234...abcd",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-13)     "hyperliquid_api_secret": "your-arbitrum-private-key",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-14)     "use_vault": false  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-15)   }' [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-16)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-17) # Wait for account sync [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-18) sleep 2 [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-19)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-20) # Step 3: View portfolio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-21) echo -e "\n\U0001F4CA Fetching Portfolio..." [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-22) curl -X POST "http://localhost:8000/portfolio/state" \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-23)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-24)   -H "accept: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-25)   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-26)   -d '{}' [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-27)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-28) # Step 4: Get trading rules for HYPE-USDC [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-29) echo -e "\n\U0001F4CF Getting Trading Rules..." [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-30) curl -X GET "http://localhost:8000/connectors/hyperliquid/trading-rules?trading_pairs=HYPE-USDC" \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-31)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-32)   -H "accept: application/json" [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-33)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-34) # Step 5: Place limit order [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-35) echo -e "\n\U0001F4B1 Placing Limit Order..." [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-36) curl -X POST "http://localhost:8000/trading/orders" \   [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-37)   -u "admin:admin" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-38)   -H "accept: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-39)   -H "Content-Type: application/json" \  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-40)   -d '{    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-41)     "account_name": "master_account",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-42)     "connector_name": "hyperliquid",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-43)     "trading_pair": "HYPE-USDC",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-44)     "trade_type": "SELL",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-45)     "amount": 1,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-46)     "order_type": "LIMIT",    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-47)     "price": 47.1,    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-48)     "position_action": "OPEN"  [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-28-49)   }'`

Save this code to `hummingbot_api_demo.py`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-1) import asyncio [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-2) from hummingbot_api_client import HummingbotAPIClient [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-4) async def main():     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-5)     # Initialize client    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-6)     client = HummingbotAPIClient(        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-7)         base_url="http://localhost:8000",        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-8)         username="admin",        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-9)         password="admin"    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-10)     )    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-11)     await client.init()    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-12)     try:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-13)         # Step 1: Add exchange account        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-14)         print("🔑 Adding Exchange Account...")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-15)         try:            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-16)             account = await client.accounts.add_account(                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-17)                 account_name="master_account"            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-18)             )            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-19)             print(f"✓ Account '{account['account_name']}' added successfully!")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-20)         except Exception as e:            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-21)             if "Account already exists" in str(e):                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-22)                 print("ℹ️ Account already exists, continuing...")            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-23)             else:                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-24)                 raise [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-25)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-26)         # Step 2: Add credentials for hyperliquid        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-27)         print("\n🔑 Adding Hyperliquid Credentials...")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-28)         credentials = {            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-29)             "hyperliquid_api_key": "0x1234...abcd",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-30)             "hyperliquid_api_secret": "your-arbitrum-private-key",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-31)             "use_vault": False        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-32)         }        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-33)         cred_result = await client.accounts.add_credential(            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-34)             account_name="master_account",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-35)             connector_name="hyperliquid",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-36)             credentials=credentials        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-37)         )        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-38)         print(f"✓ Credentials added: {cred_result}") [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-39)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-40)         # Wait for account sync        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-41)         await asyncio.sleep(2) [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-42)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-43)         # Step 3: View portfolio        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-44)         print("\n📊 Fetching Portfolio...")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-45)         portfolio = await client.portfolio.get_state()        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-46)         print("Portfolio State:")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-47)         for account, exchanges in portfolio.items():            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-48)             for exchange, balances in exchanges.items():                [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-49)                 for balance in balances:                    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-50)                     print(f"  {account}/{exchange}: {balance['units']:.2f} {balance['token']} (${balance['value']:.2f})") [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-51)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-52)         # Step 4: Get trading rules        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-53)         print("\n📏 Getting Trading Rules for HYPE-USDC...")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-54)         rules = await client.connectors.get_trading_rules(            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-55)             connector_name="hyperliquid",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-56)             trading_pairs=["HYPE-USDC"]        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-57)         )        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-58)         hype_rules = rules["HYPE-USDC"]        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-59)         print(f"  Min Order Size: {hype_rules['min_order_size']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-60)         print(f"  Min Price Increment: {hype_rules['min_price_increment']}") [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-61)        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-62)         # Step 5: Place limit order        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-63)         print("\n💱 Placing Limit Order...")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-64)         order = await client.trading.place_order(            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-65)             account_name="master_account",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-66)             connector_name="hyperliquid",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-67)             trading_pair="HYPE-USDC",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-68)             trade_type="SELL",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-69)             amount=1,            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-70)             order_type="LIMIT",            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-71)             price=47.1,            [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-72)             position_action="OPEN"        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-73)         )        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-74)         print(f"✓ Order {order['order_id']} submitted")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-75)         print(f"  Status: {order['status']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-76)         print(f"  Type: {order['order_type']} {order['trade_type']}")        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-77)         print(f"  Amount: {order['amount']} HYPE @ ${order['price']}") [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-78)    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-79)     except Exception as e:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-80)         print(f"❌ Error: {e}")    [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-81)     finally:        [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-82)         await client.close() [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-83)[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-84) # Run the complete example [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-85) if __name__ == "__main__":     [](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-29-86)     asyncio.run(main())`

Run the script:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#__codelineno-30-1) python hummingbot_api_demo.py`

Next Steps[¶](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/quickstart/#next-steps "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Now that you've completed the quickstart, explore more advanced features:

*   **[Bot Management](https://hummingbot.org/dashboard/instances/)
    **: Deploy and manage multiple trading bots
*   **[Strategy Configuration](https://hummingbot.org/dashboard/config/)
    **: Configure and deploy trading strategies
*   **[Market Data](https://hummingbot.org/hummingbot-api/#market-data)
    **: Access real-time and historical market data
*   **[Backtesting](https://hummingbot.org/dashboard/backtest/)
    **: Test your strategies with historical data

For the complete API reference, visit the [API documentation](http://localhost:8000/docs)
 when your API is running.

.

# Exchanges - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#exchanges)

Exchanges[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#exchanges "Permanent link")

===========================================================================

What Are Exchange Connectors?[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#what-are-exchange-connectors "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hummingbot is open source software that helps you create and deploy crypto trading bots across 50+ exchanges. The project has **14k+ GitHub stars** and **3.9k+ forks**, representing one of the most active trading bot communities.

Connectors are standardized API integrations that enable Hummingbot to communicate with different exchanges. Each connector implements a common interface for order management, balance tracking, and market data streaming, allowing strategies to work seamlessly across multiple exchanges.

### Supported Exchange Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#supported-exchange-types "Permanent link")

| Exchange Type | Description | Sample Connector |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **🏛️ CLOB CEX** | Centralized exchanges with spot & perpetual futures trading in central limit order book (CLOB) markets | [Binance →](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/binance/) |
| **📊 CLOB DEX** | On-chain, non-custodial spot and perp exchanges CLOB markets | [Hyperliquid →](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/hyperliquid/) |
| **🔄 Gateway DEX** | AMM decentralized exchanges and aggregators via Gateway | [Uniswap →](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/gateway/uniswap/) |

*   [All CLOB Connectors →](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/clob/)
    
*   [All Gateway DEX Connectors →](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/connectors/)
    

### Real-Time Usage Data[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#real-time-usage-data "Permanent link")

See live trading activity across all exchanges via our public dashboard:

![Reported Volumes](https://hummingbot.org/assets/img/reported-volumes-light.png#only-light) ![Reported Volumes](https://hummingbot.org/assets/img/reported-volumes-dark.png#only-dark)

The [Reported Volumes](https://hummingbot.org/reporting/)
 dashboard shows real-time, aggregated trading data from Hummingbot instances worldwide, including both official releases and community forks. This transparent data helps exchanges understand actual usage patterns and trading volume.

[View Live Dashboard →](https://p.datadoghq.com/sb/a96a744f5-a15479d77992ccba0d23aecfd4c87a52)

How to Add a Hummingbot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#how-to-add-a-hummingbot-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

You can choose from three integration options to get an official Hummingbot connector built and maintained:

| Option | Cost | Features |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **🔧 DIY Governance** | Free | • Build your own connector  <br>• Submit New Connector Proposal  <br>• Self-maintenance required |
| **💎 Bounty Management** | $10,000 | • Professional bounty oversight  <br>• 1 year maintenance included  <br>• Foundation manages process |
| **🏆 Sponsor Foundation** | $50,000+ | • Comprehensive partnership  <br>• Priority development  <br>• Custom features |

### 🔧 DIY Governance[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#diy-governance "Permanent link")

Build your own connector following other connectors in the `development` branch of Hummingbot's open source framework. Then, create a [New Connector Proposal](https://hummingbot.org/about/proposals/)
 along with a valid, comprehensive pull request containing the connector code.

You'll need some [HBOT tokens](https://hummingbot.org/about/governance/)
 to create a proposal, and you'll be responsible for ongoing maintenance updates and periodic voting to keep your connector included in ongoing releases of Hummingbot.

### 💎 Bounty Management[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#bounty-management "Permanent link")

Have a professional community developer build and maintain your connector through our Bounty Management service for **$10,000**. This comprehensive package includes full connector development for all supported trading types (spot, perpetuals, AMM), plus one year of maintenance and governance support. The Foundation handles developer assignment, code review, testing, and community approval processes.

See [Bounties](https://hummingbot.org/bounties/)
 for more information or review the [Bounty Escrow Agreement](https://hummingbot-foundation.notion.site/Bounty-Escrow-Agreement-1eac9b8ea4f780d19afee59abed1fe1e)
.

### 🏆 Sponsor the Foundation[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#sponsor-the-foundation "Permanent link")

Partner directly with Hummingbot Foundation for priority development, exchange-specific content like [Funding Rate Arbitrage on Hyperliquid](https://hummingbot.org/blog/funding-rate-arbitrage-and-creating-vaults-on-hyperliquid/)
, and co-marketing campaigns starting at **$50,000**.

This premium option includes dedicated engineering resources, custom content development, and ongoing collaboration. Ideal for exchanges with new technical requirements and those seeking joint go-to-market and educational initiatives.

Current Foundation Partners[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#current-foundation-partners "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🏆 Exchange Sponsors[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#exchange-sponsors "Permanent link")

Leading exchanges partnering with Hummingbot Foundation for strategic integration:

*   [**XRPL**](https://xrpl.org/)
    
*   [**Hyperliquid**](https://hyperliquid.xyz/)
    
*   [**dYdX**](https://dydx.exchange/)
    
*   [**Derive**](https://www.derive.fi/)
    
*   [**Bitget**](https://www.bitget.com/)
    

### 🤝 Fee-Share Partners[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#fee-share-partners "Permanent link")

Exchanges supporting open-source development through revenue sharing:

*   [**Binance**](https://www.binance.com/)
    
*   [**Gate.io**](https://www.gate.io/)
    
*   [**KuCoin**](https://www.kucoin.com/)
    
*   [**OKX**](https://www.okx.com/)
    
*   [**HTX**](https://www.htx.com/)
    
*   [**Bitmart**](https://www.bitmart.com/)
    
*   [**Bitget**](https://www.bitget.com/)
    

Exchange Governance[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#exchange-governance "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hummingbot uses a transparent, community-driven governance process that lets \[HBOT\] holders decide which exchanges the codebase should support:

### New Connector Proposals (NCPs)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#new-connector-proposals-ncps "Permanent link")

*   Exchanges can propose new connectors
*   Community votes on inclusion
*   Requires 200,000 HBOT stake
*   7-day voting period

### Quarterly Connector Polls[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#quarterly-connector-polls "Permanent link")

*   Community votes on which exchanges to support
*   Allocates maintenance resources
*   Limits number of exchanges by type
*   Removes inactive connectors

[Learn About Governance →](https://hummingbot.org/about/governance/)

Connector Development[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#connector-development "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### CLOB Connectors (CEX/DEX)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#clob-connectors-cexdex "Permanent link")

CLOB (Central Limit Order Book) connectors provide WebSocket and REST-based integrations for order book exchanges. These connectors handle order placement, cancellation, balance tracking, and real-time market data streaming.

**Key Features:**

*   Direct integration into Hummingbot client
*   Sub-second order execution
*   Compatible with V2 Strategies framework
*   Comprehensive testing and QA process

[Build CLOB Connectors →](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/connectors/build/)

### Gateway Connectors (AMM/DEX)[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#gateway-connectors-ammdex "Permanent link")

Gateway connectors enable interaction with decentralized protocols through a standardized REST API interface. Gateway supports Router, AMM, and CLMM connector types for blockchain-based trading.

**Key Features:**

*   Blockchain-agnostic architecture
*   Smart contract integration
*   Support for liquidity provision
*   Hardware wallet compatibility

[Build Gateway Connectors →](https://hummingbot.org/connectors/gateway-connectors/)

For Exchanges Ready to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/#for-exchanges-ready-to-connect "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Get your exchange integrated with Hummingbot through our comprehensive bounty management service. Email us at [operations@hummingbot.org](mailto:operations@hummingbot.org)
 or contact Foundation team members on [Hummingbot Discord](https://discord.gg/hummingbot)
 to learn more. Sign the [Bounty Escrow Agreement](https://hummingbot-foundation.notion.site/Bounty-Escrow-Agreement-1eac9b8ea4f780d19afee59abed1fe1e)
 and escrow the funds to formalize the engagement.

# Commands - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#installation-and-setup)

Commands
========

This guide covers how to use Gateway commands within the Hummingbot client. Gateway commands allow you to manage wallets, execute swaps, manage liquidity positions, and configure Gateway settings directly from Hummingbot.

Installation and Setup[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#installation-and-setup "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Before using Gateway commands, you need to have Gateway installed and running. Follow the [Gateway Installation Guide](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/installation/)
 to set up Gateway using either Docker or from source.

Once Gateway is running, you can verify the connection in Hummingbot:

1.  **Check the status indicator**: Look for `GATEWAY: 🟢 ONLINE` in the upper right corner of the Hummingbot client
2.  **Test the connection**: Run `gateway ping` to verify Gateway is accessible and chains are connected
3.  **Generate certificates** (if needed): Run `gateway generate-certs` to create SSL certificates for secure communication

If you see `GATEWAY: 🔴 OFFLINE` in the upper right corner:

*   Ensure Gateway is running (check Docker container or process)
*   Verify Gateway is running on the correct port (default: 15888)
*   Check that certificates match between Hummingbot and Gateway (if you are running in production mode)
*   Review Gateway logs for any error messages

gateway --help[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-help "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

To see all available Gateway commands and their descriptions:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> gateway --help [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-2) usage:  gateway [-h] {allowance,approve,balance,config,connect,generate-certs,list,lp,ping,pool,swap,token} ... [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-3)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-4) positional arguments:   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-5)   {allowance,approve,balance,config,connect,generate-certs,list,lp,ping,pool,swap,token}    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-6)     allowance           Check token allowances for ethereum connectors    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-7)     approve             Approve token for use with ethereum connectors    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-8)     balance             Check token balances    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-9)     config              Show or update configuration    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-10)     connect             Add a wallet for a chain    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-11)     generate-certs      Create SSL certificate    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-12)     list                List available connectors    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-13)     lp                  Manage liquidity positions    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-14)     ping                Test node and chain/network status    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-15)     pool                View or update pool information    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-16)     swap                Swap tokens    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-0-17)     token               View or update token information`

gateway ping[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-ping "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Test the connection to Gateway and check node/chain status.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-1-1) usage: gateway ping [-h] [chain]                                                                                                                                                    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-1-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-1-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-1-4)     chain       Specific chain to test (optional)`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-1) >>> gateway ping [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-3)   Gateway service is online.                                                                                                                                                          [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-4)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-5)   Testing network status for 2 chains...                                                                                                                                              [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-7)   ethereum (base):    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-8)     - RPC URL: https://small-dimensional-pine.base-mainnet.quiknode.pro/d01204cade4fab5  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-9)   2085cd0033c01bb2606a40c33    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-10)     - Current Block: 34463843    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-11)     - Native Currency: ETH    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-12)     - Status: ✓ Connected                                                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-13)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-14)   solana (mainnet-beta):    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-15)     - RPC URL: https://dry-dawn-hill.solana-mainnet.quiknode.pro/41bbd7ad405c552f91cc92  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-16)   8e044e5e04c66341d2    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-17)     - Current Block: 361378534    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-18)     - Native Currency: SOL    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-2-19)     - Status: ✓ Connected`                            

gateway list[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-list "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

List all available chains, networks, and connectors.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-3-1) usage: gateway list [-h]`  

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-1) >>> gateway list [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-2)      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-3)       +-------------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-4)       | connector   | chain_type   | networks                                                         | trading_types     |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-5)       |-------------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------|      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-6)       | jupiter     | solana       | devnet, mainnet-beta                                             | router            |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-7)       | meteora     | solana       | devnet, mainnet-beta                                             | clmm              |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-8)       | raydium     | solana       | devnet, mainnet-beta                                             | amm, clmm         |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-9)       | uniswap     | ethereum     | arbitrum, avalanche, base, bsc, celo, mainnet, optimism, polygon | amm, clmm, router |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-10)       | 0x          | ethereum     | arbitrum, avalanche, base, bsc, mainnet, optimism, polygon       | router            |      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-4-11)       +-------------+--------------+------------------------------------------------------------------+-------------------+`

gateway connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-connect "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Add a wallet for a specific chain. This is the primary way to connect your wallet to Gateway. After a wallet is successfully added, it automatically becomes the `defaultWallet` for that chain (ethereum or solana) in the Gateway configuration.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-5-1) usage: gateway connect [-h] [chain]                                                                                                                                                 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-5-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-5-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-5-4)     chain       Blockchain chain (e.g., ethereum, solana)` 

### Add regular wallet[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#add-regular-wallet "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-6-1) >>> gateway connect ethereum [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-6-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-6-3) Select Option (1) Add Regular Wallet, (2) Add Hardware Wallet, (3) Exit [default: 3]: 1 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-6-4) Enter your ethereum wallet private key: *********`

### Add hardware wallet[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#add-hardware-wallet "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-7-1) >>> gateway connect ethereum [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-7-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-7-3) Select Option (1) Add Regular Wallet, (2) Add Hardware Wallet, (3) Exit [default: 3]: 2 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-7-4)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-7-5) Enter your hardware wallet address >>> 0x123...abc`

Note

The wallet you add becomes the default wallet for all operations on that chain. You can check which wallet is currently set as default by running `gateway config ethereum` or `gateway config solana`.

gateway balance[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-balance "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check token balances for connected wallets.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-8-1) usage: gateway balance [-h] [chain] [tokens]                                                                                                                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-8-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-8-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-8-4)     chain       Chain name (e.g., ethereum, solana)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-8-5)     tokens      Comma-separated list of tokens to check (optional)`                                                                                                                   

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-1) >>> gateway balance [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-3) Updating gateway balances, please wait...                                                                                                                                           [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-4)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-5)   Fetching balances for ethereum:base for tokens: all                                                                                                                                 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-7)   Chain: ethereum  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-8)   Network: base  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-9)   Address: <ethereum-address>      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-10)       Token Balance        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-11)         ETH  0.0154       [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-12)        USDC 57.2579       [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-13)        WETH  0.0188                                                                                                                                                                   [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-14)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-9-15)   Fetching balances for solana:mainnet-beta for tokens: all
