gateway config[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-config "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

View and update Gateway configuration settings.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-1) usage: gateway config [-h] [namespace] [action] [args ...]                                                                                                                          [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-4)     namespace   Namespace (e.g., ethereum-mainnet, uniswap)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-5)     action      Action to perform (update)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-10-6)     args        Additional arguments: <path> <value> for direct update`

### View configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#view-configuration "Permanent link")

You may view the configuration for any **namespace**:

*   chain: ethereum, solana, etc
*   network: ethereum-mainnet, solana-mainnet-beta, etc
*   connector: jupiter, uniswap, etc

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-1) >>>  gateway config solana-mainnet-beta                                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-3)   Gateway Configuration - namespace: solana-mainnet-beta:  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-4)   nodeURL: https://dry-dawn-hill.solana-mainnet.quiknode.pro/41bbd7ad405c552f91cc928e044e5e04c66341d2  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-5)   nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-6)   defaultComputeUnits: 200000  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-7)   confirmRetryInterval: 0.5  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-8)   confirmRetryCount: 10  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-9)   basePriorityFeePct: 90  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-11-10)   minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1`

### Update configuration[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#update-configuration "Permanent link")

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-1) >>>  gateway config solana-mainnet-beta update                                                                                                                                      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-3)   Current configuration for solana-mainnet-beta:  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-4)   nodeURL: https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-5)   nativeCurrencySymbol: SOL  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-6)   defaultComputeUnits: 200000  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-7)   confirmRetryInterval: 0.5  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-8)   confirmRetryCount: 10  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-9)   basePriorityFeePct: 90  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-10)   minPriorityFeePerCU: 0.1                                                                                                                                                            [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-11)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-12)   Available configuration paths: nodeURL, nativeCurrencySymbol, defaultComputeUnits, confirmRetryInterval, confirmRetryCount, basePriorityFeePct, minPriorityFeePerCU                 [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-13)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-14)   Enter configuration path (or 'exit' to cancel): nodeURL                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-15)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-16)   Current value for 'nodeURL': https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com                                                           v [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-17)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-12-18)   Enter new value (or 'exit' to cancel):`                                                                                                                                             

Gateway will automatically restart after any configuration change.

gateway token[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-token "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

View or manage tokens in the token lists.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-13-1) usage: gateway token [-h] [symbol_or_address] [action]                                                                                                                              [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-13-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-13-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-13-4)     symbol_or_address  Token symbol or address    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-13-5)     action             Action to perform (update)`

gateway pool[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-pool "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

View and manage liquidity pool information.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-1) usage: gateway pool [-h] [connector] [trading_pair] [action] [args ...]                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-4)     connector     Connector name/type (e.g., uniswap/amm)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-5)     trading_pair  Trading pair (e.g., ETH-USDC)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-6)     action        Action to perform (update)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-16-7)     args          Additional arguments: <address> for direct pool update`

gateway swap[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-swap "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Execute token swaps through DEX connectors.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-1) usage: gateway swap [-h] [connector] [args ...]                                                                                                                                     [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-4)     connector   Connector name/type (e.g., jupiter/router)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-5)     args        Arguments: [base-quote] [side] [amount]. Interactive mode if not all provided. Example: gateway swap uniswap ETH-USDC BUY 0.1                                         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-6)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-7)   options:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-19-8)     -h, --help  show this help message and exit`

gateway lp[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-lp "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Manage liquidity positions on AMM and CLMM pools.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-1) usage: gateway lp [-h] [connector] [{add-liquidity,remove-liquidity,position-info,collect-fees}]                                                                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-4)     connector             Connector name/type (e.g., raydium/amm)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-5)     {add-liquidity,remove-liquidity,position-info,collect-fees}                          [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-21-6)                           LP action to perform`

### List positions[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#list-positions "Permanent link")

gateway approve[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-approve "Permanent link")

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Approve ERC-20 tokens for use with DEX connectors (Ethereum only).

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-26-1) usage: gateway approve [-h] [connector] [token]                                                                                                                                         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-26-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-26-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-26-4)     connector   Connector name/type (e.g., jupiter/router)    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-26-5)     token       Token symbol to approve (e.g., WETH)`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-27-1) >>>  gateway approve uniswap/amm CBBTC                                                                                                                                                  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-27-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-27-3)   Fetching uniswap/amm allowance for CBBTC... gateway allowance[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-allowance "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check token allowances for DEX connectors (Ethereum only).

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-28-1) usage: gateway allowance [-h] [connector]                                                                                                                                               [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-28-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-28-3)   positional arguments:    [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-28-4)     connector   Ethereum connector name/type (e.g., uniswap/amm)`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-1) >>>  gateway allowance uniswap/amm                                                                                                                                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-2)   Checking token allowances, please wait...                                                                                                                                               [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-3)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-4)   Connector: uniswap/amm  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-5)   Chain: ethereum  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-6)   Network: base  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-7)   Wallet: 0xDA50C69342216b538Daf06FfECDa7363E0B96684       [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-8)        Symbol       Address Allowance         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-9)          AAVE 0x6370...814b Unlimited        [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-10)         CBBTC 0xcbB7...33Bf         0          [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-11)           DAI 0x50c5...B0Cb Unlimited         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-12)          LINK 0x88fb...e196 Unlimited         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-13)          USDC 0x8335...2913 Unlimited         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-14)          USDT 0xfde4...9bb2         0      [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-15)       VIRTUAL 0x0b3e...7e1b Unlimited         [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-29-16)          WETH 0x4200...0006 Unlimited` 

gateway generate-certs[¶](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#gateway-generate-certs "Permanent link")

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Generate SSL certificates for secure Gateway communication.

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-30-1) usage: gateway generate-certs [-h]`

`[](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-31-1) >>>  gateway generate-certs                                                                                                                                                             [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-31-2)  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-31-3)   Enter pass phrase to generate Gateway SSL certifications  >>> *****  [](https://hummingbot.org/gateway/commands/#__codelineno-31-4)   Gateway SSL certification files are created in /Users/feng/hummingbot/certs.`

Afterwards, run `pnpm run setup` from the Gateway root directory to copy these certificates to Gateway.

.

# 🔥 HTX - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#connector-info)

🔥 HTX
======

Foundation Partner

Huobi is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Huobi, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [Huobi referral link](https://www.htx.com.pk/invite/en-us/1h?invite_code=re4w9223)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#connector-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.0 | No  | market order type not supported |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#perp-connector) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.htx.com/](https://www.htx.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/huobi/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/huobi/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/huobi](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/huobi)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.htx.com/en-in/opend/newApiPages/](https://www.htx.com/en-in/opend/newApiPages/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.htx.com/support/en-us/detail/360000312282](https://www.htx.com/support/en-us/detail/360000312282)
    
*   **OKX referral link:** [https://www.htx.com.pk/invite/en-us/1h?invite\_code=re4w9223](https://www.htx.com.pk/invite/en-us/1h?invite_code=re4w9223)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Go to https://www.htx.com/en-us
    
*   Click “Account Icon” for a drop-down menu, select “API Management”
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/huobi-api1.png)
    
*   Each user is only allowed to create up to 5 API Keys. For security reasons, we recommend that each API Key should bind up to a maximum of four (4) IP addresses per key. If there is only one IP address, you can enter it directly. If there are more than one IP addresses, you should separate them with halfwidth comma (e.g. 192.168.1.1,192.168.1.2,192.168.1.3).
    
    *   It is compulsory to fill in the ‘Note’ field
    *   Insert your IP address that you wish to bind (optional)
    *   Click “Create” to proceed.
    *   Please visit [HuobiAPI Github](https://huobiapi.github.io/docs/spot/v1/en)
         for code references.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/huobi-api2.png)
    
*   Please complete the SMS, Email & Google Authenticator(GA) security authentication. To generate the security code for SMS and Email, you are required to click the “Send” button.
    
*   Once you have completed the security authentication, click "Confirm" to proceed.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/huobi-api3.png)
    
*   Once you completed the security authentication, your API "Access Key" and "Secret Key" will pop-up. Click "Confirm" to close the pop-up window.
    
*   Kindly note that the “Secret Key” will only be visible at this stage. Should you misplace or lose your 'Secret Key”, you will need to create a new API Key.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/huobi-api4.png)
    
*   You have successfully created an API key with a standard validity of 90 days. You may edit the API key note and bind IP address simply by clicking “Edit”. You may choose to delete the API key by clicking “Delete”.
    
    ![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/huobi-api5.png)
    

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect htx`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your htx API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your htx secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to HTX`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `htx`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/htx](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/htx)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/htx/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect htx_paper_trade` instead of `connect htx`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information. \`\`\`

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# MEXC - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#connector-info)

MEXC
====

Support Hummingbot

Hummingbot Foundation has a fee share partnership with MEXC. When you use our software to trade on MEXC, a custom API header tells MEXC that the trade was executed using Hummingbot, so they share a portion of your fees with us, at no cost to you. To support us, just enter your API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your support! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#connector-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.0 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#perp-connector) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.mexc.com/](https://www.mexc.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/mexc/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/mexc/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/mexcglobal](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/mexcglobal)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.mexc.com/mexc-api](https://www.mexc.com/mexc-api)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.mexc.com/fee](https://www.mexc.com/fee)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Worldwide

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

Log into your MEXC account and click on "API" located under the user centre icon

![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/mexc-api1.png)

Tick all boxes on the next page except for the Withdraw section (Hummingbot doesn't support withdraw at the moment) name your API KEY and click on create

Add your phone number and validate it

![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/mexc-api2.png)

Complete the security verification with your email and your phone number

![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/mexc-api3.png)

Your API is now created. Please keep your Secret Key secure. It will not be shown again. If you forget your Secret Key, you will need to delete the API and create a new one.

![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/mexc-api4.png)

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

Trading Pairs

Please note that not all trading pairs are available for trading by the MEXC API. For a list of trading pairs that are available please check this link - [https://www.mexc.com/user/openapi](https://www.mexc.com/user/openapi)

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect mexc`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your mexc API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your mexc secret key >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to mexc`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `mexc`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/mexc](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/mexc)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/mexc/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect mexc_paper_trade` instead of `connect mexc`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information. \`\`\`

Thanks for your feedback!

.

# 🔥 OKX - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#connector-info)

🔥 OKX
======

Foundation Partner

OKX is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on OKX, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [OKX referral link](https://www.okx.com/join/1931920269)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#connector-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#spot-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.okx.com/](https://www.okx.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/okx/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/okx/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/okx](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/okx)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/en/#overview](https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/en/#overview)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.okx.com/fees](https://www.okx.com/fees)
    
*   **OKX referral link:** [https://www.okx.com/join/1931920269](https://www.okx.com/join/1931920269)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

1.  Log into your OKX account and click the user icon
2.  Select API from the dropdown menu
3.  Choose the account you want to create API Keys for
4.  Click Create API Keys

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect okx`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect okx [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your okx API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your okx secret key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-0-5) Enter your okx passphrase >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to okx.`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `okx`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/okx](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/okx)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect okx_paper_trade` instead of `connect okx`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `okx_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **API Docs**: [https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/en/](https://www.okx.com/docs-v5/en/)
    
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/okx_perpetual)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `MARKET`

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/#usage "Permanent link")

*   Before connecting, be sure to switch to **Single-currency margin** mode in your OKX account settings. Here is a screenshot from the OKX website default:

![Account mode](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/okx/okx-account-mode-setting.png)

*   As position mode (one-way or hedge) is set every time Hummingbot starts, if you want to restart hummingbot you need to check if there are any open positions. If so, you'll need to close them before.

# Kraken - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#connector-info)

Kraken
======

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes |     |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#perp-connector) | Not available |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#perp-candles-feed) | Not built |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.kraken.com/](https://www.kraken.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/kraken/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/kraken/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/kraken](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/kraken)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.kraken.com/rest/](https://docs.kraken.com/rest/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.kraken.com/en-us/features/fee-schedule](https://www.kraken.com/en-us/features/fee-schedule)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: Not available

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

*   Open the account menu (click the profile icon in the top right corner of the page)
*   Select the Settings option
*   Select the Security tab
*   Scroll down and look for Create API Key, you will be prompted to go to Kraken-Pro
*   Select Create API key (you will be able to configure your API key in the next steps)

[![Create API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/1.png)](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/1.png)

Important

Ensure the **Access Websockets connection box is on**. This step is necessary to obtain an authentication token for the WebSocket APIs through the GetWebSocketsToken endpoint. Without this, the Kraken connector will be unable to reconstruct the order book and place trades. See [Troubleshooting](https://hummingbot.org/troubleshooting/#valueerror-no-order-book-exists-for-btc-usd)
 for an example of an error message in Hummingbot when this box is left unchecked

*   Once the API key settings have been configured appropriately, the new API key can be created by clicking on the Generate key button. Make sure to store the API keys in a safe place.

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect kraken`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#__codelineno-0-1) Enter your Kraken API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#__codelineno-0-2) Enter your Kraken secret key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your Kraken API Tier (Starter/intermediate/Pro) >>>` 

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to kraken`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `kraken`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **Folder**: [https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/kraken](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/kraken)
    

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kraken/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect kraken_paper_trade` instead of `connect kraken`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

# 🔥 Kucoin - Hummingbot

 

[Skip to content](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#connector-info)

🔥 Kucoin
=========

Foundation Partner

Kucoin is an [exchange partner](https://hummingbot.org/about/sponsors/)
 of Hummingbot Foundation, so when you use Hummingbot to run bots on Huobi, a portion of your fees goes to support the Foundation and our mission to democratize algo trading with open source software. To help support us, create an account using our [Kucoin referral link](https://www.kucoin.com/r/af/hummingbot)
 and enter that account's API keys into Hummingbot and run bots! Thanks for your help! 🙏

🛠 Connector Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#connector-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Exchange Type**: Centralized Exchange (**CEX**)
*   **Market Type**: Central Limit Order Book (**CLOB**)

| Component | Status | Connector Version | V2 Strategies | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [🔀 Spot Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#spot-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports `MARKET` order type |
| [🔀 Perp Connector](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#perp-connector) | ✅   | v2.1 | Yes | Supports testnet |
| [🕯 Spot Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#spot-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |
| [🕯 Perp Candles Feed](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#perp-candles-feed) | ✅   |     |     |     |

ℹ️ Exchange Info[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#i-exchange-info "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

*   **Website**: [https://www.kucoin.com](https://www.kucoin.com/)
    
*   **CoinMarketCap**: [https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/kucoin/](https://coinmarketcap.com/exchanges/kucoin/)
    
*   **CoinGecko**: [https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/kucoin](https://www.coingecko.com/en/exchanges/kucoin)
    
*   **API Docs**: [https://docs.kucoin.com](https://docs.kucoin.com/)
    
*   **Fees**: [https://www.kucoin.com/vip/level](https://www.kucoin.com/vip/level)
    
*   **Supported Countries**: [https://www.kucoin.com/support/10247584234521](https://www.kucoin.com/support/10247584234521)
    
*   **Kucoin referral link:** [https://www.kucoin.com/r/af/hummingbot](https://www.kucoin.com/r/af/hummingbot)
    

🔑 How to Connect[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#how-to-connect "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Generate API Keys[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#generate-api-keys "Permanent link")

**Step 1**

Log in to [Kucoin](https://www.kucoin.com/)
, click the avatar, in the drop-down menu, select **API Management** > **Create API**.

![API](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/kucoin-api1.png)

**Step 2**

A window will pop up where you can choose either **API Trading** or **Link Third-Party Applications**.

For API trading, enter the API name and API passphrase.

![API Trading](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/kucoin-api2.png)

For linking to a third-party application, first select the name of the third-party app you wish to link. Then, enter the API name and API passphrase, and select API permissions.

For account security purposes, withdrawals are not supported by linking a third-party application, and there is no need to link an IP address. During transactions, the platform will use the configured third-party IP addresses.

![creation process](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/kucoin-api3.png)

During the creation process, pay attention to the relevant prompts and rules on the API creation page. Here are some points for your special attention:

*   The API passphrase is crucial. It is highly recommended to write it down and store it in a secure location. You will need the API passphrase for verification when using the API. Additionally, do not disclose your API key to prevent any potential loss of assets.
    
*   To ensure the security of your funds, API keys that are enabled for spot, margin, or futures trading but not linked to an IP address will be automatically deleted or have their trade permissions disabled after 30 days of inactivity. However, there is no expiration limit for API keys that only have the General permissions.
    
*   To enable access to permissions, you must add your IP address to the whitelist.
    

**Step 3**

A security verification will pop up. Enter your trading password, email verification code, and Google verification code.

**Step 4**

Click the button to confirm and complete the creation.

![confirm](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/kucoin-api4.png)

![api complete](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/kucoin-api5.png)

### Add Keys to Hummingbot[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#add-keys-to-hummingbot "Permanent link")

From inside the Hummingbot client, run `connect kucoin`:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-0-1) >>> connect kucoin [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-0-2)[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-0-3) Enter your kucoin API key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-0-4) Enter your kucoin secret key >>> [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-0-5) Enter your kucoin passphrase >>>`

If connection is successful:

`[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-1-1) You are now connected to kucoin`

🔀 Spot Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#spot-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to spot markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `kucoin`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/exchange/kucoin)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#order-types "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#paper-trading "Permanent link")

Access the [Paper Trade](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/)
 version of this connector by running `connect kucoin_paper_trade` instead of `connect kucoin`.

If this is not available by default, you can configure Hummingbot to add this paper trade exchange. See [Adding Exchanges](https://hummingbot.org/client/global-configs/paper-trade/#adding-exchanges)
 for more information.

🔀 Perp Connector[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#perp-connector "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Integration to perpetual futures markets API endpoints_

*   **ID**: `kucoin_perpetual`
*   **Connection Type**: WebSocket
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/connector/derivative/kucoin_perpetual)
    **

### Order Types[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#order-types_1 "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following `OrderType` constants:

*   `LIMIT`
*   `LIMIT_MAKER`
*   `MARKET`

### Position Modes[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#position-modes "Permanent link")

This connector supports the following position modes:

*   One-way
*   Hedge

### Paper Trading[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#paper-trading_1 "Permanent link")

This perp exchange offers a paper trading mode: [https://www.kucoin.com/support/7909075578521](https://www.kucoin.com/support/7909075578521)

Afer you create an account and create the API keys, you can enter them by using the `connect kucoin_perpetual_testnet` command within the Hummingbot client. Once connected, you should be able to use the testnet with the available perpetual strategies / scripts.

🕯 Spot Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#spot-candles-feed "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

_Collect historical OHCLV data from this exchange's spot markets_

*   **ID**: `kucoin`
*   **Supported Intervals**: 1min | 3min | 5min | 15min | 30min | 1hour | 2hour | 4hour | 6hour | 8hour | 12hour | 1day | 1week
*   **[Github Folder](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/tree/master/hummingbot/data_feed/candles_feed/kucoin_spot_candles)
    **

### Usage[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#usage "Permanent link")

In a Hummingbot script, import `CandlesFactory` to create the candles that you want:

    `[](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-2-1)     from hummingbot.data_feed.candles_feed.candles_factory import CandlesFactory    [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-2-2)     candles = CandlesFactory.get_candle(connector="kucoin",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-2-3)                                         trading_pair="ETH-USDT",                                        [](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#__codelineno-2-4)                                         interval="1m", max_records=50)`

See [candles\_example.py](https://github.com/hummingbot/hummingbot/blob/master/scripts/candles_example.py)
 for more details.

🕯 Perp Candles Feed[¶](https://hummingbot.org/exchanges/kucoin/#perp-candles-feed "Permanent link")

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Candles Feed not available for Perpetual
